---
title: "CopyKat + CellTypes"
author: "KQ"
date: "2025-07-11"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Initial Set Up
```{r}
#Set Working Directory:
setwd("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq")
#/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeqExp2_QC
#Set Seed:
set.seed(34)
#Load Libraries
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(viridis)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(tibble)
library(pheatmap)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(readr)
library(patchwork)
```
# Use seurat_with_copykat for local visualization
```{r}
# ========================================
# COMPREHENSIVE CELL TYPE SIGNATURE ANALYSIS
# Updated with Combo Gene Modules and Multi-Category Visualization
# ========================================

# ========================================
# PART 1: Load Seurat Object and Combo Gene Modules
# ========================================

cat("Loading Seurat object...\n")
# Load your harmony-processed Seurat object
merged_seurat_hmm <- readRDS("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/CopyKat/seurat_with_copykat.rds")

cat("Seurat object loaded with", ncol(merged_seurat_hmm), "cells\n")

# Load combo gene modules
cat("Loading combo gene modules...\n")

# CHC1 module
chc1_combo_module <- read.csv("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/combined_gene_modules/CHC1_Combined_genes.csv")
chc1_combo_up_genes <- chc1_combo_module$Gene[chc1_combo_module$Regulation == "Up"]
chc1_combo_down_genes <- chc1_combo_module$Gene[chc1_combo_module$Regulation == "Down"]

# CHC2 module  
chc2_combo_module <- read.csv("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/combined_gene_modules/CHC2_Combined_genes.csv")
chc2_combo_up_genes <- chc2_combo_module$Gene[chc2_combo_module$Regulation == "Up"]
chc2_combo_down_genes <- chc2_combo_module$Gene[chc2_combo_module$Regulation == "Down"]

# CHC3 module
chc3_combo_module <- read.csv("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/combined_gene_modules/CHC3_Combined_genes.csv")
chc3_combo_up_genes <- chc3_combo_module$Gene[chc3_combo_module$Regulation == "Up"]
chc3_combo_down_genes <- chc3_combo_module$Gene[chc3_combo_module$Regulation == "Down"]

# THC module
thc_combo_module <- read.csv("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/combined_gene_modules/THC_Combined_genes.csv")
thc_combo_up_genes <- thc_combo_module$Gene[thc_combo_module$Regulation == "Up"]
thc_combo_down_genes <- thc_combo_module$Gene[thc_combo_module$Regulation == "Down"]

# Print module information
cat("CHC1 module: Up =", length(chc1_combo_up_genes), "Down =", length(chc1_combo_down_genes), "\n")
cat("CHC2 module: Up =", length(chc2_combo_up_genes), "Down =", length(chc2_combo_down_genes), "\n")
cat("CHC3 module: Up =", length(chc3_combo_up_genes), "Down =", length(chc3_combo_down_genes), "\n")
cat("THC module: Up =", length(thc_combo_up_genes), "Down =", length(thc_combo_down_genes), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 2: Define Comprehensive Gene Signatures (Updated)
# ========================================

cat("Defining comprehensive gene signatures...\n")

# PBMC cell type signatures based on published literature
pbmc_signatures <- list(
  # T cells
  "CD4_T_cells" = c("CD3D", "CD3E", "CD4", "IL7R", "CCR7", "LEF1", "TCF7", "SELL"),
  "CD8_T_cells" = c("CD3D", "CD3E", "CD8A", "CD8B", "CCL5", "GZMA", "GZMB", "PRF1"),
  "Memory_T_cells" = c("IL7R", "CCR7", "CD45RO", "SELL", "TCF7", "LEF1"),
  "Naive_T_cells" = c("CCR7", "SELL", "TCF7", "LEF1", "IL7R"),
  "Regulatory_T_cells" = c("FOXP3", "IL2RA", "CTLA4", "IKZF2", "TIGIT"),
  
  # B cells
  "B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD19", "PAX5", "BLK", "FCRLA"),
  "Naive_B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "TCL1A", "FCRLA", "CD19"),
  "Memory_B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD27", "CD38"),
  "Plasma_cells" = c("IGKC", "IGLC2", "IGLC3", "XBP1", "IRF4", "PRDM1"),
  
  # NK cells
  "NK_cells" = c("GNLY", "NKG7", "GZMA", "GZMB", "PRF1", "KLRD1", "KLRF1", "NCAM1"),
  
  # Myeloid cells
  "Monocytes" = c("CD14", "LYZ", "S100A9", "S100A8", "FCN1", "VCAN"),
  "CD14_Monocytes" = c("CD14", "LYZ", "S100A9", "S100A8", "FCN1", "VCAN"),
  "CD16_Monocytes" = c("FCGR3A", "MS4A7", "CDKN1C", "VMO1", "CKB"),
  "Neutrophils" = c("FCGR3B, CXCR1, CXCR2, S100A12"),
  
  # Dendritic cells
  "Dendritic_cells" = c("FCER1A", "CST3", "CLEC10A", "HLA-DPA1", "HLA-DPB1", "HLA-DQA1"),
  "Plasmacytoid_DC" = c("LILRA4", "TLR7", "ITM2C", "IRF7", "CLEC4C"),
  
  # Platelets
  "Platelets" = c("PPBP", "PF4", "GNG11", "NRGN", "GP9", "TUBB1")
)

# Macrophage signatures
macrophage_signatures <- list(
  # General macrophage markers
  "Macrophages_General" = c("CD68", "CD163", "MSR1", "MRC1", "CSF1R", "ADGRE1", "LYZ"),
  
  # M1 (classically activated) macrophages
  "M1_Macrophages" = c("CD86", "IL1B", "TNF", "CXCL10", "IL6", "NOS2", "CD80", "STAT1"),
  
  # M2 (alternatively activated) macrophages
  "M2_Macrophages" = c("ARG1", "IL10", "MRC1", "CD163", "TGFB1", "IL1RN", "STAT6", "MAF"),
  
  # M2 subtypes
  "M2a_Macrophages" = c("ARG1", "IL10", "MRC1", "CD163", "IL1RN"),
  "M2b_Macrophages" = c("IL10", "IL1B", "TNF", "CD86", "FCGR2B"),
  "M2c_Macrophages" = c("IL10", "TGFB1", "ARG1", "STAT3"),
  
  # Tissue-resident macrophages
  "Alveolar_Macrophages" = c("MARCO", "SIGLEC1", "CD68", "FABP4", "PPARG"),
  "Tumor_Associated_Macrophages" = c("CD163", "CD206", "ARG1", "IL10", "VEGFA", "MMP9"),
  
  # Functional states
  "Anti_inflammatory_Mac" = c("IL10", "TGFB1", "ARG1", "CD163", "MRC1", "IL1RN"),
  "Pro_inflammatory_Mac" = c("IL1B", "TNF", "IL6", "CXCL10", "CD86", "NOS2")
)

# Colorectal tumor signatures
colorectal_signatures <- list(
  # Cancer-Associated Fibroblasts (CAFs)
  "CAF_General" = c("COL1A1", "COL1A2", "COL3A1", "VIM", "ACTA2", "TAGLN", "PDGFRA", "PDGFRB"),
  "CAF_Myofibroblastic" = c("ACTA2", "TAGLN", "MYL9", "MYLK", "TPM2", "CNN1", "CALD1"),
  "CAF_Inflammatory" = c("IL6", "IL8", "CXCL1", "CXCL2", "CCL2", "PDGFRA", "FAP"),
  "CAF_Matrix" = c("COL1A1", "COL1A2", "COL3A1", "COL5A1", "COL6A1", "FN1", "SPARC", "BGN"),
  "CAF_Contractile" = c("ACTA2", "MYH11", "TAGLN", "MYLK", "CNN1", "TPM1", "TPM2"),
  
  # Epithelial cells
  "Epithelial_General" = c("EPCAM", "CDH1", "KRT8", "KRT18", "KRT19", "CLDN3", "CLDN4", "OCLN"),
  "Colonocytes" = c("CDX2", "KRT20", "MUC2", "TFF3", "FABP1", "CA2", "AQP8"),
  "Goblet_cells" = c("MUC2", "TFF3", "CLCA1", "AGR2", "SPDEF", "FCGBP"),
  "Enterocytes" = c("FABP1", "APOA1", "APOA4", "SI", "ALPI", "SLC26A3"),
  
  # Colorectal cancer cells
  "CRC_Tumor_cells" = c("CEACAM5", "CEACAM6", "MYC", "KRAS", "APC", "TP53", "PIK3CA", "REG4", "SOX9", "CDX1"),
  "CRC_Stem_like" = c("LGR5", "ASCL2", "OLFM4", "SMOC2", "CD44", "CD133", "ALDH1A1"),
  "CRC_Proliferative" = c("MKI67", "PCNA", "TOP2A", "MCM2", "MCM6", "CCNA2", "CCNB1"),
  "CRC_EMT" = c("VIM", "ZEB1", "ZEB2", "SNAI1", "SNAI2", "TWIST1", "CDH2", "FN1"),
  
  # Tumor microenvironment
  "Endothelial_cells" = c("PECAM1", "VWF", "CDH5", "PTPRB", "FLT1", "KDR", "TEK"),
  "Pericytes" = c("PDGFRB", "ACTA2", "NG2", "RGS5", "MCAM", "NOTCH3"),
  "Smooth_muscle" = c("ACTA2", "MYH11", "TAGLN", "MYLK", "CNN1", "SMTN"),
  
  # Colorectal-specific stromal
  "CRC_Stroma" = c("COL1A1", "COL3A1", "FAP", "PDGFRA", "THY1", "CD90", "S100A4"),
  "CRC_Activated_stroma" = c("FAP", "PDGFRA", "ACTA2", "COL1A1", "POSTN", "THBS2", "COMP")
)

# Updated hybrid cell signatures with combo modules
hybrid_signatures <- list(
  # CHC1 signatures
  "CHC1_Up" = chc1_combo_up_genes,
  "CHC1_Down" = chc1_combo_down_genes,
  
  # CHC2 signatures  
  "CHC2_Up" = chc2_combo_up_genes,
  "CHC2_Down" = chc2_combo_down_genes,
  
  # CHC3 signatures
  "CHC3_Up" = chc3_combo_up_genes,
  "CHC3_Down" = chc3_combo_down_genes,
  
  # THC signatures
  "THC_Up" = thc_combo_up_genes,
  "THC_Down" = thc_combo_down_genes
)

# Remove empty gene lists
hybrid_signatures <- hybrid_signatures[sapply(hybrid_signatures, length) > 0]

# Combine all signatures
all_signatures <- c(pbmc_signatures, macrophage_signatures, colorectal_signatures, hybrid_signatures)

cat("Total signatures defined:", length(all_signatures), "\n")
cat("PBMC signatures:", length(pbmc_signatures), "\n")
cat("Macrophage signatures:", length(macrophage_signatures), "\n")
cat("Colorectal tumor signatures:", length(colorectal_signatures), "\n")
cat("Hybrid combo signatures:", length(hybrid_signatures), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 3: Check Gene Availability in Dataset
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Checking gene availability in dataset ===\n")

# Function to check gene availability
check_gene_availability <- function(gene_list, signature_name) {
  genes_in_data <- gene_list[gene_list %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
  genes_missing <- gene_list[!gene_list %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
  
  cat(signature_name, "genes found:", length(genes_in_data), "of", length(gene_list), "\n")
  if(length(genes_missing) > 0 && length(genes_missing) <= 10) {
    cat("Missing genes:", paste(genes_missing, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  } else if(length(genes_missing) > 10) {
    cat("Missing genes:", length(genes_missing), "(too many to list)\n")
  }
  
  return(genes_in_data)
}

# Check availability for each signature
signatures_available <- list()
for(sig_name in names(all_signatures)) {
  signatures_available[[sig_name]] <- check_gene_availability(all_signatures[[sig_name]], sig_name)
}

# ========================================
# PART 4: Calculate Module Scores
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Calculating signature scores ===\n")

# Calculate module scores for each signature
for(sig_name in names(signatures_available)) {
  if(length(signatures_available[[sig_name]]) > 0) {
    cat("Processing:", sig_name, "\n")
    
    # Calculate module score
    merged_seurat_hmm <- AddModuleScore(
      object = merged_seurat_hmm,
      features = list(signatures_available[[sig_name]]),
      name = paste0(sig_name, "_Score"),
      ctrl = 100,
      seed = 42
    )
  }
}

# Get all module score column names
score_columns <- grep("_Score1$", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)

# Calculate combo signature scores (Up - Down) for each hybrid type
combo_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")
for(combo_type in combo_types) {
  up_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Up_Score1")
  down_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Down_Score1")
  
  if(up_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) && 
     down_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(combo_type, "_Combo_Score")] <- 
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, up_col] - merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, down_col]
  } else if(up_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(combo_type, "_Combo_Score")] <- 
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, up_col]
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: Identify High-Scoring Cells
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Identifying signature-positive cells ===\n")

# Define thresholds for each cell type (using 75th percentile)
threshold_percentile <- 0.75

# Function to identify positive cells
identify_positive_cells <- function(score_column, threshold_percentile = 0.75) {
  if(score_column %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    threshold <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, score_column], threshold_percentile)
    positive_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, score_column] >= threshold
    cat(gsub("_Score1", "", score_column), "positive cells:", sum(positive_cells), "\n")
    return(positive_cells)
  }
  return(NULL)
}

# Identify positive cells for key signatures
for(score_col in score_columns) {
  positive_cells <- identify_positive_cells(score_col, threshold_percentile)
  if(!is.null(positive_cells)) {
    col_name <- paste0(gsub("_Score1", "", score_col), "_positive")
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, col_name] <- positive_cells
  }
}

# Special handling for combo classifications
for(combo_type in combo_types) {
  score_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Combo_Score")
  if(score_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    high_threshold <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, score_col], 0.8)
    low_threshold <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, score_col], 0.2)
    
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(combo_type, "_Classification")] <- ifelse(
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, score_col] >= high_threshold, paste0("High_", combo_type),
      ifelse(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, score_col] <= low_threshold, paste0("Low_", combo_type), 
             paste0("Medium_", combo_type))
    )
    
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(combo_type, "_positive")] <- 
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(combo_type, "_Classification")] == paste0("High_", combo_type)
    
    combo_counts <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(combo_type, "_Classification")])
    cat(combo_type, "cell classification:\n")
    print(combo_counts)
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 6: Create Cell Type Classifications (Updated)
# ========================================

# Simplified cell type prediction based on major categories
major_signatures <- c("CD4_T_cells_Score1", "CD8_T_cells_Score1", "B_cells_Score1", 
                     "NK_cells_Score1", "Monocytes_Score1", "Macrophages_General_Score1",
                     "CAF_General_Score1", "CRC_Tumor_cells_Score1", "Epithelial_General_Score1")

available_major_sigs <- major_signatures[major_signatures %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

if(length(available_major_sigs) > 0) {
  merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Prediction <- "Unassigned"
  
  score_matrix <- as.matrix(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, available_major_sigs])
  max_scores <- apply(score_matrix, 1, which.max)
  
  cell_type_names <- gsub("_Score1", "", available_major_sigs)
  merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Prediction <- cell_type_names[max_scores]
  
  # Print original cell type counts
  cat("\n=== Original Cell Type Predictions ===\n")
  cell_type_counts <- table(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Prediction)
  print(cell_type_counts)
  
  # Create collapsed cell type classification
  merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed <- merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Prediction
  
  # Collapse immune cell types (T cells, B cells, NK cells)
  immune_types <- c("CD4_T_cells", "CD8_T_cells", "B_cells", "NK_cells")
  merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed[merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed %in% immune_types] <- "Immune"
  
  # Collapse myeloid cell types
  myeloid_types <- c("Monocytes", "Macrophages_General")
  merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed[merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed %in% myeloid_types] <- "Monocytes_Macrophages"
  
  # Collapse epithelial cell types (including CRC tumor cells)
  epithelial_types <- c("CRC_Tumor_cells", "Epithelial_General")
  merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed[merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed %in% epithelial_types] <- "Epithelial"
  
  # Print collapsed cell type counts
  cat("\n=== Collapsed Cell Type Predictions ===\n")
  collapsed_counts <- table(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed)
  print(collapsed_counts)
}

# ========================================
# PART 7: UMAP Visualizations (Updated)
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Creating visualizations ===\n")

# Ensure UMAP is available
if(!"umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  cat("Running UMAP...\n")
  merged_seurat_hmm <- RunUMAP(merged_seurat_hmm, dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE)
}

# Function to create signature plots
create_signature_plots <- function(signature_pattern, plot_title, color_scheme = "red") {
  sig_cols <- score_columns[grepl(signature_pattern, score_columns)]
  
  if(length(sig_cols) > 0) {
    cat("Creating", plot_title, "plots...\n")
    
    # Clean up names for plotting
    clean_names <- gsub("_Score1", "", sig_cols)
    names(sig_cols) <- clean_names
    
    # Create individual plots
    plots <- list()
    for(i in 1:length(sig_cols)) {
      plots[[i]] <- FeaturePlot(
        merged_seurat_hmm,
        features = sig_cols[i],
        pt.size = 0.5,
        order = TRUE,
        cols = c("lightgray", color_scheme)
      ) + 
        ggtitle(names(sig_cols)[i]) +
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
          legend.position = "right"
        )
    }
    
    # Arrange and print plots
    plots_per_page <- 4
    num_pages <- ceiling(length(plots) / plots_per_page)
    
    for(page in 1:num_pages) {
      start_idx <- (page - 1) * plots_per_page + 1
      end_idx <- min(page * plots_per_page, length(plots))
      
      combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots[start_idx:end_idx], ncol = 2)
      print(combined_plot)
    }
  }
}

# Create plots for different signature categories
create_signature_plots("CD4_T_cells|CD8_T_cells|B_cells|NK_cells|Dendritic", "PBMC", "red")
create_signature_plots("Macrophages|M1_|M2_|Monocytes", "Macrophage", "darkgreen")
create_signature_plots("CAF_|Epithelial|CRC_|Colonocytes|Goblet|Enterocytes|Endothelial|Pericytes", "Colorectal", "purple")

# Combo signature plots
combo_score_cols <- paste0(combo_types, "_Combo_Score")
existing_combo_cols <- combo_score_cols[combo_score_cols %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

if(length(existing_combo_cols) > 0) {
  cat("Creating combo signature plots...\n")
  
  combo_plots <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(existing_combo_cols)) {
    combo_plots[[i]] <- FeaturePlot(
      merged_seurat_hmm,
      features = existing_combo_cols[i],
      pt.size = 0.5,
      cols = c("blue", "lightgray", "red")
    ) + 
      ggtitle(gsub("_Combo_Score", "", existing_combo_cols[i])) + 
      theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  }
  
  if(length(combo_plots) > 0) {
    combined_combo_plot <- wrap_plots(combo_plots, ncol = 2)
    print(combined_combo_plot)
  }
}

# Original and collapsed cell type prediction plots
if("Cell_Type_Prediction" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  p_celltype_original <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Cell_Type_Prediction", pt.size = 0.5) +
                        ggtitle("Original Predicted Cell Types") + 
                        theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  print(p_celltype_original)
}

# Original and collapsed cell type prediction plots (Bolder Colors)
if ("Cell_Type_Prediction" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  p_celltype_original <- DimPlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    group.by = "Cell_Type_Prediction",
    pt.size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5
  ) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
    ggtitle("Original Predicted Cell Types") +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "black"),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black"),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "black"),
      legend.text = element_text(color = "white"),
      legend.title = element_text(color = "white"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "white"),
      axis.title = element_text(color = "white"),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "white"),
      plot.title = element_text(color = "white"),
      aspect.ratio = 1
    )
  
  print(p_celltype_original)
}


# Collapsed cell type prediction plots with custom colors
if("Cell_Type_Collapsed" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Get unique cell types in the collapsed classification
  unique_types <- unique(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed)
  
  # Define custom color palette
  custom_colors <- c()
  
  # Set specific colors for each cell type
  for(cell_type in unique_types) {
    if(cell_type == "Epithelial") {
      custom_colors[cell_type] <- "gray45"
    } else if(cell_type == "Monocytes_Macrophages") {
      custom_colors[cell_type] <- "cadetblue3"
    } else if(cell_type == "CAF_General") {
      custom_colors[cell_type] <- "purple"
    } else if(cell_type == "Immune") {
      custom_colors[cell_type] <- "palegreen3"
    } else {
      # For any other cell types, use default gray
      custom_colors[cell_type] <- "black"
    }
  }
  
  p_celltype_collapsed <- DimPlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm, 
    group.by = "Cell_Type_Collapsed", 
    pt.size = 0.5,
    cols = custom_colors
  ) +
    ggtitle("Collapsed Cell Types") + 
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1, legend.title = element_text(size = 10))
  
  print(p_celltype_collapsed)
}

# Individual combo classification plots
for(combo_type in combo_types) {
  class_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Classification")
  if(class_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    
    # Create named color vector properly
    color_vec <- c("red3", "gray", "blue")
    names(color_vec) <- c(paste0("High_", combo_type), 
                         paste0("Medium_", combo_type), 
                         paste0("Low_", combo_type))
    
    p_combo <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                       group.by = class_col, 
                       pt.size = 0.5,
                       cols = color_vec) +
               ggtitle(paste(combo_type, "Classification")) + 
               theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
    print(p_combo)
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 8: Multi-Category Panel Visualization (REVISED)
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Creating panel visualizations for each base classification ===\n")

# Define the combo types (adjust these to match your actual combo column names)
combo_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")  # Update these to match your actual combo types
base_classifications <- c("Immune", "Epithelial", "Monocytes_Macrophages", "CAF_General")

# Function to create individual plots for a base classification and its combos
create_classification_panel <- function(base_classification, combo_types) {
  
  if(!"Cell_Type_Collapsed" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("Cell_Type_Collapsed not found in metadata\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  panel_plots <- list()
  
  # Plot 1: Base classification only
  base_annotation <- ifelse(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed == base_classification, 
                           base_classification, "Other")
  
  # Base classification colors
  base_colors <- c("Other" = "lightgray")
  if(base_classification == "Immune") {
    base_colors[base_classification] <- "palegreen3"
  } else if(base_classification == "Epithelial") {
    base_colors[base_classification] <- "gray45"
  } else if(base_classification == "Monocytes_Macrophages") {
    base_colors[base_classification] <- "cadetblue3"
  } else if(base_classification == "CAF_General") {
    base_colors[base_classification] <- "purple"
  } else {
    base_colors[base_classification] <- "black"
  }
  
  # Create base plot
  p_base <- DimPlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    group.by = "Cell_Type_Collapsed",
    cells.highlight = which(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed == base_classification),
    cols.highlight = base_colors[base_classification],
    cols = "lightgray",
    pt.size = 0.5
  ) +
    ggtitle(paste(base_classification, "Cells")) +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1,
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5)
    )
  
  panel_plots[[1]] <- p_base
  
  # Create combo plots
  plot_index <- 2
  for(combo_type in combo_types) {
    combo_positive_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_positive")
    
    if(combo_positive_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
      
      # Get cells that are both base classification and combo-positive
      base_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed == base_classification
      combo_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, combo_positive_col]
      target_cells <- base_cells & combo_cells
      
      # Always create a plot, even if no combo cells exist
      
      # Create annotation for this combo
      combo_annotation <- rep("Other", length(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed))
      combo_annotation[base_cells] <- base_classification
      
      # Colors for this combo plot
      combo_colors <- c(
        "Other" = "lightgray"
      )
      combo_colors[base_classification] <- base_colors[base_classification]
      
      # Add combo-positive cells if they exist
      if(sum(target_cells) > 0) {
        combo_annotation[target_cells] <- paste0(base_classification, "+", combo_type)
        combo_colors[paste0(base_classification, "+", combo_type)] <- "red"
        
        # Print combo statistics
        cat("  ", paste0(base_classification, "+", combo_type), ":", sum(target_cells), "cells\n")
      } else {
        cat("  No", paste0(base_classification, "+", combo_type), "cells found - showing base cells only\n")
      }
      
      # Create temporary metadata column
      temp_col <- paste0("temp_", base_classification, "_", combo_type)
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, temp_col] <- combo_annotation
      
      # Create combo plot with appropriate subtitle
      plot_title <- paste0(base_classification, " + ", combo_type)
      if(sum(target_cells) == 0) {
        plot_title <- paste0(plot_title, "\n(No combo cells)")
      }
      
      p_combo <- DimPlot(
        merged_seurat_hmm,
        group.by = temp_col,
        pt.size = 0.5,
        cols = combo_colors
      ) +
        ggtitle(plot_title) +
        theme(
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
        )
      
      panel_plots[[plot_index]] <- p_combo
      plot_index <- plot_index + 1
      
      # Clean up temporary column
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, temp_col] <- NULL
    } else {
      cat("  Column", combo_positive_col, "not found in metadata\n")
    }
  }
  
  return(panel_plots)
}

# Function to arrange plots in a panel
arrange_panel_plots <- function(plots, base_classification) {
  if(length(plots) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Try to use cowplot first, then gridExtra
  if(require(cowplot, quietly = TRUE)) {
    # Arrange in a row or grid depending on number of plots
    if(length(plots) <= 3) {
      panel <- plot_grid(plotlist = plots, ncol = length(plots), nrow = 1)
    } else {
      # Arrange in 2 rows
      ncol <- ceiling(length(plots) / 2)
      panel <- plot_grid(plotlist = plots, ncol = ncol, nrow = 2)
    }
    
    # Add overall title
    title <- ggdraw() + 
      draw_label(paste("Multi-Category Panel:", base_classification), 
                fontface = 'bold', size = 14)
    
    final_panel <- plot_grid(title, panel, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.1, 1))
    return(final_panel)
    
  } else if(require(gridExtra, quietly = TRUE)) {
    # Use gridExtra
    if(length(plots) <= 3) {
      panel <- grid.arrange(grobs = plots, ncol = length(plots), nrow = 1,
                           top = textGrob(paste("Multi-Category Panel:", base_classification),
                                        gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold")))
    } else {
      ncol <- ceiling(length(plots) / 2)
      panel <- grid.arrange(grobs = plots, ncol = ncol, nrow = 2,
                           top = textGrob(paste("Multi-Category Panel:", base_classification),
                                        gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold")))
    }
    return(panel)
  } else {
    # No grid arrangement available, print plots individually
    cat("No grid arrangement package available. Printing plots individually.\n")
    for(i in 1:length(plots)) {
      print(plots[[i]])
    }
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Create panels for each base classification
all_panels <- list()

for(base_class in base_classifications) {
  cat("\n=== Creating panel for", base_class, "===\n")
  
  # Get base classification count
  base_count <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed == base_class)
  cat("Total", base_class, "cells:", base_count, "\n")
  
  if(base_count > 0) {
    # Create panel plots
    panel_plots <- create_classification_panel(base_class, combo_types)
    
    if(!is.null(panel_plots) && length(panel_plots) > 0) {
      # Arrange and display panel
      panel <- arrange_panel_plots(panel_plots, base_class)
      all_panels[[base_class]] <- panel
      
      if(!is.null(panel)) {
        print(panel)
      }
    }
  } else {
    cat("No", base_class, "cells found\n")
  }
}

# Print summary
cat("\n=== Panel Summary ===\n")
for(base_class in names(all_panels)) {
  cat("Created panel for:", base_class, "\n")
}

# Optional: Save individual plots to list for further manipulation
cat("\n=== Individual plot access ===\n")
cat("Individual plots can be accessed via the panel structure if needed for further customization.\n")

# ========================================
# PART 9: Generate Summary Statistics and Heatmaps
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Summary Statistics ===\n")

# Calculate average scores per cluster
score_data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, c("seurat_clusters", score_columns)]

# Calculate average scores per cluster
avg_scores <- score_data %>%
  group_by(seurat_clusters) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), mean, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  column_to_rownames("seurat_clusters")

# Clean column names
colnames(avg_scores) <- gsub("_Score1", "", colnames(avg_scores))

# Add combo scores if available
combo_score_cols <- paste0(combo_types, "_Combo_Score")
existing_combo_cols <- combo_score_cols[combo_score_cols %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

if(length(existing_combo_cols) > 0) {
  combo_avg <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data %>%
    group_by(seurat_clusters) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(existing_combo_cols), mean, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    column_to_rownames("seurat_clusters")
  
  # Clean combo column names
  colnames(combo_avg) <- gsub("_Combo_Score", "_Combo", colnames(combo_avg))
  
  avg_scores <- cbind(avg_scores, combo_avg)
}

print("Average signature scores per cluster (first 10 columns):")
print(round(avg_scores[, 1:min(10, ncol(avg_scores))], 3))

# Create category-specific heatmaps
create_category_heatmap <- function(pattern, title) {
  cols <- grep(pattern, colnames(avg_scores))
  if(length(cols) > 0) {
    pheatmap(
      t(avg_scores[, cols]),
      cluster_cols = TRUE,
      cluster_rows = TRUE,
      scale = "row",
      main = paste(title, "Signature Scores by Cluster"),
      fontsize = 8,
      angle_col = 45,
      color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100)
    )
  }
}

# Create heatmaps for different categories
create_category_heatmap("CD4_T|CD8_T|B_cells|NK_cells|Monocytes|Dendritic", "PBMC")
create_category_heatmap("Macrophages|M1_|M2_", "Macrophage")
create_category_heatmap("CAF_|Epithelial|CRC_|Colonocytes|Goblet|Enterocytes|Endothelial|Pericytes", "Colorectal")

# Combo signature heatmap
combo_cols <- grep("_Combo$", colnames(avg_scores))
if(length(combo_cols) > 0) {
  pheatmap(
    t(avg_scores[, combo_cols]),
    cluster_cols = TRUE,
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    scale = "row",
    main = "Combo Signature Scores by Cluster",
    fontsize = 10,
    angle_col = 45,
    color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100)
  )
}

# Cell type distribution analysis
cat("\n=== Cell Type Distribution Analysis ===\n")

# Calculate cell type proportions per cluster
if("Cell_Type_Collapsed" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  celltype_cluster <- table(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters, merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed)
  celltype_proportions <- prop.table(celltype_cluster, margin = 1)
  
  print("Cell type proportions per cluster:")
  print(round(celltype_proportions, 3))
  
  # Create cell type proportion heatmap
  pheatmap(
    celltype_proportions,
    cluster_cols = TRUE,
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    scale = "none",
    main = "Cell Type Proportions by Cluster",
    fontsize = 10,
    angle_col = 45,
    color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "darkblue"))(100)
  )
}

# Multi-category distribution analysis
if("Comprehensive_Multi_Category" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  multi_cluster <- table(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters, merged_seurat_hmm$Comprehensive_Multi_Category)
  multi_proportions <- prop.table(multi_cluster, margin = 1)
  
  print("Multi-category proportions per cluster:")
  print(round(multi_proportions, 3))
  
  # Create multi-category proportion heatmap (if not too many categories)
  if(ncol(multi_proportions) <= 20) {
    pheatmap(
      multi_proportions,
      cluster_cols = TRUE,
      cluster_rows = TRUE,
      scale = "none",
      main = "Multi-Category Proportions by Cluster",
      fontsize = 8,
      angle_col = 45,
      color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "darkred"))(100)
    )
  }
}

# Summary statistics for combo-positive cells
combo_summary <- data.frame(
  Combo_Type = character(),
  Total_Positive = numeric(),
  Percent_Positive = numeric(),
  Top_Cluster = character(),
  Max_Cluster_Count = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for(combo_type in combo_types) {
  pos_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_positive")
  if(pos_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    n_positive <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, pos_col])
    pct_positive <- round(n_positive / ncol(merged_seurat_hmm) * 100, 2)
    
    # Find cluster with most positive cells
    cluster_counts <- table(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters[merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, pos_col]])
    if(length(cluster_counts) > 0) {
      top_cluster <- names(cluster_counts)[which.max(cluster_counts)]
      max_count <- max(cluster_counts)
    } else {
      top_cluster <- "None"
      max_count <- 0
    }
    
    combo_summary <- rbind(combo_summary, data.frame(
      Combo_Type = combo_type,
      Total_Positive = n_positive,
      Percent_Positive = pct_positive,
      Top_Cluster = top_cluster,
      Max_Cluster_Count = max_count,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}

# Enhanced Cell Type Proportions with Combo Signatures Heatmap
cat("\n=== Enhanced Cell Type and Combo Signature Analysis ===\n")

# Create combined heatmap with cell type proportions and combo signatures
if("Cell_Type_Collapsed" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Calculate cell type proportions per cluster
  celltype_cluster <- table(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters, merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed)
  celltype_proportions <- prop.table(celltype_cluster, margin = 1)
  
  # Get combo signature scores (normalized by cluster)
  combo_signatures <- c("CHC1_Combo", "CHC2_Combo", "CHC3_Combo", "THC_Combo")
  existing_combo_sigs <- combo_signatures[combo_signatures %in% colnames(avg_scores)]
  
  if(length(existing_combo_sigs) > 0) {
    # Extract combo scores for each cluster
    combo_scores_by_cluster <- avg_scores[, existing_combo_sigs, drop = FALSE]
    
    # Normalize combo scores to 0-1 range for better visualization alongside proportions
    combo_scores_normalized <- apply(combo_scores_by_cluster, 2, function(x) {
      (x - min(x, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(x, na.rm = TRUE) - min(x, na.rm = TRUE))
    })
    
    # Combine cell type proportions with normalized combo scores
    combined_data <- cbind(celltype_proportions, combo_scores_normalized)
    
    # Create the enhanced heatmap
    pheatmap(
      t(combined_data),
      cluster_cols = TRUE,
      cluster_rows = TRUE,
      scale = "none",  # Don't scale since we already normalized
      main = "Cell Type Proportions and Combo Signatures by Cluster",
      fontsize = 10,
      angle_col = 45,
      color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "navy"))(100),
      gaps_row = nrow(celltype_proportions),  # Add gap between cell types and combo sigs
      annotation_row = data.frame(
        Type = c(rep("Cell_Type", nrow(celltype_proportions)), 
                rep("Combo_Signature", length(existing_combo_sigs))),
        row.names = c(rownames(celltype_proportions), existing_combo_sigs)
      )
    )
    
    # Print combo signature scores by cluster
    cat("\nCombo signature scores by cluster:\n")
    print(round(combo_scores_by_cluster, 3))
    
    # Identify top clusters for each combo signature
    cat("\nTop clusters for each combo signature:\n")
    for(combo_sig in existing_combo_sigs) {
      top_clusters <- names(sort(combo_scores_by_cluster[, combo_sig], decreasing = TRUE))[1:3]
      top_scores <- round(sort(combo_scores_by_cluster[, combo_sig], decreasing = TRUE)[1:3], 3)
      cat(sprintf("%s: Cluster %s (%.3f), Cluster %s (%.3f), Cluster %s (%.3f)\n", 
                  combo_sig, top_clusters[1], top_scores[1], 
                  top_clusters[2], top_scores[2], 
                  top_clusters[3], top_scores[3]))
    }
    
  } else {
    cat("No combo signatures found in the data. Creating standard cell type heatmap.\n")
    # Create standard cell type proportion heatmap
    pheatmap(
      celltype_proportions,
      cluster_cols = TRUE,
      cluster_rows = TRUE,
      scale = "none",
      main = "Cell Type Proportions by Cluster",
      fontsize = 10,
      angle_col = 45,
      color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "darkblue"))(100)
    )
  }
  
  # Additional analysis: Find clusters enriched for specific combo signatures
  if(length(existing_combo_sigs) > 0) {
    cat("\n=== Combo Signature Enrichment Analysis ===\n")
    
    # Define high-scoring threshold (top 25% of scores)
    for(combo_sig in existing_combo_sigs) {
      threshold <- quantile(combo_scores_by_cluster[, combo_sig], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
      high_clusters <- rownames(combo_scores_by_cluster)[combo_scores_by_cluster[, combo_sig] >= threshold]
      
      cat(sprintf("\nClusters with high %s scores (>= %.3f):\n", combo_sig, threshold))
      for(cluster in high_clusters) {
        score <- combo_scores_by_cluster[cluster, combo_sig]
        # Get dominant cell type in this cluster
        dominant_celltype <- names(which.max(celltype_proportions[cluster, ]))
        dominant_prop <- max(celltype_proportions[cluster, ])
        cat(sprintf("  Cluster %s: Score %.3f, Dominant cell type: %s (%.1f%%)\n", 
                    cluster, score, dominant_celltype, dominant_prop * 100))
      }
    }
  }
  
} else {
  cat("Cell_Type_Collapsed column not found in metadata.\n")
}

print("Combo signature summary:")
print(combo_summary)

# ========================================
# PART 10: Export Results
# ========================================
library(tidyr)
cat("\n=== Exporting Results ===\n")

# Create output directory
output_dir <- "Comprehensive_Signature_Analysis_Results"
if(!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# 1. Save average scores per cluster
write.csv(avg_scores, file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Signature_Scores_by_Cluster.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

# 2. Save updated Seurat object
saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, file.path(output_dir, "merged_seurat_comprehensive_signatures.rds"))

# 3. Save signature gene lists
signature_summary <- data.frame(
  Signature = rep(names(all_signatures), sapply(all_signatures, length)),
  Gene = unlist(all_signatures),
  Category = rep(c(rep("PBMC", length(pbmc_signatures)), 
                   rep("Macrophage", length(macrophage_signatures)),
                   rep("Colorectal", length(colorectal_signatures)),
                   rep("Hybrid", length(hybrid_signatures))), 
                 sapply(all_signatures, length)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

write.csv(signature_summary, file.path(output_dir, "Gene_Signature_Summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 4. Save cell type distributions
if("Cell_Type_Collapsed" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  celltype_summary <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data %>%
    group_by(seurat_clusters, Cell_Type_Collapsed) %>%
    summarise(Count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Cell_Type_Collapsed, values_from = Count, values_fill = 0)
  
  write.csv(celltype_summary, file.path(output_dir, "Cell_Type_Distribution_by_Cluster.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

# 5. Save multi-category distributions
if("Comprehensive_Multi_Category" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  multi_summary <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data %>%
    group_by(seurat_clusters, Comprehensive_Multi_Category) %>%
    summarise(Count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Comprehensive_Multi_Category, values_from = Count, values_fill = 0)
  
  write.csv(multi_summary, file.path(output_dir, "Multi_Category_Distribution_by_Cluster.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

# 6. Save combo signature summary
write.csv(combo_summary, file.path(output_dir, "Combo_Signature_Summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 7. Save detailed cell annotations
cell_annotations <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data %>%
  select(matches("seurat_clusters|Cell_Type|positive|Classification|Multi_")) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Cell_ID")

write.csv(cell_annotations, file.path(output_dir, "Detailed_Cell_Annotations.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 8. Create analysis summary report
analysis_summary <- list(
  "Analysis_Date" = Sys.Date(),
  "Total_Cells" = ncol(merged_seurat_hmm),
  "Total_Clusters" = length(unique(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters)),
  "Signatures_Analyzed" = list(
    "PBMC" = length(pbmc_signatures),
    "Macrophage" = length(macrophage_signatures),
    "Colorectal" = length(colorectal_signatures),
    "Hybrid" = length(hybrid_signatures),
    "Total" = length(all_signatures)
  ),
  "Module_Scores_Calculated" = length(score_columns),
  "Combo_Types_Analyzed" = combo_types,
  "Cell_Type_Categories" = if("Cell_Type_Collapsed" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    unique(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed)
  } else {
    "Not available"
  },
  "Multi_Categories_Created" = if("Comprehensive_Multi_Category" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    length(unique(merged_seurat_hmm$Comprehensive_Multi_Category))
  } else {
    0
  }
)

# Save analysis summary as JSON
write(toJSON(analysis_summary, pretty = TRUE), file.path(output_dir, "Analysis_Summary.json"))

# ========================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
# ========================================

cat("\n=== COMPREHENSIVE SIGNATURE ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("PBMC signatures analyzed:", length(pbmc_signatures), "\n")
cat("Macrophage signatures analyzed:", length(macrophage_signatures), "\n")
cat("Colorectal tumor signatures analyzed:", length(colorectal_signatures), "\n")
cat("Hybrid combo signatures analyzed:", length(hybrid_signatures), "\n")
cat("Total module scores calculated:", length(score_columns), "\n")
cat("Combo types analyzed:", paste(combo_types, collapse = ", "), "\n")

if("Cell_Type_Collapsed" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("Cell type categories identified:", length(unique(merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Collapsed)), "\n")
}

if("Comprehensive_Multi_Category" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("Multi-category annotations created:", length(unique(merged_seurat_hmm$Comprehensive_Multi_Category)), "\n")
}

cat("\n=== FILES GENERATED ===\n")
cat("All files saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("1. Comprehensive_Signature_Scores_by_Cluster.csv - Average signature scores per cluster\n")
cat("2. merged_seurat_comprehensive_signatures.rds - Seurat object with all signature scores\n")
cat("3. Gene_Signature_Summary.csv - Complete list of genes in each signature\n")
cat("4. Cell_Type_Distribution_by_Cluster.csv - Cell type counts per cluster\n")
cat("5. Multi_Category_Distribution_by_Cluster.csv - Multi-category counts per cluster\n")
cat("6. Combo_Signature_Summary.csv - Summary statistics for combo signatures\n")
cat("7. Detailed_Cell_Annotations.csv - Per-cell annotation details\n")
cat("8. Analysis_Summary.json - Complete analysis metadata\n")
cat("9. UMAP plots showing signature distributions by category\n")
cat("10. Heatmaps showing signature patterns by cluster and category\n")
cat("11. Multi-category UMAP visualizations\n")

cat("\nComprehensive signature analysis with multi-category classifications completed successfully!\n")
```
#RUN AFTER MODULE ANALYSIS TO SAVE TO META DATA
```{r}
# ========================================
# STANDALONE CELL TYPE ANNOTATION 
# Works directly with existing signature scores
# ========================================

cat("Creating definitive cell type annotations using existing scores...\n")

# Define the key signatures for major cell types AND hybrid modules
major_cell_signatures <- c(
  "CD4_T_cells_Score1",
  "CD8_T_cells_Score1", 
  "B_cells_Score1",
  "NK_cells_Score1",
  "Monocytes_Score1",
  "Macrophages_General_Score1",
  "CAF_General_Score1",
  "Epithelial_General_Score1",
  "CRC_Tumor_cells_Score1"
)

# Add hybrid combo signatures
hybrid_combo_signatures <- c(
  "CHC1_Combo_Score",
  "CHC2_Combo_Score", 
  "CHC3_Combo_Score",
  "THC_Combo_Score"
)

# Check which signatures are available in your data
available_major_signatures <- major_cell_signatures[major_cell_signatures %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
available_hybrid_signatures <- hybrid_combo_signatures[hybrid_combo_signatures %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

# Combine all available signatures
all_available_signatures <- c(available_major_signatures, available_hybrid_signatures)

cat("Available major signatures:", paste(available_major_signatures, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Available hybrid signatures:", paste(available_hybrid_signatures, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Total signatures for assignment:", length(all_available_signatures), "\n")

# Create clean cell type names for all signatures
cell_type_names <- c(
  gsub("_Score1", "", available_major_signatures),
  gsub("_Combo_Score", "", available_hybrid_signatures)
)
names(cell_type_names) <- all_available_signatures

# Method 1: Highest scoring signature wins (INCLUDING HYBRID MODULES)
if(length(all_available_signatures) > 0) {
  
  # Extract signature scores for each cell - work directly with metadata
  signature_matrix <- as.matrix(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, all_available_signatures, drop = FALSE])
  colnames(signature_matrix) <- cell_type_names[all_available_signatures]
  
  # Find the signature with the highest score for each cell
  max_signature_indices <- apply(signature_matrix, 1, which.max)
  
  # Assign cell types based on highest scoring signature - add directly to metadata
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type <- colnames(signature_matrix)[max_signature_indices]
  
  # Method 2: Threshold-based assignment (more stringent)
  threshold_percentile <- 0.6  # 60th percentile threshold
  
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Thresholded_Cell_Type <- "Unassigned"
  
  for(i in 1:length(all_available_signatures)) {
    sig_col <- all_available_signatures[i]
    cell_type <- cell_type_names[sig_col]
    
    # Calculate threshold for this signature
    threshold <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, sig_col], threshold_percentile, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Find cells above threshold for this signature
    above_threshold <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, sig_col] >= threshold
    above_threshold[is.na(above_threshold)] <- FALSE
    
    # Among cells above threshold, assign this cell type to those where it's the highest score
    candidate_cells <- which(above_threshold)
    if(length(candidate_cells) > 0) {
      # For these candidates, check if this signature is their highest
      candidate_scores <- signature_matrix[candidate_cells, , drop = FALSE]
      highest_sig <- apply(candidate_scores, 1, which.max)
      
      # Assign cell type where this signature is highest
      final_assignments <- candidate_cells[highest_sig == i]
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Thresholded_Cell_Type[final_assignments] <- cell_type
    }
  }
  
  # Method 3: Confidence-based assignment
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Cell_Type_Confidence <- "Low"
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Confident_Cell_Type <- "Unassigned"
  
  # Calculate confidence scores
  confidence_scores <- apply(signature_matrix, 1, function(x) {
    sorted_scores <- sort(x, decreasing = TRUE)
    if(length(sorted_scores) >= 2) {
      return(sorted_scores[1] - sorted_scores[2])
    } else {
      return(sorted_scores[1])
    }
  })
  
  # Define confidence thresholds
  high_confidence_threshold <- quantile(confidence_scores, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  medium_confidence_threshold <- quantile(confidence_scores, 0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Assign confidence levels
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Cell_Type_Confidence[confidence_scores >= high_confidence_threshold] <- "High"
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Cell_Type_Confidence[confidence_scores >= medium_confidence_threshold & 
                                                   confidence_scores < high_confidence_threshold] <- "Medium"
  
  # Only assign cell types for high and medium confidence cells
  high_medium_confidence <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Cell_Type_Confidence %in% c("High", "Medium")
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Confident_Cell_Type[high_medium_confidence] <- 
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type[high_medium_confidence]
  
  # Method 4: Create the collapsed categories + HYBRID CATEGORIES
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Collapsed_Cell_Type_New <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type
  
  # Group immune cells
  immune_types <- c("CD4_T_cells", "CD8_T_cells", "B_cells", "NK_cells")
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Collapsed_Cell_Type_New[merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Collapsed_Cell_Type_New %in% immune_types] <- "Immune"
  
  # Group myeloid cells
  myeloid_types <- c("Monocytes", "Macrophages_General")
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Collapsed_Cell_Type_New[merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Collapsed_Cell_Type_New %in% myeloid_types] <- "Myeloid"
  
  # Group epithelial/tumor cells
  epithelial_types <- c("Epithelial_General", "CRC_Tumor_cells")
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Collapsed_Cell_Type_New[merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Collapsed_Cell_Type_New %in% epithelial_types] <- "Epithelial"
  
  # Hybrid modules stay as individual categories (CHC1, CHC2, CHC3, THC)
  # CAF stays as is
  
  # Method 5: Create EXTENDED collapsed categories (keeps hybrids separate)
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type
  
  # Group traditional cell types but keep hybrid modules separate
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type[merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type %in% immune_types] <- "Immune"
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type[merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type %in% myeloid_types] <- "Myeloid"  
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type[merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type %in% epithelial_types] <- "Epithelial"
  # CHC1, CHC2, CHC3, THC, CAF_General remain as individual categories
  
  # Optional: Create a combined annotation that prioritizes confidence
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Cell_Type <- ifelse(
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Confident_Cell_Type == "Unassigned",
    paste0(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type, "_LowConf"),
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Confident_Cell_Type
  )
  
  # Print summary statistics
  cat("\n=== CELL TYPE ASSIGNMENT SUMMARY ===\n")
  
  cat("\nPrimary Cell Type (highest scoring signature):\n")
  print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type))
  
  cat("\nThresholded Cell Type (above", threshold_percentile, "percentile):\n")
  print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Thresholded_Cell_Type))
  
  cat("\nConfident Cell Type (high/medium confidence only):\n")
  print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Confident_Cell_Type))
  
  cat("\nCollapsed Cell Type categories (NEW):\n")
  print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Collapsed_Cell_Type_New))
  
  cat("\nExtended Cell Type (traditional grouped + hybrid modules separate):\n")
  print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type))
  
  cat("\nCell Type Confidence distribution:\n")
  print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Cell_Type_Confidence))
  
  cat("\nFinal Cell Type (confident assignments + low confidence flagged):\n")
  print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Cell_Type))
  
  # Add signature scores to summary
  cat("\n=== SIGNATURE SCORE RANGES ===\n")
  cat("Traditional Cell Type Signatures:\n")
  for(sig in available_major_signatures) {
    cell_type <- gsub("_Score1", "", sig)
    score_range <- range(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, sig], na.rm = TRUE)
    score_mean <- mean(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, sig], na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Range [%.3f, %.3f], Mean: %.3f\n", 
                cell_type, score_range[1], score_range[2], score_mean))
  }
  
  cat("Hybrid Module Signatures:\n")
  for(sig in available_hybrid_signatures) {
    cell_type <- gsub("_Combo_Score", "", sig)
    score_range <- range(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, sig], na.rm = TRUE)
    score_mean <- mean(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, sig], na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Range [%.3f, %.3f], Mean: %.3f\n", 
                cell_type, score_range[1], score_range[2], score_mean))
  }
  
} else {
  cat("No major cell type signatures found in metadata. Please run the signature analysis first.\n")
}

# Visualization of assignments (if UMAP available)
cat("\n=== Creating cell type assignment visualizations ===\n")

if("umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  
  library(patchwork)
  
  # Primary cell type plot
  p1 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Primary_Cell_Type", pt.size = 0.5) +
    ggtitle("Primary Cell Type\n(Highest Score)") +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  
  # Extended cell type plot (traditional grouped + hybrid separate)
  p2 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Extended_Cell_Type", pt.size = 0.5) +
    ggtitle("Extended Cell Type\n(Traditional + Hybrid)") +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  
  # Collapsed cell type plot  
  p3 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Collapsed_Cell_Type_New", pt.size = 0.5) +
    ggtitle("Collapsed Cell Type\n(All Grouped)") +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  
  # Confidence plot
  # Set the factor levels in the desired order
  merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Confidence <- factor(
    merged_seurat_hmm$Cell_Type_Confidence,
    levels = c("High", "Medium", "Low")
  )
  p4 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Cell_Type_Confidence", 
                pt.size = 0.5, cols = c("High" = "darkgreen", "Medium" = "orange", "Low" = "lightgray")) +
    ggtitle("Assignment Confidence") +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  
  # Confident cell type plot
  p5 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Confident_Cell_Type", pt.size = 0.5) +
    ggtitle("Confident Cell Type\n(High/Med Confidence Only)") +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  
  # Combine plots in a 2x3 layout
  combined_plot <- (p1 | p2 | p3) / (p4 | p5 | plot_spacer())
  print(combined_plot)
  
} else {
  cat("UMAP not found. Skipping visualizations.\n")
}

cat("\n=== Cell type annotation assignment completed! ===\n")
cat("New metadata columns created:\n")
cat("- Primary_Cell_Type: Cell type with highest signature score (includes CHC1/2/3, THC)\n")
cat("- Thresholded_Cell_Type: Cell type assignment with score threshold (includes hybrids)\n") 
cat("- Confident_Cell_Type: Cell type for high/medium confidence cells only (includes hybrids)\n")
cat("- Extended_Cell_Type: Traditional cell types grouped + hybrid modules separate\n")
cat("- Collapsed_Cell_Type_New: All cell types in simplified categories\n")
cat("- Cell_Type_Confidence: Confidence level of assignment\n")
cat("- Final_Cell_Type: Combined confident + low confidence flagged (includes hybrids)\n")

# Save the updated object
cat("\nSaving updated Seurat object with comprehensive cell type annotations...\n")
saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, "250725.seurat_with_comprehensive_cell_type_annotations.rds")

# CROSS-REFERENCE WITH COPYKAT
cat("\n=== CROSS-REFERENCE WITH COPYKAT ===\n")

if("copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Overall cross-tabulation
  cat("Overall CopyKAT vs Extended Cell Type:\n")
  overall_table <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type, 
                        merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred)
  print(overall_table)
  
  # Convert to proportions
  cat("\nProportions (by cell type):\n")
  prop_table <- prop.table(overall_table, margin = 1)
  print(round(prop_table, 3))
  
  # Focus on hybrid modules vs copyKAT
  cat("\n=== HYBRID MODULES vs COPYKAT ===\n")
  hybrid_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type %in% c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")
  
  if(sum(hybrid_cells) > 0) {
    hybrid_copykat_table <- table(
      Hybrid_Type = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type[hybrid_cells],
      CopyKAT = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[hybrid_cells]
    )
    print(hybrid_copykat_table)
    
    # Proportions
    cat("\nHybrid module proportions (by hybrid type):\n")
    hybrid_prop <- prop.table(hybrid_copykat_table, margin = 1)
    print(round(hybrid_prop, 3))
    
    # Summary statistics
    cat("\nHybrid module summary:\n")
    for(hybrid_type in c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")) {
      if(hybrid_type %in% rownames(hybrid_copykat_table)) {
        total <- sum(hybrid_copykat_table[hybrid_type, ])
        if("aneuploid" %in% colnames(hybrid_copykat_table)) {
          aneuploid <- hybrid_copykat_table[hybrid_type, "aneuploid"]
          pct_aneuploid <- round(aneuploid / total * 100, 1)
          cat(sprintf("%s: %d cells, %d aneuploid (%.1f%%)\n", 
                      hybrid_type, total, aneuploid, pct_aneuploid))
        }
      }
    }
  } else {
    cat("No cells assigned to hybrid modules.\n")
  }
  
} else {
  cat("CopyKAT predictions not found in metadata.\n")
}

cat("\nAnalysis complete! Use 'Extended_Cell_Type' for the best cell type annotations.\n")
```
#250725: Panel J: Basic CopyKat Visualization
```{r}
# Visualize Basic Anneuploidy Predictions in UMAP
PloidyPredic <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
        group.by = "copykat_pred", 
        pt.size = 1, 
        cols = c("diploid" = "blue", "aneuploid" = "red")) +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
        text = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("CRC Hybrid scRNA-seq 10x: Anneuploidy Prediction") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)

# Save plot
pdf("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelJ.PloidyPredict.pdf", width = 6, height = 5)
PloidyPredic
dev.off()

png("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelJ.PloidyPredict.png", width = 12, height = 5, units = "in", res = 300)
PloidyPredic
dev.off()
```
# CHC1 vs Myeloid
```{r}
# ========================================
# CHC1 vs MYELOID INVESTIGATION
# Determine if CHC1 is actually aneuploid myeloid cells
# ========================================

cat("=== INVESTIGATING CHC1 vs MYELOID RELATIONSHIP ===\n")

# 1. Compare CHC1 vs Myeloid assignments
cat("\n1. CHC1 vs Myeloid Assignment Overlap:\n")

chc1_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CHC1"
myeloid_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type == "Myeloid"

cat("Total CHC1 cells:", sum(chc1_cells), "\n")
cat("Total Myeloid cells:", sum(myeloid_cells), "\n")
cat("Overlap (CHC1 AND Myeloid):", sum(chc1_cells & myeloid_cells), "\n")

# Create contingency table
chc1_myeloid_table <- table(
  CHC1 = chc1_cells,
  Myeloid = myeloid_cells
)
print(chc1_myeloid_table)

# 2. Look at signature scores for these overlapping cells
cat("\n2. Signature Score Analysis:\n")

# For cells that are CHC1-positive, what are their myeloid scores?
if(sum(chc1_cells) > 0) {
  cat("For CHC1-positive cells:\n")
  
  # Get myeloid-related scores
  myeloid_sigs <- c("Monocytes_Score1", "Macrophages_General_Score1")
  available_myeloid_sigs <- myeloid_sigs[myeloid_sigs %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
  
  for(sig in available_myeloid_sigs) {
    chc1_myeloid_scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[chc1_cells, sig]
    cat(sprintf("  %s - Mean: %.3f, Range: [%.3f, %.3f]\n", 
                gsub("_Score1", "", sig), 
                mean(chc1_myeloid_scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                min(chc1_myeloid_scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chc1_myeloid_scores, na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
  
  # Compare CHC1 score in myeloid vs non-myeloid cells
  chc1_score_in_myeloid <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC1_Combo_Score[myeloid_cells]
  chc1_score_in_non_myeloid <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC1_Combo_Score[!myeloid_cells]
  
  cat(sprintf("\nCHC1_Combo_Score in Myeloid cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc1_score_in_myeloid, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("CHC1_Combo_Score in Non-Myeloid cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc1_score_in_non_myeloid, na.rm = TRUE)))
}

# 3. Alternative assignment: What if we exclude CHC1 from competition?
cat("\n3. Alternative Assignment (Excluding CHC1):\n")

# Re-do cell type assignment excluding CHC1
traditional_signatures_only <- c(
  "CD4_T_cells_Score1", "CD8_T_cells_Score1", "B_cells_Score1", "NK_cells_Score1",
  "Monocytes_Score1", "Macrophages_General_Score1", "CAF_General_Score1",
  "Epithelial_General_Score1", "CRC_Tumor_cells_Score1"
)

available_traditional <- traditional_signatures_only[traditional_signatures_only %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

if(length(available_traditional) > 0) {
  traditional_matrix <- as.matrix(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, available_traditional])
  colnames(traditional_matrix) <- gsub("_Score1", "", available_traditional)
  
  # Find highest traditional signature for each cell
  max_traditional_indices <- apply(traditional_matrix, 1, which.max)
  alternative_assignment <- colnames(traditional_matrix)[max_traditional_indices]
  
  # For CHC1-assigned cells, what would they be assigned to traditionally?
  cat("CHC1-assigned cells would be assigned to (without CHC1 competition):\n")
  if(sum(chc1_cells) > 0) {
    chc1_alternative <- table(alternative_assignment[chc1_cells])
    print(chc1_alternative)
    
    # What percentage would be myeloid?
    myeloid_alternatives <- c("Monocytes", "Macrophages_General")
    chc1_would_be_myeloid <- sum(chc1_alternative[names(chc1_alternative) %in% myeloid_alternatives])
    chc1_total <- sum(chc1_alternative)
    cat(sprintf("%.1f%% of CHC1 cells would be assigned as myeloid\n", 
                chc1_would_be_myeloid / chc1_total * 100))
  }
}

# 4. Cluster analysis
cat("\n4. Cluster Distribution Analysis:\n")

if("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Which clusters contain CHC1 cells?
  chc1_clusters <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters[chc1_cells])
  cat("CHC1 cells by cluster:\n")
  print(chc1_clusters)
  
  # Which clusters contain myeloid cells?
  myeloid_clusters <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters[myeloid_cells])
  cat("\nMyeloid cells by cluster:\n")
  print(myeloid_clusters)
  
  # Overlap in clusters
  chc1_cluster_names <- names(chc1_clusters)[chc1_clusters > 0]
  myeloid_cluster_names <- names(myeloid_clusters)[myeloid_clusters > 0]
  shared_clusters <- intersect(chc1_cluster_names, myeloid_cluster_names)
  
  cat("\nShared clusters (contain both CHC1 and Myeloid):", paste(shared_clusters, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  # For shared clusters, show the breakdown
  if(length(shared_clusters) > 0) {
    cat("\nBreakdown for shared clusters:\n")
    for(cluster in shared_clusters) {
      cluster_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters == cluster
      cluster_total <- sum(cluster_cells)
      cluster_chc1 <- sum(cluster_cells & chc1_cells)
      cluster_myeloid <- sum(cluster_cells & myeloid_cells)
      cluster_both <- sum(cluster_cells & chc1_cells & myeloid_cells)
      
      cat(sprintf("Cluster %s: %d total, %d CHC1, %d Myeloid, %d Both\n",
                  cluster, cluster_total, cluster_chc1, cluster_myeloid, cluster_both))
    }
  }
}

# 5. CopyKAT correlation
cat("\n5. CopyKAT Correlation Analysis:\n")

if("copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # CHC1 aneuploid percentage
  chc1_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[chc1_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
  chc1_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[chc1_cells]))
  chc1_aneuploid_pct <- chc1_aneuploid / chc1_total * 100
  
  # Myeloid aneuploid percentage  
  myeloid_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[myeloid_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
  myeloid_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[myeloid_cells]))
  myeloid_aneuploid_pct <- myeloid_aneuploid / myeloid_total * 100
  
  cat(sprintf("CHC1 aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", chc1_aneuploid, chc1_total, chc1_aneuploid_pct))
  cat(sprintf("Myeloid aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", myeloid_aneuploid, myeloid_total, myeloid_aneuploid_pct))
  
  # Cells that are both CHC1 and Myeloid
  both_cells <- chc1_cells & myeloid_cells
  if(sum(both_cells) > 0) {
    both_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    both_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_cells]))
    both_aneuploid_pct <- both_aneuploid / both_total * 100
    cat(sprintf("Both CHC1 AND Myeloid aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", both_aneuploid, both_total, both_aneuploid_pct))
  }
}

# 6. Gene overlap analysis (if gene lists are available)
cat("\n6. Gene Signature Overlap Analysis:\n")

# Check if we can access the original gene lists
chc1_genes_available <- exists("chc1_combo_up_genes") && exists("chc1_combo_down_genes")
myeloid_genes_available <- exists("pbmc_signatures") || exists("macrophage_signatures")

if(chc1_genes_available) {
  cat("CHC1 up genes:", length(chc1_combo_up_genes), "\n")
  cat("CHC1 down genes:", length(chc1_combo_down_genes), "\n")
  
  # Look for myeloid markers in CHC1 signature
  common_myeloid_markers <- c("CD68", "CD163", "LYZ", "S100A9", "S100A8", "FCN1", "VCAN", "CSF1R")
  chc1_up_myeloid_overlap <- intersect(chc1_combo_up_genes, common_myeloid_markers)
  chc1_down_myeloid_overlap <- intersect(chc1_combo_down_genes, common_myeloid_markers)
  
  if(length(chc1_up_myeloid_overlap) > 0) {
    cat("Myeloid markers in CHC1 UP genes:", paste(chc1_up_myeloid_overlap, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  if(length(chc1_down_myeloid_overlap) > 0) {
    cat("Myeloid markers in CHC1 DOWN genes:", paste(chc1_down_myeloid_overlap, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Gene lists not available in current environment\n")
}

# 7. Recommendations
cat("\n=== RECOMMENDATIONS ===\n")
cat("Based on this analysis:\n")

overlap_pct <- if(sum(chc1_cells) > 0) {
  sum(chc1_cells & myeloid_cells) / sum(chc1_cells) * 100
} else { 0 }

if(overlap_pct > 50) {
  cat("HIGH OVERLAP (>50%): CHC1 and Myeloid assignments overlap significantly\n")
  cat("- CHC1 might be capturing aneuploid myeloid cells\n")
  cat("- Consider CHC1 as an 'Aneuploid Myeloid' signature\n")
  cat("- Validate with known myeloid markers\n")
} else if(overlap_pct > 20) {
  cat("MODERATE OVERLAP (20-50%): Some relationship between CHC1 and Myeloid\n")
  cat("- CHC1 might represent a subset of aneuploid myeloid cells\n") 
  cat("- Check if they represent different activation states\n")
} else {
  cat("LOW OVERLAP (<20%): CHC1 and Myeloid appear to be distinct\n")
  cat("- CHC1 might be a true hybrid signature\n")
  cat("- Spatial clustering might be due to shared microenvironment\n")
}

cat("\nNext steps:\n")
cat("1. Examine CHC1 gene signature for myeloid markers\n")
cat("2. Look at pathway enrichment for CHC1 vs myeloid signatures\n") 
cat("3. Validate with additional myeloid markers\n")
cat("4. Consider tumor-associated macrophage (TAM) signatures\n")
```
# CHC3 vs. CD4TCells
```{r}
# ========================================
# CD4 T CELLS vs CHC3 INVESTIGATION
# Determine relationship between CD4 T cells and CHC3 signature
# ========================================

cat("=== INVESTIGATING CD4 T CELLS vs CHC3 RELATIONSHIP ===\n")

# 1. Compare CD4 T cells vs CHC3 assignments
cat("\n1. CD4 T Cells vs CHC3 Assignment Overlap:\n")

chc3_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CHC3"
cd4_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CD4_T_cells"
immune_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type == "Immune"

cat("Total CHC3 cells:", sum(chc3_cells), "\n")
cat("Total CD4 T cells:", sum(cd4_cells), "\n")
cat("Total Immune cells:", sum(immune_cells), "\n")
cat("Overlap (CHC3 AND CD4):", sum(chc3_cells & cd4_cells), "\n")
cat("Overlap (CHC3 AND Immune):", sum(chc3_cells & immune_cells), "\n")

# Create contingency table
chc3_cd4_table <- table(
  CHC3 = chc3_cells,
  CD4_T_cells = cd4_cells
)
print(chc3_cd4_table)

# CHC3 vs broader immune category
chc3_immune_table <- table(
  CHC3 = chc3_cells,
  Immune = immune_cells
)
cat("\nCHC3 vs Immune cells:\n")
print(chc3_immune_table)

# 2. Look at signature scores for these overlapping cells
cat("\n2. Signature Score Analysis:\n")

# For cells that are CHC3-positive, what are their CD4/immune scores?
if(sum(chc3_cells) > 0) {
  cat("For CHC3-positive cells:\n")
  
  # Get immune-related scores
  immune_sigs <- c("CD4_T_cells_Score1", "CD8_T_cells_Score1", "B_cells_Score1", "NK_cells_Score1")
  available_immune_sigs <- immune_sigs[immune_sigs %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
  
  for(sig in available_immune_sigs) {
    chc3_immune_scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[chc3_cells, sig]
    cat(sprintf("  %s - Mean: %.3f, Range: [%.3f, %.3f]\n", 
                gsub("_Score1", "", sig), 
                mean(chc3_immune_scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                min(chc3_immune_scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chc3_immune_scores, na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
  
  # Compare CHC3 score in immune vs non-immune cells
  chc3_score_in_immune <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC3_Combo_Score[immune_cells]
  chc3_score_in_non_immune <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC3_Combo_Score[!immune_cells]
  
  cat(sprintf("\nCHC3_Combo_Score in Immune cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc3_score_in_immune, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("CHC3_Combo_Score in Non-Immune cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc3_score_in_non_immune, na.rm = TRUE)))
  
  # Compare CHC3 score specifically in CD4 vs non-CD4 cells
  chc3_score_in_cd4 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC3_Combo_Score[cd4_cells]
  chc3_score_in_non_cd4 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC3_Combo_Score[!cd4_cells]
  
  cat(sprintf("CHC3_Combo_Score in CD4 T cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc3_score_in_cd4, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("CHC3_Combo_Score in Non-CD4 cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc3_score_in_non_cd4, na.rm = TRUE)))
}

# 3. Alternative assignment: What if we exclude CHC3 from competition?
cat("\n3. Alternative Assignment (Excluding CHC3):\n")

# Re-do cell type assignment excluding CHC3
traditional_signatures_only <- c(
  "CD4_T_cells_Score1", "CD8_T_cells_Score1", "B_cells_Score1", "NK_cells_Score1",
  "Monocytes_Score1", "Macrophages_General_Score1", "CAF_General_Score1",
  "Epithelial_General_Score1", "CRC_Tumor_cells_Score1"
)

available_traditional <- traditional_signatures_only[traditional_signatures_only %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

if(length(available_traditional) > 0) {
  traditional_matrix <- as.matrix(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, available_traditional])
  colnames(traditional_matrix) <- gsub("_Score1", "", available_traditional)
  
  # Find highest traditional signature for each cell
  max_traditional_indices <- apply(traditional_matrix, 1, which.max)
  alternative_assignment <- colnames(traditional_matrix)[max_traditional_indices]
  
  # For CHC3-assigned cells, what would they be assigned to traditionally?
  cat("CHC3-assigned cells would be assigned to (without CHC3 competition):\n")
  if(sum(chc3_cells) > 0) {
    chc3_alternative <- table(alternative_assignment[chc3_cells])
    print(chc3_alternative)
    
    # What percentage would be immune/CD4?
    immune_alternatives <- c("CD4_T_cells", "CD8_T_cells", "B_cells", "NK_cells")
    chc3_would_be_immune <- sum(chc3_alternative[names(chc3_alternative) %in% immune_alternatives])
    chc3_would_be_cd4 <- sum(chc3_alternative[names(chc3_alternative) == "CD4_T_cells"])
    chc3_total <- sum(chc3_alternative)
    
    if(chc3_total > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("%.1f%% of CHC3 cells would be assigned as immune\n", 
                  chc3_would_be_immune / chc3_total * 100))
      cat(sprintf("%.1f%% of CHC3 cells would be assigned as CD4 T cells\n", 
                  chc3_would_be_cd4 / chc3_total * 100))
    }
  }
}

# 4. Cluster analysis
cat("\n4. Cluster Distribution Analysis:\n")

if("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Which clusters contain CHC3 cells?
  if(sum(chc3_cells) > 0) {
    chc3_clusters <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters[chc3_cells])
    cat("CHC3 cells by cluster:\n")
    print(chc3_clusters)
  } else {
    cat("No CHC3 cells found\n")
  }
  
  # Which clusters contain CD4 T cells?
  if(sum(cd4_cells) > 0) {
    cd4_clusters <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters[cd4_cells])
    cat("\nCD4 T cells by cluster:\n")
    print(cd4_clusters)
  } else {
    cat("No CD4 T cells found\n")
  }
  
  # Which clusters contain immune cells?
  if(sum(immune_cells) > 0) {
    immune_clusters <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters[immune_cells])
    cat("\nImmune cells by cluster:\n")
    print(immune_clusters)
  }
  
  # Overlap in clusters
  if(sum(chc3_cells) > 0 && sum(cd4_cells) > 0) {
    chc3_cluster_names <- names(chc3_clusters)[chc3_clusters > 0]
    cd4_cluster_names <- names(cd4_clusters)[cd4_clusters > 0]
    shared_clusters <- intersect(chc3_cluster_names, cd4_cluster_names)
    
    cat("\nShared clusters (contain both CHC3 and CD4):", paste(shared_clusters, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    
    # For shared clusters, show the breakdown
    if(length(shared_clusters) > 0) {
      cat("\nBreakdown for shared clusters:\n")
      for(cluster in shared_clusters) {
        cluster_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters == cluster
        cluster_total <- sum(cluster_cells)
        cluster_chc3 <- sum(cluster_cells & chc3_cells)
        cluster_cd4 <- sum(cluster_cells & cd4_cells)
        cluster_both <- sum(cluster_cells & chc3_cells & cd4_cells)
        
        cat(sprintf("Cluster %s: %d total, %d CHC3, %d CD4, %d Both\n",
                    cluster, cluster_total, cluster_chc3, cluster_cd4, cluster_both))
      }
    }
  }
}

# 5. CopyKAT correlation
cat("\n5. CopyKAT Correlation Analysis:\n")

if("copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # CHC3 aneuploid percentage
  if(sum(chc3_cells) > 0) {
    chc3_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[chc3_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    chc3_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[chc3_cells]))
    chc3_aneuploid_pct <- if(chc3_total > 0) chc3_aneuploid / chc3_total * 100 else 0
    cat(sprintf("CHC3 aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", chc3_aneuploid, chc3_total, chc3_aneuploid_pct))
  } else {
    cat("No CHC3 cells found for copyKAT analysis\n")
  }
  
  # CD4 T cell aneuploid percentage  
  if(sum(cd4_cells) > 0) {
    cd4_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[cd4_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    cd4_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[cd4_cells]))
    cd4_aneuploid_pct <- if(cd4_total > 0) cd4_aneuploid / cd4_total * 100 else 0
    cat(sprintf("CD4 T cells aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", cd4_aneuploid, cd4_total, cd4_aneuploid_pct))
  } else {
    cat("No CD4 T cells found for copyKAT analysis\n")
  }
  
  # Immune cells aneuploid percentage
  if(sum(immune_cells) > 0) {
    immune_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[immune_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    immune_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[immune_cells]))
    immune_aneuploid_pct <- if(immune_total > 0) immune_aneuploid / immune_total * 100 else 0
    cat(sprintf("Immune cells aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", immune_aneuploid, immune_total, immune_aneuploid_pct))
  }
  
  # Cells that are both CHC3 and CD4
  both_cells <- chc3_cells & cd4_cells
  if(sum(both_cells) > 0) {
    both_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    both_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_cells]))
    both_aneuploid_pct <- if(both_total > 0) both_aneuploid / both_total * 100 else 0
    cat(sprintf("Both CHC3 AND CD4 aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", both_aneuploid, both_total, both_aneuploid_pct))
  } else {
    cat("No cells that are both CHC3 and CD4\n")
  }
}

# 6. Gene overlap analysis (if gene lists are available)
cat("\n6. Gene Signature Overlap Analysis:\n")

# Check if we can access the original gene lists
chc3_genes_available <- exists("chc3_combo_up_genes") && exists("chc3_combo_down_genes")

if(chc3_genes_available) {
  cat("CHC3 up genes:", length(chc3_combo_up_genes), "\n")
  cat("CHC3 down genes:", length(chc3_combo_down_genes), "\n")
  
  # Look for T cell markers in CHC3 signature
  common_tcell_markers <- c("CD3D", "CD3E", "CD4", "IL7R", "CCR7", "LEF1", "TCF7", "SELL", "CD28", "LCK")
  chc3_up_tcell_overlap <- intersect(chc3_combo_up_genes, common_tcell_markers)
  chc3_down_tcell_overlap <- intersect(chc3_combo_down_genes, common_tcell_markers)
  
  if(length(chc3_up_tcell_overlap) > 0) {
    cat("T cell markers in CHC3 UP genes:", paste(chc3_up_tcell_overlap, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  if(length(chc3_down_tcell_overlap) > 0) {
    cat("T cell markers in CHC3 DOWN genes:", paste(chc3_down_tcell_overlap, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  
  if(length(chc3_up_tcell_overlap) == 0 && length(chc3_down_tcell_overlap) == 0) {
    cat("No common T cell markers found in CHC3 signature\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("CHC3 gene lists not available in current environment\n")
}

# 7. T cell subtype analysis
cat("\n7. T Cell Subtype Analysis:\n")

if(sum(chc3_cells) > 0) {
  # Look at various T cell signature scores for CHC3 cells
  tcell_sigs <- c("CD4_T_cells_Score1", "CD8_T_cells_Score1", "Memory_T_cells_Score1", 
                  "Naive_T_cells_Score1", "Regulatory_T_cells_Score1")
  available_tcell_sigs <- tcell_sigs[tcell_sigs %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
  
  cat("T cell signature scores for CHC3-positive cells:\n")
  for(sig in available_tcell_sigs) {
    chc3_tcell_scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[chc3_cells, sig]
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean %.3f, Max %.3f\n", 
                gsub("_Score1", "", sig), 
                mean(chc3_tcell_scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chc3_tcell_scores, na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
}

# 8. Recommendations
cat("\n=== RECOMMENDATIONS FOR CHC3 vs CD4 T CELLS ===\n")
cat("Based on this analysis:\n")

if(sum(chc3_cells) == 0) {
  cat("NO CHC3 CELLS FOUND: CHC3 signature may not be active in this dataset\n")
  cat("- CHC3 might represent a rare cell state\n")
  cat("- Consider lowering thresholds for CHC3 detection\n")
  cat("- CHC3 might be condition-specific or context-dependent\n")
} else {
  overlap_pct <- if(sum(chc3_cells) > 0 && sum(cd4_cells) > 0) {
    sum(chc3_cells & cd4_cells) / sum(chc3_cells) * 100
  } else { 0 }
  
  if(overlap_pct > 50) {
    cat("HIGH OVERLAP (>50%): CHC3 and CD4 T cell assignments overlap significantly\n")
    cat("- CHC3 might be capturing activated/exhausted CD4 T cells\n")
    cat("- Consider CHC3 as a 'CD4 T cell activation' signature\n")
    cat("- Validate with T cell activation markers\n")
  } else if(overlap_pct > 20) {
    cat("MODERATE OVERLAP (20-50%): Some relationship between CHC3 and CD4 T cells\n")
    cat("- CHC3 might represent a subset of CD4 T cells\n") 
    cat("- Check if they represent different activation/differentiation states\n")
  } else {
    cat("LOW OVERLAP (<20%): CHC3 and CD4 T cells appear to be distinct\n")
```
