```{r}
    cat("- CHC3 might be a non-T cell signature\n")
    cat("- Or CHC3 might represent a rare T cell subset\n")
  }
}

cat("\nNext steps:\n")
cat("1. Examine CHC3 gene signature for T cell markers (CD3, CD4, etc.)\n")
cat("2. Look at T cell activation/exhaustion markers in CHC3 cells\n") 
cat("3. Compare CHC3 to known T cell subtype signatures\n")
cat("4. Consider tissue-resident or tumor-infiltrating T cell signatures\n")
cat("5. Investigate why CHC3 cells are all diploid (unlike CHC1)\n")
```
# CHC2 vs BCells
```{r}
# ========================================
# B CELLS vs CHC2 INVESTIGATION
# Determine relationship between B cells and CHC2 signature
# ========================================

cat("=== INVESTIGATING B CELLS vs CHC2 RELATIONSHIP ===\n")

# 1. Compare B cells vs CHC2 assignments
cat("\n1. B Cells vs CHC2 Assignment Overlap:\n")

chc2_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CHC2"
bcell_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "B_cells"
immune_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type == "Immune"

cat("Total CHC2 cells:", sum(chc2_cells), "\n")
cat("Total B cells:", sum(bcell_cells), "\n")
cat("Total Immune cells:", sum(immune_cells), "\n")
cat("Overlap (CHC2 AND B cells):", sum(chc2_cells & bcell_cells), "\n")
cat("Overlap (CHC2 AND Immune):", sum(chc2_cells & immune_cells), "\n")

# Create contingency table
chc2_bcell_table <- table(
  CHC2 = chc2_cells,
  B_cells = bcell_cells
)
print(chc2_bcell_table)

# CHC2 vs broader immune category
chc2_immune_table <- table(
  CHC2 = chc2_cells,
  Immune = immune_cells
)
cat("\nCHC2 vs Immune cells:\n")
print(chc2_immune_table)

# 2. Look at signature scores for these overlapping cells
cat("\n2. Signature Score Analysis:\n")

# For cells that are CHC2-positive, what are their B cell/immune scores?
if(sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
  cat("For CHC2-positive cells:\n")
  
  # Get immune-related scores, focusing on B cell signatures
  immune_sigs <- c("B_cells_Score1", "Naive_B_cells_Score1", "Memory_B_cells_Score1", 
                   "Plasma_cells_Score1", "CD4_T_cells_Score1", "CD8_T_cells_Score1", "NK_cells_Score1")
  available_immune_sigs <- immune_sigs[immune_sigs %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
  
  for(sig in available_immune_sigs) {
    chc2_immune_scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[chc2_cells, sig]
    cat(sprintf("  %s - Mean: %.3f, Range: [%.3f, %.3f]\n", 
                gsub("_Score1", "", sig), 
                mean(chc2_immune_scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                min(chc2_immune_scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chc2_immune_scores, na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
  
  # Compare CHC2 score in immune vs non-immune cells
  chc2_score_in_immune <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC2_Combo_Score[immune_cells]
  chc2_score_in_non_immune <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC2_Combo_Score[!immune_cells]
  
  cat(sprintf("\nCHC2_Combo_Score in Immune cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc2_score_in_immune, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("CHC2_Combo_Score in Non-Immune cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc2_score_in_non_immune, na.rm = TRUE)))
  
  # Compare CHC2 score specifically in B cells vs non-B cells
  chc2_score_in_bcells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC2_Combo_Score[bcell_cells]
  chc2_score_in_non_bcells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC2_Combo_Score[!bcell_cells]
  
  cat(sprintf("CHC2_Combo_Score in B cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc2_score_in_bcells, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("CHC2_Combo_Score in Non-B cells - Mean: %.3f\n", 
              mean(chc2_score_in_non_bcells, na.rm = TRUE)))
}

# 3. Alternative assignment: What if we exclude CHC2 from competition?
cat("\n3. Alternative Assignment (Excluding CHC2):\n")

# Re-do cell type assignment excluding CHC2
traditional_signatures_only <- c(
  "CD4_T_cells_Score1", "CD8_T_cells_Score1", "B_cells_Score1", "NK_cells_Score1",
  "Monocytes_Score1", "Macrophages_General_Score1", "CAF_General_Score1",
  "Epithelial_General_Score1", "CRC_Tumor_cells_Score1"
)

available_traditional <- traditional_signatures_only[traditional_signatures_only %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

if(length(available_traditional) > 0) {
  traditional_matrix <- as.matrix(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, available_traditional])
  colnames(traditional_matrix) <- gsub("_Score1", "", available_traditional)
  
  # Find highest traditional signature for each cell
  max_traditional_indices <- apply(traditional_matrix, 1, which.max)
  alternative_assignment <- colnames(traditional_matrix)[max_traditional_indices]
  
  # For CHC2-assigned cells, what would they be assigned to traditionally?
  cat("CHC2-assigned cells would be assigned to (without CHC2 competition):\n")
  if(sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
    chc2_alternative <- table(alternative_assignment[chc2_cells])
    print(chc2_alternative)
    
    # What percentage would be immune/B cells?
    immune_alternatives <- c("CD4_T_cells", "CD8_T_cells", "B_cells", "NK_cells")
    chc2_would_be_immune <- sum(chc2_alternative[names(chc2_alternative) %in% immune_alternatives])
    chc2_would_be_bcells <- sum(chc2_alternative[names(chc2_alternative) == "B_cells"])
    chc2_total <- sum(chc2_alternative)
    
    if(chc2_total > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("%.1f%% of CHC2 cells would be assigned as immune\n", 
                  chc2_would_be_immune / chc2_total * 100))
      cat(sprintf("%.1f%% of CHC2 cells would be assigned as B cells\n", 
                  chc2_would_be_bcells / chc2_total * 100))
    }
  }
}

# 4. Cluster analysis
cat("\n4. Cluster Distribution Analysis:\n")

if("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Which clusters contain CHC2 cells?
  if(sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
    chc2_clusters <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters[chc2_cells])
    cat("CHC2 cells by cluster:\n")
    print(chc2_clusters)
  } else {
    cat("No CHC2 cells found\n")
  }
  
  # Which clusters contain B cells?
  if(sum(bcell_cells) > 0) {
    bcell_clusters <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters[bcell_cells])
    cat("\nB cells by cluster:\n")
    print(bcell_clusters)
  } else {
    cat("No B cells found\n")
  }
  
  # Which clusters contain immune cells?
  if(sum(immune_cells) > 0) {
    immune_clusters <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters[immune_cells])
    cat("\nImmune cells by cluster:\n")
    print(immune_clusters)
  }
  
  # Overlap in clusters
  if(sum(chc2_cells) > 0 && sum(bcell_cells) > 0) {
    chc2_cluster_names <- names(chc2_clusters)[chc2_clusters > 0]
    bcell_cluster_names <- names(bcell_clusters)[bcell_clusters > 0]
    shared_clusters <- intersect(chc2_cluster_names, bcell_cluster_names)
    
    cat("\nShared clusters (contain both CHC2 and B cells):", paste(shared_clusters, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    
    # For shared clusters, show the breakdown
    if(length(shared_clusters) > 0) {
      cat("\nBreakdown for shared clusters:\n")
      for(cluster in shared_clusters) {
        cluster_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$seurat_clusters == cluster
        cluster_total <- sum(cluster_cells)
        cluster_chc2 <- sum(cluster_cells & chc2_cells)
        cluster_bcell <- sum(cluster_cells & bcell_cells)
        cluster_both <- sum(cluster_cells & chc2_cells & bcell_cells)
        
        cat(sprintf("Cluster %s: %d total, %d CHC2, %d B cells, %d Both\n",
                    cluster, cluster_total, cluster_chc2, cluster_bcell, cluster_both))
      }
    }
  }
}

# 5. CopyKAT correlation
cat("\n5. CopyKAT Correlation Analysis:\n")

if("copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # CHC2 aneuploid percentage
  if(sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
    chc2_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[chc2_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    chc2_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[chc2_cells]))
    chc2_aneuploid_pct <- if(chc2_total > 0) chc2_aneuploid / chc2_total * 100 else 0
    cat(sprintf("CHC2 aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", chc2_aneuploid, chc2_total, chc2_aneuploid_pct))
  } else {
    cat("No CHC2 cells found for copyKAT analysis\n")
  }
  
  # B cell aneuploid percentage  
  if(sum(bcell_cells) > 0) {
    bcell_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[bcell_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    bcell_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[bcell_cells]))
    bcell_aneuploid_pct <- if(bcell_total > 0) bcell_aneuploid / bcell_total * 100 else 0
    cat(sprintf("B cells aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", bcell_aneuploid, bcell_total, bcell_aneuploid_pct))
  } else {
    cat("No B cells found for copyKAT analysis\n")
  }
  
  # Immune cells aneuploid percentage
  if(sum(immune_cells) > 0) {
    immune_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[immune_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    immune_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[immune_cells]))
    immune_aneuploid_pct <- if(immune_total > 0) immune_aneuploid / immune_total * 100 else 0
    cat(sprintf("Immune cells aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", immune_aneuploid, immune_total, immune_aneuploid_pct))
  }
  
  # Cells that are both CHC2 and B cells
  both_cells <- chc2_cells & bcell_cells
  if(sum(both_cells) > 0) {
    both_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    both_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_cells]))
    both_aneuploid_pct <- if(both_total > 0) both_aneuploid / both_total * 100 else 0
    cat(sprintf("Both CHC2 AND B cells aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", both_aneuploid, both_total, both_aneuploid_pct))
  } else {
    cat("No cells that are both CHC2 and B cells\n")
  }
}

# 6. Gene overlap analysis (if gene lists are available)
cat("\n6. Gene Signature Overlap Analysis:\n")

# Check if we can access the original gene lists
chc2_genes_available <- exists("chc2_combo_up_genes") && exists("chc2_combo_down_genes")

if(chc2_genes_available) {
  cat("CHC2 up genes:", length(chc2_combo_up_genes), "\n")
  cat("CHC2 down genes:", length(chc2_combo_down_genes), "\n")
  
  # Look for B cell markers in CHC2 signature
  common_bcell_markers <- c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD19", "PAX5", "BLK", "FCRLA", "CD20", "CD22", "BANK1")
  chc2_up_bcell_overlap <- intersect(chc2_combo_up_genes, common_bcell_markers)
  chc2_down_bcell_overlap <- intersect(chc2_combo_down_genes, common_bcell_markers)
  
  if(length(chc2_up_bcell_overlap) > 0) {
    cat("B cell markers in CHC2 UP genes:", paste(chc2_up_bcell_overlap, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  if(length(chc2_down_bcell_overlap) > 0) {
    cat("B cell markers in CHC2 DOWN genes:", paste(chc2_down_bcell_overlap, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  
  if(length(chc2_up_bcell_overlap) == 0 && length(chc2_down_bcell_overlap) == 0) {
    cat("No common B cell markers found in CHC2 signature\n")
  }
  
  # Look for plasma cell markers
  plasma_markers <- c("IGKC", "IGLC2", "IGLC3", "XBP1", "IRF4", "PRDM1", "CD38", "CD138")
  chc2_up_plasma_overlap <- intersect(chc2_combo_up_genes, plasma_markers)
  chc2_down_plasma_overlap <- intersect(chc2_combo_down_genes, plasma_markers)
  
  if(length(chc2_up_plasma_overlap) > 0) {
    cat("Plasma cell markers in CHC2 UP genes:", paste(chc2_up_plasma_overlap, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  if(length(chc2_down_plasma_overlap) > 0) {
    cat("Plasma cell markers in CHC2 DOWN genes:", paste(chc2_down_plasma_overlap, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  
} else {
  cat("CHC2 gene lists not available in current environment\n")
}

# 7. B cell subtype analysis
cat("\n7. B Cell Subtype Analysis:\n")

if(sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
  # Look at various B cell signature scores for CHC2 cells
  bcell_sigs <- c("B_cells_Score1", "Naive_B_cells_Score1", "Memory_B_cells_Score1", "Plasma_cells_Score1")
  available_bcell_sigs <- bcell_sigs[bcell_sigs %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
  
  cat("B cell signature scores for CHC2-positive cells:\n")
  for(sig in available_bcell_sigs) {
    chc2_bcell_scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[chc2_cells, sig]
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean %.3f, Max %.3f\n", 
                gsub("_Score1", "", sig), 
                mean(chc2_bcell_scores, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chc2_bcell_scores, na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
  
  # Check if CHC2 cells are enriched for specific B cell subtypes
  cat("\nB cell subtype enrichment in CHC2 cells:\n")
  for(sig in available_bcell_sigs) {
    # Compare CHC2 vs non-CHC2 cells for this B cell signature
    chc2_scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[chc2_cells, sig]
    non_chc2_scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[!chc2_cells, sig]
    
    chc2_mean <- mean(chc2_scores, na.rm = TRUE)
    non_chc2_mean <- mean(non_chc2_scores, na.rm = TRUE)
    fold_change <- chc2_mean / non_chc2_mean
    
    cat(sprintf("  %s: CHC2 %.3f vs Non-CHC2 %.3f (FC: %.2f)\n", 
                gsub("_Score1", "", sig), chc2_mean, non_chc2_mean, fold_change))
  }
}

# 8. Immunoglobulin gene analysis (if available)
cat("\n8. Immunoglobulin Gene Analysis:\n")

# Check for immunoglobulin genes in the data
ig_genes <- c("IGHM", "IGHD", "IGHG1", "IGHG2", "IGHG3", "IGHG4", "IGHA1", "IGHA2", 
              "IGKC", "IGLC1", "IGLC2", "IGLC3", "IGLC6", "IGLC7")
available_ig_genes <- ig_genes[ig_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

if(length(available_ig_genes) > 0 && sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
  cat("Available immunoglobulin genes:", paste(available_ig_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  # Calculate average expression of Ig genes in CHC2 vs non-CHC2 cells
  ig_expression <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[available_ig_genes, , drop = FALSE]
  
  chc2_ig_mean <- rowMeans(ig_expression[, chc2_cells, drop = FALSE])
  non_chc2_ig_mean <- rowMeans(ig_expression[, !chc2_cells, drop = FALSE])
  
  cat("Immunoglobulin gene expression (CHC2 vs Non-CHC2):\n")
  for(i in 1:length(available_ig_genes)) {
    gene <- available_ig_genes[i]
    fold_change <- chc2_ig_mean[gene] / (non_chc2_ig_mean[gene] + 0.001)  # Add small value to avoid division by zero
    cat(sprintf("  %s: CHC2 %.3f vs Non-CHC2 %.3f (FC: %.2f)\n", 
                gene, chc2_ig_mean[gene], non_chc2_ig_mean[gene], fold_change))
  }
} else {
  cat("No immunoglobulin genes found or no CHC2 cells for analysis\n")
}

# 9. Recommendations
cat("\n=== RECOMMENDATIONS FOR CHC2 vs B CELLS ===\n")
cat("Based on this analysis:\n")

if(sum(chc2_cells) == 0) {
  cat("NO CHC2 CELLS FOUND: CHC2 signature may not be active in this dataset\n")
  cat("- CHC2 might represent a rare cell state\n")
  cat("- Consider lowering thresholds for CHC2 detection\n")
  cat("- CHC2 might be condition-specific or tissue-specific\n")
} else {
  overlap_pct <- if(sum(chc2_cells) > 0 && sum(bcell_cells) > 0) {
    sum(chc2_cells & bcell_cells) / sum(chc2_cells) * 100
  } else { 0 }
  
  if(overlap_pct > 50) {
    cat("HIGH OVERLAP (>50%): CHC2 and B cell assignments overlap significantly\n")
    cat("- CHC2 might be capturing activated/plasma B cells\n")
    cat("- Consider CHC2 as a 'B cell activation/differentiation' signature\n")
    cat("- Validate with plasma cell and activated B cell markers\n")
  } else if(overlap_pct > 20) {
    cat("MODERATE OVERLAP (20-50%): Some relationship between CHC2 and B cells\n")
    cat("- CHC2 might represent a subset of B cells\n") 
    cat("- Check if they represent memory B cells or plasma cells\n")
  } else {
    cat("LOW OVERLAP (<20%): CHC2 and B cells appear to be distinct\n")
    cat("- CHC2 might be a non-B cell signature\n")
    cat("- Or CHC2 might represent a rare B cell subset\n")
  }
  
  # Additional insights based on aneuploid status
  if("copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    chc2_aneuploid <- if(sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
      sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[chc2_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    } else { 0 }
    
    if(chc2_aneuploid == 0) {
      cat("\nCHC2 CELLS ARE DIPLOID: This is interesting given the low aneuploid rate\n")
      cat("- CHC2 might represent a stable hybrid state\n")
      cat("- CHC2 could be a transcriptional rather than chromosomal hybrid\n")
    } else {
      cat(sprintf("\nCHC2 ANEUPLOID RATE: %.1f%% - lower than expected for hybrid cells\n", 
                  chc2_aneuploid / sum(chc2_cells) * 100))
    }
  }
}

cat("\nNext steps:\n")
cat("1. Examine CHC2 gene signature for B cell markers (CD19, MS4A1, etc.)\n")
cat("2. Look at B cell activation/differentiation markers in CHC2 cells\n") 
cat("3. Compare CHC2 to plasma cell and memory B cell signatures\n")
cat("4. Check immunoglobulin gene expression patterns\n")
cat("5. Investigate germinal center B cell markers\n")
cat("6. Consider antibody-secreting cell (ASC) signatures\n")
cat("7. Explore why CHC2 has low aneuploid rate compared to CHC1\n")

# Working Hypothesis: CHC2 = Chromosomally Unstable B Cells? B-Cell/Tumor Hybrids?
# This suggests CHC2 might be capturing:
# Scenario A: Stressed/Activated B Cells
  # B cells under tumor microenvironment stress
  # Undergoing somatic hypermutation gone wrong
  # Germinal center B cells with chromosomal damage
  # Class-switch recombination errors leading to instability
# Scenario B: Tumor-Associated B Cells
  # B cells that have acquired chromosomal instability in the tumor environment
  # Similar to how macrophages (CHC1) become aneuploid
  # Regulatory B cells (Bregs) with genomic damage
```
# CHC2 Cell Follow Up
```{r}
# ========================================
# CHC2 B CELL FOLLOW-UP ANALYSIS
# Deep dive into CHC2 as chromosomally unstable B cells
# ========================================

cat("=== CHC2 AS CHROMOSOMALLY UNSTABLE B CELLS ===\n")

# Define cell populations
chc2_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CHC2"
bcell_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "B_cells"

# Create refined B cell categories
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$B_Cell_Refined <- "Non_B_Cell"
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$B_Cell_Refined[bcell_cells] <- "Diploid_B_Cells"
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$B_Cell_Refined[chc2_cells] <- "CHC2_B_Cells"

cat("Sample sizes:\n")
cat("CHC2 B cells:", sum(chc2_cells), "\n")
cat("Diploid B cells:", sum(bcell_cells), "\n")
cat("Non-B cells:", sum(!chc2_cells & !bcell_cells), "\n")

# 1. COMPARATIVE GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
cat("\n=== 1. COMPARATIVE GENE EXPRESSION ===\n")

# B cell identity markers
b_identity_markers <- c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD19", "PAX5", "CD22", "BANK1", "FCRLA", "BLK")
available_b_markers <- b_identity_markers[b_identity_markers %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

if(length(available_b_markers) > 0 && sum(chc2_cells) > 0 && sum(bcell_cells) > 0) {
  cat("B cell identity marker expression:\n")
  
  # Get expression data
  b_expression <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[available_b_markers, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # Calculate means for each group
  chc2_b_mean <- rowMeans(b_expression[, chc2_cells, drop = FALSE])
  diploid_b_mean <- rowMeans(b_expression[, bcell_cells, drop = FALSE])
  non_b_mean <- rowMeans(b_expression[, !chc2_cells & !bcell_cells, drop = FALSE])
  
  for(marker in available_b_markers) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: CHC2-B %.3f, Diploid-B %.3f, Non-B %.3f\n", 
                marker, chc2_b_mean[marker], diploid_b_mean[marker], non_b_mean[marker]))
  }
}

# 2. STRESS AND DNA DAMAGE MARKERS
cat("\n=== 2. STRESS AND DNA DAMAGE MARKERS ===\n")

# DNA damage/stress markers
stress_markers <- c("TP53", "ATM", "BRCA1", "BRCA2", "CHEK1", "CHEK2", "H2AFX", "PARP1", 
                   "RAD51", "MDM2", "CDKN1A", "GADD45A", "XPC", "ERCC1")
available_stress <- stress_markers[stress_markers %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

if(length(available_stress) > 0 && sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
  cat("DNA damage/stress marker expression:\n")
  
  stress_expression <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[available_stress, , drop = FALSE]
  chc2_stress_mean <- rowMeans(stress_expression[, chc2_cells, drop = FALSE])
  diploid_b_stress_mean <- rowMeans(stress_expression[, bcell_cells, drop = FALSE])
  
  for(marker in available_stress) {
    fold_change <- chc2_stress_mean[marker] / (diploid_b_stress_mean[marker] + 0.001)
    cat(sprintf("  %s: CHC2-B %.3f vs Diploid-B %.3f (FC: %.2f)\n", 
                marker, chc2_stress_mean[marker], diploid_b_stress_mean[marker], fold_change))
  }
}

# 3. B CELL ACTIVATION AND GERMINAL CENTER MARKERS
cat("\n=== 3. B CELL ACTIVATION/GERMINAL CENTER MARKERS ===\n")

# Activation markers
activation_markers <- c("CD69", "CD25", "CD80", "CD86", "ICOS", "ICOSL", "CD40", "CD40LG")
# Germinal center markers  
gc_markers <- c("BCL6", "AICDA", "MYC", "PCNA", "MKI67", "CXCR4", "CXCR5", "CD38", "IRF4")
# Class switching markers
class_switch_markers <- c("AICDA", "UNG", "APEX1", "LIG4", "XRCC4", "NHEJ1")

all_b_function_markers <- c(activation_markers, gc_markers, class_switch_markers)
available_b_function <- unique(all_b_function_markers[all_b_function_markers %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)])

if(length(available_b_function) > 0 && sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
  cat("B cell functional marker expression:\n")
  
  function_expression <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[available_b_function, , drop = FALSE]
  chc2_func_mean <- rowMeans(function_expression[, chc2_cells, drop = FALSE])
  diploid_b_func_mean <- rowMeans(function_expression[, bcell_cells, drop = FALSE])
  
  for(marker in available_b_function) {
    fold_change <- chc2_func_mean[marker] / (diploid_b_func_mean[marker] + 0.001)
    marker_type <- if(marker %in% activation_markers) "Activation" else 
                   if(marker %in% gc_markers) "GC" else "ClassSwitch"
    cat(sprintf("  %s (%s): CHC2-B %.3f vs Diploid-B %.3f (FC: %.2f)\n", 
                marker, marker_type, chc2_func_mean[marker], diploid_b_func_mean[marker], fold_change))
  }
}

# 4. IMMUNOGLOBULIN EXPRESSION PATTERNS
cat("\n=== 4. IMMUNOGLOBULIN EXPRESSION ===\n")

# Heavy chain genes
heavy_chains <- c("IGHM", "IGHD", "IGHG1", "IGHG2", "IGHG3", "IGHG4", "IGHA1", "IGHA2", "IGHE")
# Light chain genes
light_chains <- c("IGKC", "IGLC1", "IGLC2", "IGLC3", "IGLC6", "IGLC7")

all_ig_genes <- c(heavy_chains, light_chains)
available_ig <- all_ig_genes[all_ig_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

if(length(available_ig) > 0 && sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
  cat("Immunoglobulin gene expression:\n")
  
  ig_expression <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[available_ig, , drop = FALSE]
  chc2_ig_mean <- rowMeans(ig_expression[, chc2_cells, drop = FALSE])
  diploid_b_ig_mean <- rowMeans(ig_expression[, bcell_cells, drop = FALSE])
  
  # Calculate total Ig expression
  chc2_total_ig <- sum(chc2_ig_mean)
  diploid_b_total_ig <- sum(diploid_b_ig_mean)
  
  cat(sprintf("Total Ig expression: CHC2-B %.3f vs Diploid-B %.3f\n", chc2_total_ig, diploid_b_total_ig))
  
  # Heavy vs light chain ratio
  chc2_heavy <- sum(chc2_ig_mean[available_ig %in% heavy_chains])
  chc2_light <- sum(chc2_ig_mean[available_ig %in% light_chains])
  diploid_b_heavy <- sum(diploid_b_ig_mean[available_ig %in% heavy_chains])
  diploid_b_light <- sum(diploid_b_ig_mean[available_ig %in% light_chains])
  
  chc2_hl_ratio <- chc2_heavy / (chc2_light + 0.001)
  diploid_b_hl_ratio <- diploid_b_heavy / (diploid_b_light + 0.001)
  
  cat(sprintf("Heavy/Light ratio: CHC2-B %.3f vs Diploid-B %.3f\n", chc2_hl_ratio, diploid_b_hl_ratio))
  
  # Individual Ig genes
  for(ig_gene in available_ig) {
    fold_change <- chc2_ig_mean[ig_gene] / (diploid_b_ig_mean[ig_gene] + 0.001)
    ig_type <- if(ig_gene %in% heavy_chains) "Heavy" else "Light"
    cat(sprintf("  %s (%s): CHC2-B %.3f vs Diploid-B %.3f (FC: %.2f)\n", 
                ig_gene, ig_type, chc2_ig_mean[ig_gene], diploid_b_ig_mean[ig_gene], fold_change))
  }
}

# 5. CELL CYCLE AND PROLIFERATION
cat("\n=== 5. CELL CYCLE AND PROLIFERATION ===\n")

# Cell cycle markers
cycle_markers <- c("MKI67", "PCNA", "TOP2A", "MCM2", "MCM6", "CCNA2", "CCNB1", "CCND1", "CCNE1", "CDK1", "CDK2")
available_cycle <- cycle_markers[cycle_markers %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

if(length(available_cycle) > 0 && sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
  cat("Cell cycle marker expression:\n")
  
  cycle_expression <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[available_cycle, , drop = FALSE]
  chc2_cycle_mean <- rowMeans(cycle_expression[, chc2_cells, drop = FALSE])
  diploid_b_cycle_mean <- rowMeans(cycle_expression[, bcell_cells, drop = FALSE])
  
  # Overall proliferation score
  chc2_prolif_score <- sum(chc2_cycle_mean)
  diploid_b_prolif_score <- sum(diploid_b_cycle_mean)
  
  cat(sprintf("Overall proliferation: CHC2-B %.3f vs Diploid-B %.3f\n", 
              chc2_prolif_score, diploid_b_prolif_score))
  
  for(marker in available_cycle) {
    fold_change <- chc2_cycle_mean[marker] / (diploid_b_cycle_mean[marker] + 0.001)
    cat(sprintf("  %s: CHC2-B %.3f vs Diploid-B %.3f (FC: %.2f)\n", 
                marker, chc2_cycle_mean[marker], diploid_b_cycle_mean[marker], fold_change))
  }
}

# 6. COPY NUMBER BURDEN ANALYSIS
cat("\n=== 6. COPY NUMBER ANALYSIS ===\n")

if("copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Create detailed aneuploid breakdown
  chc2_copykat <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[chc2_cells])
  bcell_copykat <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[bcell_cells])
  
  cat("CopyKAT predictions:\n")
  cat("CHC2 B cells:\n")
  print(chc2_copykat)
  cat("Diploid B cells:\n") 
  print(bcell_copykat)
  
  # Statistical test if sample sizes are adequate
  if(sum(chc2_cells) >= 10 && sum(bcell_cells) >= 10) {
    # Chi-square test for association
    contingency_table <- rbind(chc2_copykat, bcell_copykat)
    if(all(dim(contingency_table) > 1) && all(contingency_table >= 5)) {
      fisher_test <- fisher.test(contingency_table)
      cat(sprintf("Fisher's exact test p-value: %.6f\n", fisher_test$p.value))
      cat(sprintf("Odds ratio: %.3f (95%% CI: %.3f-%.3f)\n", 
                  fisher_test$estimate, fisher_test$conf.int[1], fisher_test$conf.int[2]))
    }
  }
}

# 7. PATHWAY ENRICHMENT HINTS
cat("\n=== 7. PATHWAY ANALYSIS HINTS ===\n")

# Apoptosis markers
apoptosis_markers <- c("BCL2", "BAX", "BAK1", "BID", "BIM", "PUMA", "NOXA", "APAF1", "CASP3", "CASP9")
# NF-kB pathway
nfkb_markers <- c("NFKB1", "NFKB2", "REL", "RELA", "RELB", "IKBKA", "IKBKB", "CHUK")

pathway_markers <- c(apoptosis_markers, nfkb_markers)
available_pathway <- pathway_markers[pathway_markers %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

if(length(available_pathway) > 0 && sum(chc2_cells) > 0) {
  cat("Pathway marker expression:\n")
  
  pathway_expression <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[available_pathway, , drop = FALSE]
  chc2_pathway_mean <- rowMeans(pathway_expression[, chc2_cells, drop = FALSE])
  diploid_b_pathway_mean <- rowMeans(pathway_expression[, bcell_cells, drop = FALSE])
  
  for(marker in available_pathway) {
    fold_change <- chc2_pathway_mean[marker] / (diploid_b_pathway_mean[marker] + 0.001)
    pathway_type <- if(marker %in% apoptosis_markers) "Apoptosis" else "NF-kB"
    cat(sprintf("  %s (%s): CHC2-B %.3f vs Diploid-B %.3f (FC: %.2f)\n", 
                marker, pathway_type, chc2_pathway_mean[marker], diploid_b_pathway_mean[marker], fold_change))
  }
}

# 8. SUMMARY AND CONCLUSIONS
cat("\n=== SUMMARY AND CONCLUSIONS ===\n")

cat("CHC2 B Cell Characterization:\n")
cat("1. Express core B cell identity markers ✓\n")
cat("2. Would be assigned as B cells without CHC2 competition (90.6%) ✓\n")
cat("3. Co-localize with B cells in clusters ✓\n")
cat("4. BUT have 25x higher aneuploid rate (4.9% vs 0.2%) ⚠️\n")

cat("\nWorking Model:\n")
cat("CHC2 = Chromosomally Unstable B Cells\n")
cat("- Retain B cell identity but acquire genomic instability\n")
cat("- May represent:\n")
cat("  * Germinal center B cells with DNA damage\n")
cat("  * Tumor-environment stressed B cells\n")
cat("  * Pre-malignant B cell transformation\n")
cat("  * Class-switch recombination errors\n")

cat("\nNext Steps:\n")
cat("1. Validate DNA damage markers in CHC2 cells\n")
cat("2. Check germinal center/activation signatures\n")
cat("3. Look for chromosomal translocation signatures\n")
cat("4. Compare to known B cell lymphoma signatures\n")
cat("5. Examine somatic hypermutation patterns if available\n")
```
#Multi-Label Classification approach
```{r}
# ========================================
# ROBUST MULTI-LABEL CELL TYPE ANNOTATION
# Addresses scale differences and false competition issues
# ========================================

cat("=== ROBUST CELL TYPE ANNOTATION ANALYSIS ===\n")

# 1. NORMALIZE SIGNATURE SCORES
cat("\n1. Normalizing signature scores...\n")

# Define signature categories separately
traditional_signatures <- c(
  "CD4_T_cells_Score1", "CD8_T_cells_Score1", "B_cells_Score1", "NK_cells_Score1",
  "Monocytes_Score1", "Macrophages_General_Score1", "CAF_General_Score1",
  "Epithelial_General_Score1", "CRC_Tumor_cells_Score1"
)

hybrid_signatures <- c(
  "CHC1_Combo_Score", "CHC2_Combo_Score", "CHC3_Combo_Score", "THC_Combo_Score"
)

# Check availability
available_traditional <- traditional_signatures[traditional_signatures %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
available_hybrid <- hybrid_signatures[hybrid_signatures %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

cat("Available traditional signatures:", length(available_traditional), "\n")
cat("Available hybrid signatures:", length(available_hybrid), "\n")

# Method 1: Z-score normalization within each category
if(length(available_traditional) > 0) {
  cat("\nNormalizing traditional signatures to z-scores...\n")
  
  # Z-score normalize traditional signatures
  for(sig in available_traditional) {
    scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, sig]
    z_scores <- scale(scores)[,1]  # Convert to vector
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(sig, "_zscore")] <- z_scores
    
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean %.3f -> %.3f, SD %.3f -> %.3f\n", 
                gsub("_Score1", "", sig),
                mean(scores), mean(z_scores), sd(scores), sd(z_scores)))
  }
}

if(length(available_hybrid) > 0) {
  cat("\nNormalizing hybrid signatures to z-scores...\n")
  
  # Z-score normalize hybrid signatures  
  for(sig in available_hybrid) {
    scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, sig]
    z_scores <- scale(scores)[,1]  # Convert to vector
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(sig, "_zscore")] <- z_scores
    
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean %.3f -> %.3f, SD %.3f -> %.3f\n", 
                gsub("_Combo_Score", "", sig),
                mean(scores), mean(z_scores), sd(scores), sd(z_scores)))
  }
}

# 2. THRESHOLD-BASED MULTI-LABEL ASSIGNMENT
cat("\n=== 2. THRESHOLD-BASED MULTI-LABEL ASSIGNMENT ===\n")

# Define thresholds for positive assignment
traditional_threshold <- 1.5  # 1.5 standard deviations above mean
hybrid_threshold <- 1.0      # 1.0 standard deviations above mean (more lenient)

cat("Using thresholds:\n")
cat("Traditional signatures: z-score >", traditional_threshold, "\n")
cat("Hybrid signatures: z-score >", hybrid_threshold, "\n")

# Assign traditional cell types
traditional_assignments <- data.frame(row.names = rownames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))

for(sig in available_traditional) {
  zscore_col <- paste0(sig, "_zscore")
  cell_type <- gsub("_Score1", "", sig)
  positive_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, zscore_col] > traditional_threshold
  traditional_assignments[, cell_type] <- positive_cells
  
  cat(sprintf("%s: %d cells (%.1f%%)\n", 
              cell_type, sum(positive_cells), sum(positive_cells)/nrow(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)*100))
}

# Assign hybrid types
hybrid_assignments <- data.frame(row.names = rownames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))

for(sig in available_hybrid) {
  zscore_col <- paste0(sig, "_zscore")
  cell_type <- gsub("_Combo_Score", "", sig)
  positive_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, zscore_col] > hybrid_threshold
  hybrid_assignments[, cell_type] <- positive_cells
  
  cat(sprintf("%s: %d cells (%.1f%%)\n", 
              cell_type, sum(positive_cells), sum(positive_cells)/nrow(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)*100))
}

# 3. CREATE TRADITIONAL CELL TYPE ASSIGNMENT (NON-COMPETITIVE)
cat("\n=== 3. TRADITIONAL CELL TYPE ASSIGNMENT ===\n")

# Primary traditional assignment (highest z-score above threshold)
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type <- "Unassigned"

if(ncol(traditional_assignments) > 0) {
  # Get z-scores for traditional signatures
  traditional_zscores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(available_traditional, "_zscore")]
  colnames(traditional_zscores) <- gsub("_Score1", "", available_traditional)
  
  # For each cell, find the highest z-score above threshold
  for(i in 1:nrow(traditional_zscores)) {
    cell_scores <- traditional_zscores[i, ]
    max_score <- max(cell_scores)
    
    if(max_score > traditional_threshold) {
      max_sig <- names(which.max(cell_scores))
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type[i] <- max_sig
    }
  }
  
  traditional_counts <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type)
  cat("Traditional cell type assignments:\n")
  print(traditional_counts)
}

# 4. CREATE HYBRID ASSIGNMENTS (INDEPENDENT)
cat("\n=== 4. HYBRID ASSIGNMENTS ===\n")

# Each hybrid can be positive independently
for(sig in available_hybrid) {
  zscore_col <- paste0(sig, "_zscore")
  cell_type <- gsub("_Combo_Score", "", sig)
  
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(cell_type, "_Positive_Robust")] <- 
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, zscore_col] > hybrid_threshold
}

# 5. DUAL ASSIGNMENTS (TRADITIONAL + HYBRID)
cat("\n=== 5. DUAL ASSIGNMENTS ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Create combinations of traditional + hybrid
combination_summary <- data.frame(
  Traditional = character(),
  Hybrid = character(),
  Count = numeric(),
  Percent = numeric(),
  Aneuploid_Count = numeric(),
  Aneuploid_Percent = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

if("copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  for(trad_type in unique(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type)) {
    if(trad_type == "Unassigned") next
    
    trad_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == trad_type
    
    for(sig in available_hybrid) {
      hybrid_type <- gsub("_Combo_Score", "", sig)
      hybrid_col <- paste0(hybrid_type, "_Positive_Robust")
      
      if(hybrid_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        hybrid_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, hybrid_col]
        
        # Find overlap
        both_cells <- trad_cells & hybrid_cells
        n_both <- sum(both_cells)
        
        if(n_both > 0) {
          # Calculate aneuploid percentage
          both_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
          both_total_copykat <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_cells]))
          aneuploid_pct <- if(both_total_copykat > 0) both_aneuploid / both_total_copykat * 100 else 0
          
          combination_summary <- rbind(combination_summary, data.frame(
            Traditional = trad_type,
            Hybrid = hybrid_type,
            Count = n_both,
            Percent = round(n_both / nrow(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) * 100, 2),
            Aneuploid_Count = both_aneuploid,
            Aneuploid_Percent = round(aneuploid_pct, 1),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          ))
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Sort by count
  combination_summary <- combination_summary[order(-combination_summary$Count), ]
  
  cat("Traditional + Hybrid combinations:\n")
  print(combination_summary)
}

# 6. COMPARE WITH ORIGINAL ASSIGNMENTS
cat("\n=== 6. COMPARISON WITH ORIGINAL ASSIGNMENTS ===\n")

if("Primary_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  cat("Comparison of assignment methods:\n")
  
  # Traditional assignments comparison
  if("Traditional_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    
    # 6A. B CELLS + CHC2 ANALYSIS
    cat("\n--- B CELLS + CHC2 ANALYSIS ---\n")
    
    # Focus on B cells
    original_b <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "B_cells"
    robust_b <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "B_cells"
    
    cat(sprintf("B cells - Original: %d, Robust: %d, Overlap: %d\n",
                sum(original_b), sum(robust_b), sum(original_b & robust_b)))
    
    # CHC2 comparison
    original_chc2 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CHC2"
    robust_chc2 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC2_Positive_Robust
    
    if("CHC2_Positive_Robust" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
      cat(sprintf("CHC2 - Original: %d, Robust: %d, Overlap: %d\n",
                  sum(original_chc2), sum(robust_chc2), sum(original_chc2 & robust_chc2)))
      
      # Key question: B cells + CHC2
      b_and_chc2_robust <- robust_b & robust_chc2
      cat(sprintf("B cells + CHC2 (robust method): %d cells\n", sum(b_and_chc2_robust)))
      
      if(sum(b_and_chc2_robust) > 0 && "copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        b_chc2_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[b_and_chc2_robust] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
        b_chc2_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[b_and_chc2_robust]))
        b_chc2_aneuploid_pct <- if(b_chc2_total > 0) b_chc2_aneuploid / b_chc2_total * 100 else 0
        cat(sprintf("B cells + CHC2 aneuploid rate: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n", 
                    b_chc2_aneuploid_pct, b_chc2_aneuploid, b_chc2_total))
      }
    }
    
    # 6B. MYELOID CELLS + CHC1 ANALYSIS
    cat("\n--- MYELOID CELLS + CHC1 ANALYSIS ---\n")
    
    # Focus on myeloid cells (both monocytes and macrophages)
    original_mono <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "Monocytes"
    original_macro <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "Macrophages_General"
    original_myeloid <- original_mono | original_macro
    
    robust_mono <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "Monocytes"
    robust_macro <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "Macrophages_General"
    robust_myeloid <- robust_mono | robust_macro
    
    cat(sprintf("Monocytes - Original: %d, Robust: %d, Overlap: %d\n",
                sum(original_mono), sum(robust_mono), sum(original_mono & robust_mono)))
    cat(sprintf("Macrophages - Original: %d, Robust: %d, Overlap: %d\n",
                sum(original_macro), sum(robust_macro), sum(original_macro & robust_macro)))
    cat(sprintf("Total Myeloid - Original: %d, Robust: %d, Overlap: %d\n",
                sum(original_myeloid), sum(robust_myeloid), sum(original_myeloid & robust_myeloid)))
    
    # CHC1 comparison
    original_chc1 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CHC1"
    robust_chc1 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC1_Positive_Robust
    
    if("CHC1_Positive_Robust" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
      cat(sprintf("CHC1 - Original: %d, Robust: %d, Overlap: %d\n",
                  sum(original_chc1), sum(robust_chc1), sum(original_chc1 & robust_chc1)))
      
      # Key question: Myeloid cells + CHC1
      myeloid_and_chc1_robust <- robust_myeloid & robust_chc1
      cat(sprintf("Myeloid + CHC1 (robust method): %d cells\n", sum(myeloid_and_chc1_robust)))
      
      if(sum(myeloid_and_chc1_robust) > 0 && "copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        myeloid_chc1_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[myeloid_and_chc1_robust] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
        myeloid_chc1_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[myeloid_and_chc1_robust]))
        myeloid_chc1_aneuploid_pct <- if(myeloid_chc1_total > 0) myeloid_chc1_aneuploid / myeloid_chc1_total * 100 else 0
        cat(sprintf("Myeloid + CHC1 aneuploid rate: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n", 
                    myeloid_chc1_aneuploid_pct, myeloid_chc1_aneuploid, myeloid_chc1_total))
      }
      
      # Breakdown by myeloid subtype
      mono_and_chc1 <- robust_mono & robust_chc1
      macro_and_chc1 <- robust_macro & robust_chc1
      
      cat(sprintf("Monocytes + CHC1: %d cells\n", sum(mono_and_chc1)))
      cat(sprintf("Macrophages + CHC1: %d cells\n", sum(macro_and_chc1)))
      
      if(sum(mono_and_chc1) > 0 && "copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        mono_chc1_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[mono_and_chc1] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
        mono_chc1_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[mono_and_chc1]))
        if(mono_chc1_total > 0) {
          cat(sprintf("Monocytes + CHC1 aneuploid rate: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n", 
                      mono_chc1_aneuploid / mono_chc1_total * 100, mono_chc1_aneuploid, mono_chc1_total))
        }
      }
      
      if(sum(macro_and_chc1) > 0 && "copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        macro_chc1_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[macro_and_chc1] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
        macro_chc1_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[macro_and_chc1]))
        if(macro_chc1_total > 0) {
          cat(sprintf("Macrophages + CHC1 aneuploid rate: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n", 
                      macro_chc1_aneuploid / macro_chc1_total * 100, macro_chc1_aneuploid, macro_chc1_total))
        }
      }
    }
    
    # 6C. CD4 T CELLS + CHC3 ANALYSIS
    cat("\n--- CD4 T CELLS + CHC3 ANALYSIS ---\n")
    
    # Focus on CD4 T cells
    original_cd4 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CD4_T_cells"
    robust_cd4 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "CD4_T_cells"
    
    cat(sprintf("CD4 T cells - Original: %d, Robust: %d, Overlap: %d\n",
                sum(original_cd4), sum(robust_cd4), sum(original_cd4 & robust_cd4)))
    
    # CHC3 comparison
    original_chc3 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Primary_Cell_Type == "CHC3"
    robust_chc3 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC3_Positive_Robust
    
    if("CHC3_Positive_Robust" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
      cat(sprintf("CHC3 - Original: %d, Robust: %d, Overlap: %d\n",
                  sum(original_chc3), sum(robust_chc3), sum(original_chc3 & robust_chc3)))
      
      # Key question: CD4 T cells + CHC3
      cd4_and_chc3_robust <- robust_cd4 & robust_chc3
      cat(sprintf("CD4 T cells + CHC3 (robust method): %d cells\n", sum(cd4_and_chc3_robust)))
      
      if(sum(cd4_and_chc3_robust) > 0 && "copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        cd4_chc3_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[cd4_and_chc3_robust] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
        cd4_chc3_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[cd4_and_chc3_robust]))
        cd4_chc3_aneuploid_pct <- if(cd4_chc3_total > 0) cd4_chc3_aneuploid / cd4_chc3_total * 100 else 0
        cat(sprintf("CD4 T cells + CHC3 aneuploid rate: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n", 
                    cd4_chc3_aneuploid_pct, cd4_chc3_aneuploid, cd4_chc3_total))
      }
      
      # Also check all T cells + CHC3
      robust_cd8 <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "CD8_T_cells"
      robust_tcells <- robust_cd4 | robust_cd8
      
      tcells_and_chc3 <- robust_tcells & robust_chc3
      cat(sprintf("All T cells + CHC3: %d cells\n", sum(tcells_and_chc3)))
      
      if(sum(tcells_and_chc3) > 0 && "copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        tcells_chc3_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[tcells_and_chc3] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
        tcells_chc3_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[tcells_and_chc3]))
        if(tcells_chc3_total > 0) {
          cat(sprintf("All T cells + CHC3 aneuploid rate: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n", 
                      tcells_chc3_aneuploid / tcells_chc3_total * 100, tcells_chc3_aneuploid, tcells_chc3_total))
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

# 7. CREATE FINAL REFINED CLASSIFICATIONS
cat("\n=== 7. FINAL REFINED CLASSIFICATIONS ===\n")

# Create a refined classification system
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type

# Add hybrid annotations
for(sig in available_hybrid) {
  hybrid_type <- gsub("_Combo_Score", "", sig)
  hybrid_col <- paste0(hybrid_type, "_Positive_Robust")
  
  if(hybrid_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    hybrid_positive <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, hybrid_col]
    
    # For cells positive for this hybrid, add annotation
    current_class <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification[hybrid_positive] <- 
      ifelse(current_class[hybrid_positive] == "Unassigned", 
             hybrid_type,
             paste0(current_class[hybrid_positive], "+", hybrid_type))
  }
}

refined_counts <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification)
cat("Refined classification counts:\n")
print(refined_counts)

cat("\n=== ASSESSMENT OF ORIGINAL METHOD ===\n")
cat("Potential issues with winner-takes-all approach:\n")
cat("1. Scale differences between signature types ⚠️\n")
cat("2. Forced mutual exclusivity when cells could be both ⚠️\n")
cat("3. No normalization across signature categories ⚠️\n")
cat("4. Larger gene sets might dominate smaller ones ⚠️\n")

cat("\nRobust method improvements:\n")
cat("1. Z-score normalization within categories ✓\n")
cat("2. Threshold-based assignment (not competitive) ✓\n")
cat("3. Allows multiple labels per cell ✓\n")
cat("4. Separate analysis of traditional vs hybrid signatures ✓\n")

cat("\nRecommendation: Use the robust method for final analysis!\n")

# 8. UMAP VISUALIZATION OF REFINED CLASSIFICATIONS
cat("\n=== 8. UMAP VISUALIZATION OF REFINED CLASSIFICATIONS ===\n")

if("umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  
  library(patchwork)
  
  cat("Creating UMAP visualizations by cell type category...\n")
  
  # Function to create highlights for specific cell types
  create_highlight_plot <- function(cell_types, plot_title, base_color = "lightgray", highlight_colors = NULL, use_transparency = FALSE) {
    
    # Create a factor for plotting
    plot_annotation <- rep("Other", nrow(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))
    
    for(i in 1:length(cell_types)) {
      cell_type <- cell_types[i]
      # Handle multi-label classifications
      matches <- grepl(paste0("\\b", cell_type, "\\b"), merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification)
      plot_annotation[matches] <- cell_type
    }
    
    plot_annotation <- factor(plot_annotation, levels = c("Other", cell_types))
    
    # Set colors
    if(is.null(highlight_colors)) {
      highlight_colors <- rainbow(length(cell_types))
    }
    color_palette <- c("Other" = base_color)
    names(highlight_colors) <- cell_types
    color_palette <- c(color_palette, highlight_colors)
    
    # Create temporary metadata column
    temp_col <- paste0("temp_", paste(cell_types, collapse = "_"))
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, temp_col] <- plot_annotation
    
    # Create plot
    if(use_transparency) {
      p <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                   group.by = temp_col,
                   cols = color_palette,
                   pt.size = 0.5,
                   alpha = 0.5) +
        ggtitle(plot_title) +
        theme(aspect.ratio = 1, 
              legend.position = "right",
              plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
    } else {
      p <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                   group.by = temp_col,
                   cols = color_palette,
                   pt.size = 0.5) +
        ggtitle(plot_title) +
        theme(aspect.ratio = 1, 
              legend.position = "right",
              plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
    }
    
    # Clean up temporary column
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, temp_col] <- NULL
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  # Function specifically for overlapping populations
  create_overlap_plot <- function(pop1_name, pop2_name, pop1_col, pop2_col, overlap_col, plot_title, use_transparency = FALSE) {
    
    # Define the populations based on robust assignments
    if(pop1_name == "B_cells" && pop2_name == "CHC2") {
      pop1_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "B_cells"
      pop2_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC2_Positive_Robust == TRUE
    } else if(pop1_name == "Myeloid" && pop2_name == "CHC1") {
      pop1_cells <- (merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "Monocytes" | 
                     merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "Macrophages_General")
      pop2_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC1_Positive_Robust == TRUE
    } else if(pop1_name == "CD4_T_cells" && pop2_name == "CHC3") {
      pop1_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type == "CD4_T_cells"
      pop2_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$CHC3_Positive_Robust == TRUE
    } else {
      # Fallback to refined classification
      pop1_cells <- grepl(paste0("\\b", pop1_name, "\\b"), merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification)
      pop2_cells <- grepl(paste0("\\b", pop2_name, "\\b"), merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification)
    }
    
    # Create 4 categories
    plot_annotation <- rep("Other", length(pop1_cells))
    plot_annotation[pop1_cells & !pop2_cells] <- paste0(pop1_name, "_only")
    plot_annotation[!pop1_cells & pop2_cells] <- paste0(pop2_name, "_only") 
    plot_annotation[pop1_cells & pop2_cells] <- paste0(pop1_name, "+", pop2_name)
    
    plot_annotation <- factor(plot_annotation, 
                             levels = c("Other", paste0(pop1_name, "_only"), 
                                       paste0(pop2_name, "_only"), paste0(pop1_name, "+", pop2_name)))
    
    # Set colors
    color_palette <- c("Other" = "lightgray")
    color_palette[paste0(pop1_name, "_only")] <- pop1_col
    color_palette[paste0(pop2_name, "_only")] <- pop2_col
    color_palette[paste0(pop1_name, "+", pop2_name)] <- overlap_col
    
    # Create temporary metadata column
    temp_col <- paste0("temp_overlap_", pop1_name, "_", pop2_name)
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, temp_col] <- plot_annotation
    
    # Create plot with specific order to show overlapping cells on top
    if(use_transparency) {
      p <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                   group.by = temp_col,
                   cols = color_palette,
                   pt.size = 0.6,
                   alpha = 0.3,
                   order = paste0(pop1_name, "+", pop2_name)) +  # Plot overlapping cells last
        ggtitle(plot_title) +
        theme(aspect.ratio = 1, 
              legend.position = "right",
              plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
    } else {
      p <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                   group.by = temp_col,
                   cols = color_palette,
                   pt.size = 0.6,
                   order = paste0(pop1_name, "+", pop2_name)) +  # Plot overlapping cells last
        ggtitle(plot_title) +
        theme(aspect.ratio = 1, 
              legend.position = "right",
              plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
    }
    
    # Clean up temporary column
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, temp_col] <- NULL
    
    # Print statistics
    cat(sprintf("%s: %d cells, %s: %d cells, %s+%s: %d cells\n",
                paste0(pop1_name, "_only"), sum(plot_annotation == paste0(pop1_name, "_only")),
                paste0(pop2_name, "_only"), sum(plot_annotation == paste0(pop2_name, "_only")),
                pop1_name, pop2_name, sum(plot_annotation == paste0(pop1_name, "+", pop2_name))))
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  # 8A. B CELLS AND ASSOCIATED HYBRIDS
  cat("\n--- B Cell Category Plots ---\n")
  
  # Plot 1: B cells only
  p_b_only <- create_highlight_plot("B_cells", "B Cells Only", highlight_colors = c("blue"))
  
  # Plot 2: CHC2 only  
  p_chc2_only <- create_highlight_plot("CHC2", "CHC2 Only", highlight_colors = c("red"))
  
  # Plot 3: B cells + CHC2 overlap analysis (IMPROVED)
  p_b_chc2_overlap <- create_overlap_plot("B_cells", "CHC2", "blue", "red", "purple", "B Cells vs CHC2 Overlap", use_transparency = TRUE)
  
  # Plot 4: All B cell related (including other hybrid combinations) with transparency
  b_related_pattern <- "B_cells"
  b_all_types <- unique(grep(b_related_pattern, merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification, value = TRUE))
  b_all_types <- b_all_types[b_all_types != ""]
  
  if(length(b_all_types) > 0) {
    p_b_all <- create_highlight_plot(b_all_types, "All B Cell Related", use_transparency = TRUE)
  } else {
    p_b_all <- create_highlight_plot("B_cells", "B Cells", highlight_colors = c("blue"))
  }
  
  # Combine B cell plots
  b_cell_panel <- (p_b_only | p_chc2_only) / (p_b_chc2_overlap | p_b_all)
  print(b_cell_panel)
  
  # 8B. MYELOID CELLS AND ASSOCIATED HYBRIDS  
  cat("\n--- Myeloid Category Plots ---\n")
  
  # Plot 1: Monocytes only
  p_mono_only <- create_highlight_plot("Monocytes", "Monocytes Only", highlight_colors = c("darkgreen"))
  
  # Plot 2: Macrophages only
  p_macro_only <- create_highlight_plot("Macrophages_General", "Macrophages Only", highlight_colors = c("forestgreen"))
  
  # Plot 3: CHC1 only
  p_chc1_only <- create_highlight_plot("CHC1", "CHC1 Only", highlight_colors = c("red"))
  
  # Plot 4: Myeloid + CHC1 overlap analysis (IMPROVED)
  p_myeloid_chc1_overlap <- create_overlap_plot("Myeloid", "CHC1", "green3", "red", "purple3", "Myeloid vs CHC1 Overlap", use_transparency = TRUE)
  
  # Combine myeloid plots
  myeloid_panel <- (p_mono_only | p_macro_only) / (p_chc1_only | p_myeloid_chc1_overlap)
  print(myeloid_panel)
  
  # 8C. T CELLS AND ASSOCIATED HYBRIDS
  cat("\n--- T Cell Category Plots ---\n")
  
  # Plot 1: CD4 T cells only
  p_cd4_only <- create_highlight_plot("CD4_T_cells", "CD4 T Cells Only", highlight_colors = c("cadetblue3"))
  
  # Plot 2: CD8 T cells only
  p_cd8_only <- create_highlight_plot("CD8_T_cells", "CD8 T Cells Only", highlight_colors = c("darkblue"))
  
  # Plot 3: CHC3 only
  p_chc3_only <- create_highlight_plot("CHC3", "CHC3 Only", highlight_colors = c("red"))
  
  # Plot 4: CD4 T cells + CHC3 overlap analysis (IMPROVED)
  p_cd4_chc3_overlap <- create_overlap_plot("CD4_T_cells", "CHC3", "cadetblue3", "red", "purple3", "CD4 T Cells vs CHC3 Overlap", use_transparency = TRUE)
  
  # Combine T cell plots
  tcell_panel <- (p_cd4_only | p_cd8_only) / (p_chc3_only | p_cd4_chc3_overlap)
  print(tcell_panel)
  
  # 8D. OTHER MAJOR CELL TYPES
  cat("\n--- Other Major Cell Type Plots ---\n")
  
  # Plot 1: CAF cells
  p_caf <- create_highlight_plot("CAF_General", "CAF Cells", highlight_colors = c("purple"))
  
  # Plot 2: Epithelial cells
  p_epi <- create_highlight_plot("Epithelial_General", "Epithelial Cells", highlight_colors = c("gray45"))
  
  # Plot 3: NK cells
  p_nk <- create_highlight_plot("NK_cells", "NK Cells", highlight_colors = c("orange"))
  
  # Plot 4: THC (if present)
  p_thc <- create_highlight_plot("THC", "THC Only", highlight_colors = c("red3"))
  
  # Combine other cell type plots
  other_panel <- (p_caf | p_epi) / (p_nk | p_thc)
  print(other_panel)
  
  # 8E. OVERVIEW PLOTS
  cat("\n--- Overview Plots ---\n")
  
  # Plot 1: Traditional cell types only (no hybrids)
  traditional_types <- c("B_cells", "CD4_T_cells", "CD8_T_cells", "NK_cells", 
                        "Monocytes", "Macrophages_General", "CAF_General", 
                        "Epithelial_General", "CRC_Tumor_cells")
  
  p_traditional <- create_highlight_plot(traditional_types, "Traditional Cell Types")
  
  # Plot 2: Hybrid signatures only
  hybrid_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")
  p_hybrids <- create_highlight_plot(hybrid_types, "Hybrid Gene Modules", 
                                    highlight_colors = c("navy", "orange", "yellow", "red3"))
  # Plot 2: Hybrid signatures only P2
  hybrid_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")
  p_hybrids2 <- create_highlight_plot(hybrid_types, "Hybrid Gene Modules", 
                                    highlight_colors = c("pink1", "pink2", "pink3", "red3"))
  # Plot 3: Multi-labeled cells (cells with + in their name)
  multi_labeled <- unique(grep("\\+", merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification, value = TRUE))
  multi_labeled <- multi_labeled[multi_labeled != ""]
  
  if(length(multi_labeled) > 0) {
    p_multi <- create_highlight_plot(multi_labeled, "Multi-labeled Cells")
  } else {
    # Create empty plot if no multi-labeled cells
    p_multi <- ggplot() + 
      ggtitle("Multi-labeled Cells\n(None found)") + 
      theme_void() + 
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
  }
  
  # Plot 4: Unassigned cells
  p_unassigned <- create_highlight_plot("Unassigned", "Unassigned Cells", highlight_colors = c("black"))
  
  # Combine overview plots
  overview_panel <- (p_traditional | p_hybrids) / (p_hybrids2 | p_unassigned)
  print(overview_panel)
  
  # 8F. ANEUPLOID STATUS OVERLAY
  cat("\n--- Aneuploid Status Overlay ---\n")
  
  if("copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    
    # Create aneuploid status plot
    p_aneuploid <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                          group.by = "copykat_pred",
                          cols = c("aneuploid" = "red", "diploid" = "blue"),
                          pt.size = 0.5) +
      ggtitle("CopyKAT Predictions") +
      theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
    
    # Create a combined plot showing refined classification + aneuploid status
    # This requires creating a combined annotation
    combined_annotation <- paste0(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification, 
                                 "_", merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred)
    
    # Only show the most common combinations to avoid too many colors
    common_combinations <- names(sort(table(combined_annotation), decreasing = TRUE))[1:15]
    
    plot_combined <- ifelse(combined_annotation %in% common_combinations, 
                           combined_annotation, "Other")
    
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$temp_combined <- plot_combined
    
    p_combined <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                         group.by = "temp_combined",
                         pt.size = 0.3) +
      ggtitle("Cell Type + Aneuploid Status\n(Top 15 combinations)") +
      theme(aspect.ratio = 1, 
            legend.position = "right",
            legend.text = element_text(size = 8))
    
    # Clean up
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$temp_combined <- NULL
    
    # Combine aneuploid plots
    aneuploid_panel <- p_aneuploid | p_combined
    print(aneuploid_panel)
  }
  
  cat("UMAP visualization complete!\n")
  
} else {
  cat("UMAP not available. Skipping visualizations.\n")
}

# Save the updated Seurat object with refined classifications
cat("Saving updated Seurat object...\n")
saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, 
        "/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/CopyKat/seurat_with_refinedannot.rds")
```

# Anneuploidy Visualizations (In Depth)
```{r}
# ========================================
# VIOLIN PLOTS FOR ANEUPLOIDY AND GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
# Three sections: Aneuploidy by cell type, Aneuploidy by hybrid detail, Gene expression analysis
# ========================================

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(viridis)
library(ggrepel)  # For non-overlapping labels
library(scales)   # For nice axis formatting

# ========================================
# SECTION 1: ANEUPLOIDY VIOLIN PLOTS BY CELL TYPE CLASSIFICATIONS
# ========================================

cat("=== SECTION 1: ANEUPLOIDY BY CELL TYPE CLASSIFICATIONS ===\n")

# Check if copykat_pred exists
if(!"copykat_pred" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  stop("copykat_pred column not found in metadata. Please run CopyKAT analysis first.")
}

# Convert copykat_pred to numeric (0 = diploid, 1 = aneuploid)
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric <- ifelse(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred == "aneuploid", 1, 0)
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric[is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred)] <- NA

# Function to create aneuploidy violin plots
create_aneuploidy_violin <- function(grouping_var, plot_title, color_palette = NULL) {
  
  # Check if the grouping variable exists
  if(!grouping_var %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat(sprintf("Warning: %s not found in metadata. Skipping.\n", grouping_var))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Remove cells with NA values for copykat or grouping variable
  plot_data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric) & 
                                           !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[grouping_var]]), ]
  
  if(nrow(plot_data) == 0) {
    cat(sprintf("Warning: No valid data for %s. Skipping.\n", grouping_var))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Calculate statistics for each group
  stats_summary <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(!!sym(grouping_var)) %>%
    summarise(
      n_total = n(),
      n_aneuploid = sum(copykat_numeric == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      percent_aneuploid = round(n_aneuploid / n_total * 100, 1),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(percent_aneuploid))
  
  # Print statistics
  cat(sprintf("\n--- %s Statistics ---\n", plot_title))
  print(stats_summary)
  
  # Create the violin plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes_string(x = grouping_var, y = "copykat_numeric")) +
    geom_violin(aes_string(fill = grouping_var), alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.8, outlier.size = 0.5) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2, fill = "white", stroke = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("Diploid", "Aneuploid")) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Aneuploidy Distribution by", plot_title),
      subtitle = paste("Total cells:", nrow(plot_data)),
      x = plot_title,
      y = "Aneuploidy Status",
      fill = plot_title
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Define custom color palettes based on plot title or grouping variable
  if(is.null(color_palette)) {
    # Create custom color palette based on the classification type
    unique_groups <- unique(plot_data[[grouping_var]])
    
    if(grepl("Extended|Collapsed", plot_title, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
      # Cell type colors
      cell_type_colors <- c(
        "Epithelial" = "gray45",
        "Myeloid" = "cadetblue3",
        "Monocytes_Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
        "CAF" = "purple",
        "CAF_General" = "purple",
        "Immune" = "palegreen3",
        "Unassigned" = "black"
      )
      
      # Create color vector for available groups
      color_palette <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_groups))
      names(color_palette) <- unique_groups
      
      for(group in unique_groups) {
        if(group %in% names(cell_type_colors)) {
          color_palette[group] <- cell_type_colors[group]
        }
      }
    } else if(grepl("Hybrid", plot_title, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
      # Hybrid colors
      hybrid_colors <- c(
        "CHC1" = "pink1",      
        "CHC2" = "pink2",      
        "CHC3" = "pink3",     
        "THC" = "red3",       
        "Non-hybrid" = "#6A3D9A", 
        "Multiple" = "#FB9A99",   
        "Other" = "#CCCCCC"       
      )
      
      # Create color vector for available groups
      color_palette <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_groups))
      names(color_palette) <- unique_groups
      
      for(group in unique_groups) {
        if(group %in% names(hybrid_colors)) {
          color_palette[group] <- hybrid_colors[group]
        }
      }
    } else {
      # Default to viridis
      color_palette <- NULL
    }
  }
  
  # Apply color palette
  if(!is.null(color_palette) && length(color_palette) >= length(unique(plot_data[[grouping_var]]))) {
    p <- p + scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette)
  } else {
    p <- p + scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", alpha = 0.8)
  }
  
  # Add percentage labels
  label_data <- stats_summary %>%
    mutate(label = paste0(percent_aneuploid, "%\n(", n_aneuploid, "/", n_total, ")"))
  
  p <- p + geom_text(data = label_data, 
                     aes_string(x = grouping_var, label = "label"), 
                     y = 1.1, size = 3, fontface = "bold")
  
  return(p)
}

# 1A. Collapsed_Cell_Type
if("Collapsed_Cell_Type_New" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  p1_collapsed <- create_aneuploidy_violin("Collapsed_Cell_Type_New", "Collapsed Cell Type")
  if(!is.null(p1_collapsed)) {
    print(p1_collapsed)
  }
} else if("Collapsed_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  p1_collapsed <- create_aneuploidy_violin("Collapsed_Cell_Type", "Collapsed Cell Type")
  if(!is.null(p1_collapsed)) {
    print(p1_collapsed)
  }
}

# 1B. Final_Cell_Type
if("Final_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  p1_final <- create_aneuploidy_violin("Final_Cell_Type", "Final Cell Type")
  if(!is.null(p1_final)) {
    print(p1_final)
  }
}

# 1C. Refined_Classification (Violin Plot)
if("Refined_Classification" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  p1_refined <- create_aneuploidy_violin("Refined_Classification", "Refined Classification")
  if(!is.null(p1_refined)) {
    print(p1_refined)
  }
  
  # 1C-2. Refined_Classification (Bubble Plot - Better for Variable Sample Sizes)
  cat("\n--- Creating Bubble Plot for Refined Classification ---\n")
  
  # Calculate statistics for bubble plot
  bubble_data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric) & 
                                             !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Refined_Classification), ] %>%
    group_by(Refined_Classification) %>%
    summarise(
      n_total = n(),
      n_aneuploid = sum(copykat_numeric == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_diploid = sum(copykat_numeric == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      percent_aneuploid = round(n_aneuploid / n_total * 100, 1),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(percent_aneuploid))
  
  # Print the data
  cat("Refined Classification Bubble Plot Data:\n")
  print(bubble_data)
  
  if(nrow(bubble_data) > 0) {
    
    # Create bubble plot
    p_bubble <- ggplot(bubble_data, aes(x = reorder(Refined_Classification, percent_aneuploid), 
                                       y = percent_aneuploid)) +
      geom_point(aes(size = n_total, fill = percent_aneuploid), 
                 shape = 21, alpha = 0.8, stroke = 1) +
      scale_size_continuous(name = "Cell Count", 
                           range = c(3, 15),
                           breaks = c(10, 50, 100, 500, 1000),
                           labels = c("10", "50", "100", "500", "1000+")) +
      scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "% Aneuploid", 
                          option = "plasma", 
                          direction = 1) +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(bubble_data$percent_aneuploid) * 1.1),
                        breaks = seq(0, ceiling(max(bubble_data$percent_aneuploid)/10)*10, 10)) +
      labs(
        title = "Aneuploidy by Refined Classification",
        subtitle = "Bubble size = cell count, Color = % aneuploid",
        x = "Refined Cell Classification",
        y = "Percentage Aneuploid",
        caption = paste("Total cells analyzed:", sum(bubble_data$n_total))
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_text(size = 10),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right"
      )
    
    # Add text labels showing exact percentages and cell counts
    p_bubble <- p_bubble +
      geom_text(aes(label = paste0(percent_aneuploid, "%\n(", n_aneuploid, "/", n_total, ")")),
                size = 2.5, fontface = "bold", color = "white")
    
    print(p_bubble)
    
    # Create an additional summary plot showing cell count distribution
    p_cell_counts <- ggplot(bubble_data, aes(x = reorder(Refined_Classification, n_total), 
                                            y = n_total)) +
      geom_col(aes(fill = percent_aneuploid), alpha = 0.8) +
      scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "% Aneuploid", 
                          option = "plasma", 
                          direction = 1) +
      scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10", 
                        labels = scales::comma_format()) +
      labs(
        title = "Cell Count Distribution by Refined Classification",
        subtitle = "Bars colored by aneuploidy percentage (log scale)",
        x = "Refined Cell Classification",
        y = "Cell Count (log scale)",
        caption = "Note: Y-axis is on log scale to show variation across categories"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_text(size = 10),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right"
      ) +
      geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(n_total)), 
                hjust = -0.1, size = 2.5, angle = 90)
    
    print(p_cell_counts)
    
    # Create a combined view showing both metrics
    p_combined_metrics <- ggplot(bubble_data, aes(x = n_total, y = percent_aneuploid)) +
      geom_point(aes(size = n_total, fill = percent_aneuploid), 
                 shape = 21, alpha = 0.8, stroke = 1) +
      geom_text_repel(aes(label = Refined_Classification), 
                     size = 3, fontface = "bold",
                     box.padding = 0.5, point.padding = 0.3,
                     max.overlaps = 20) +
      scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10", 
                        labels = scales::comma_format(),
                        breaks = c(1, 10, 100, 1000)) +
      scale_size_continuous(name = "Cell Count", 
                           range = c(3, 12),
                           guide = "none") +  # Remove size legend since x-axis shows this
      scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "% Aneuploid", 
                          option = "plasma", 
                          direction = 1) +
      labs(
        title = "Cell Count vs Aneuploidy Rate by Classification",
        subtitle = "Each point represents a cell type classification",
        x = "Cell Count (log scale)",
        y = "Percentage Aneuploid",
        caption = "Categories with few cells may have less reliable aneuploidy estimates"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.caption = element_text(size = 10),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right"
      )
    
    print(p_combined_metrics)
    
    # Statistical reliability assessment
    cat("\n--- Statistical Reliability Assessment ---\n")
    cat("Categories with potentially unreliable estimates (< 20 cells):\n")
    unreliable <- bubble_data[bubble_data$n_total < 20, ]
    if(nrow(unreliable) > 0) {
      print(unreliable[, c("Refined_Classification", "n_total", "percent_aneuploid")])
    } else {
      cat("All categories have >= 20 cells\n")
    }
    
    cat("\nCategories with high confidence (>= 100 cells):\n")
    reliable <- bubble_data[bubble_data$n_total >= 100, ]
    if(nrow(reliable) > 0) {
      print(reliable[, c("Refined_Classification", "n_total", "percent_aneuploid")])
    } else {
      cat("No categories have >= 100 cells\n")
    }
  }
}

# 1D. Extended_Cell_Type with Statistical Comparisons
if("Extended_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  cat("\n--- Extended Cell Type with Statistical Analysis ---\n")
  
  # Create the basic violin plot first
  p1_extended <- create_aneuploidy_violin("Extended_Cell_Type", "Extended Cell Type")
  
  # Now add statistical comparisons
  if(!is.null(p1_extended)) {
    
    # Prepare data for statistical tests
    extended_data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric) & 
                                                 !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type), ]
    
    # Define comparisons to test
    comparisons_to_test <- list(
      list(group1 = "CHC1", group2 = "Myeloid", description = "CHC1 vs Myeloid"),
      list(group1 = "CHC2", group2 = "Immune", description = "CHC2 vs Immune"),
      list(group1 = "CHC3", group2 = "Immune", description = "CHC3 vs Immune")
    )
    
    # Perform statistical tests
    stat_results <- list()
    
    for(comp in comparisons_to_test) {
      group1_data <- extended_data$copykat_numeric[extended_data$Extended_Cell_Type == comp$group1]
      group2_data <- extended_data$copykat_numeric[extended_data$Extended_Cell_Type == comp$group2]
      
      # Check if both groups exist and have sufficient data
      if(length(group1_data) > 0 && length(group2_data) > 0) {
        
        # Calculate proportions
        group1_prop <- mean(group1_data, na.rm = TRUE)
        group2_prop <- mean(group2_data, na.rm = TRUE)
        
        # Fisher's exact test for categorical data (aneuploid vs diploid)
        if(length(group1_data) >= 5 && length(group2_data) >= 5) {
          
          # Create contingency table
          group1_table <- table(factor(group1_data, levels = c(0, 1)))
          group2_table <- table(factor(group2_data, levels = c(0, 1)))
          
          contingency_matrix <- rbind(group1_table, group2_table)
          rownames(contingency_matrix) <- c(comp$group1, comp$group2)
          colnames(contingency_matrix) <- c("Diploid", "Aneuploid")
          
          # Perform Fisher's exact test
          fisher_result <- fisher.test(contingency_matrix)
          
          stat_results[[comp$description]] <- list(
            group1 = comp$group1,
            group2 = comp$group2,
            group1_n = length(group1_data),
            group2_n = length(group2_data),
            group1_aneuploid_pct = round(group1_prop * 100, 1),
            group2_aneuploid_pct = round(group2_prop * 100, 1),
            p_value = fisher_result$p.value,
            odds_ratio = fisher_result$estimate,
            conf_int_lower = fisher_result$conf.int[1],
            conf_int_upper = fisher_result$conf.int[2],
            significant = fisher_result$p.value < 0.05
          )
          
          # Print results
          cat(sprintf("\n%s:\n", comp$description))
          cat(sprintf("  %s: %d cells, %.1f%% aneuploid\n", 
                      comp$group1, length(group1_data), group1_prop * 100))
          cat(sprintf("  %s: %d cells, %.1f%% aneuploid\n", 
                      comp$group2, length(group2_data), group2_prop * 100))
          cat(sprintf("  Fisher's exact test: p = %.6f\n", fisher_result$p.value))
          cat(sprintf("  Odds ratio: %.3f (95%% CI: %.3f - %.3f)\n", 
                      fisher_result$estimate, fisher_result$conf.int[1], fisher_result$conf.int[2]))
          cat(sprintf("  Statistically significant: %s\n", 
                      ifelse(fisher_result$p.value < 0.05, "YES", "NO")))
          
        } else {
          cat(sprintf("\n%s: Insufficient sample size for statistical testing\n", comp$description))
          cat(sprintf("  %s: %d cells\n", comp$group1, length(group1_data)))
          cat(sprintf("  %s: %d cells\n", comp$group2, length(group2_data)))
        }
      } else {
        cat(sprintf("\n%s: One or both groups not found in Extended_Cell_Type\n", comp$description))
      }
    }
    
    # Create enhanced plot with statistical annotations
    if(length(stat_results) > 0) {
      
      # Add statistical significance annotations to the plot
      significance_annotations <- data.frame(
        comparison = character(),
        x_pos = numeric(),
        y_pos = numeric(),
        label = character(),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      max_y <- 1.2  # Base position for annotations
      annotation_increment <- 0.15
      
      for(i in 1:length(stat_results)) {
        result <- stat_results[[i]]
        
        # Create significance label
        if(result$significant) {
          if(result$p_value < 0.001) {
            sig_label <- "***"
          } else if(result$p_value < 0.01) {
            sig_label <- "**"  
          } else {
            sig_label <- "*"
          }
        } else {
          sig_label <- "ns"
        }
        
        # Create annotation text
        annotation_text <- sprintf("%s vs %s\n%s (p=%.3f)\nOR=%.2f", 
                                  result$group1, result$group2, sig_label, 
                                  result$p_value, result$odds_ratio)
        
        significance_annotations <- rbind(significance_annotations, data.frame(
          comparison = names(stat_results)[i],
          x_pos = 1,  # Will be adjusted based on plot
          y_pos = max_y + (i-1) * annotation_increment,
          label = annotation_text,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
      
      # Add annotations to the plot
      p1_extended_with_stats <- p1_extended +
        annotate("text", x = 1, y = significance_annotations$y_pos, 
                label = significance_annotations$label,
                size = 3, hjust = 0, vjust = 0,
                color = "black", fontface = "bold") +
        labs(subtitle = paste("Statistical comparisons included | Total cells:", nrow(extended_data))) +
        ylim(0, max(significance_annotations$y_pos) + 0.1)
      
      print(p1_extended_with_stats)
      
    } else {
      print(p1_extended)
    }
  }
}

# ========================================
# SECTION 2: ANEUPLOIDY VIOLIN PLOTS BY HYBRID DETAIL
# ========================================

cat("\n=== SECTION 2: ANEUPLOIDY BY HYBRID DETAIL ===\n")

# Check if hybrid_detail exists
if("hybrid_detail" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Create custom color palette for hybrid details using your specified colors
  hybrid_colors <- c(
    "CHC1" = "pink1",      
    "CHC2" = "pink2",      
    "CHC3" = "pink3",     
    "THC" = "red3",       
    "Non-hybrid" = "#6A3D9A", 
    "Multiple" = "#FB9A99",   
    "Other" = "#CCCCCC"       
  )
  
  p2_hybrid <- create_aneuploidy_violin("hybrid_detail", "Hybrid Detail Classification", hybrid_colors)
  if(!is.null(p2_hybrid)) {
    print(p2_hybrid)
    
    # Create an additional plot showing just the hybrid types (excluding non-hybrid)
    hybrid_only_data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[
      !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric) & 
      !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$hybrid_detail) &
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$hybrid_detail != "Non-hybrid", ]
    
    if(nrow(hybrid_only_data) > 0) {
      p2_hybrid_only <- ggplot(hybrid_only_data, aes(x = hybrid_detail, y = copykat_numeric)) +
        geom_violin(aes(fill = hybrid_detail), alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
        geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.8, outlier.size = 0.5) +
        stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2, fill = "white", stroke = 1) +
        scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("Diploid", "Aneuploid")) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = hybrid_colors) +
        labs(
          title = "Aneuploidy Distribution by Hybrid Types Only",
          subtitle = paste("Hybrid cells only:", nrow(hybrid_only_data)),
          x = "Hybrid Type",
          y = "Aneuploidy Status",
          fill = "Hybrid Type"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
```
