```{r}
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.position = "none",
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
        )
      
      # Add percentage labels for hybrid-only plot
      hybrid_stats <- hybrid_only_data %>%
        group_by(hybrid_detail) %>%
        summarise(
          n_total = n(),
          n_aneuploid = sum(copykat_numeric == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
          percent_aneuploid = round(n_aneuploid / n_total * 100, 1),
          .groups = 'drop'
        ) %>%
        mutate(label = paste0(percent_aneuploid, "%\n(", n_aneuploid, "/", n_total, ")"))
      
      p2_hybrid_only <- p2_hybrid_only + 
        geom_text(data = hybrid_stats, 
                  aes(x = hybrid_detail, label = label), 
                  y = 1.1, size = 3, fontface = "bold")
      
      print(p2_hybrid_only)
      
      cat("\n--- Hybrid Types Only Statistics ---\n")
      print(hybrid_stats)
    }
  }
  
} else {
  cat("Warning: hybrid_detail column not found in metadata.\n")
  cat("Available columns containing 'hybrid':\n")
  hybrid_cols <- grep("hybrid", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
  if(length(hybrid_cols) > 0) {
    print(hybrid_cols)
  } else {
    cat("No columns containing 'hybrid' found.\n")
  }
}

# ========================================
# SECTION 3: GENE EXPRESSION VIOLIN PLOTS
# ========================================

cat("\n=== SECTION 3: GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Define genes of interest
genes_of_interest <- c("RUNX1", "SPI1", "THBS1", "GRN", "LGALS3")

# Check which genes are available in the dataset
available_genes <- genes_of_interest[genes_of_interest %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
missing_genes <- genes_of_interest[!genes_of_interest %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

cat("Available genes:", paste(available_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
if(length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  cat("Missing genes:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

if(length(available_genes) == 0) {
  stop("None of the genes of interest are available in the dataset.")
}

# Function to create gene expression violin plots
create_gene_violin <- function(gene, grouping_var, plot_title) {
  
  # Check if the grouping variable exists
  if(!grouping_var %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat(sprintf("Warning: %s not found in metadata. Skipping %s expression plot.\n", grouping_var, gene))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Extract gene expression data
  gene_expression <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[gene, ]
  
  # Create plot data
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    Expression = as.numeric(gene_expression),
    Group = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[grouping_var]],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Remove cells with NA in grouping variable
  plot_data <- plot_data[!is.na(plot_data$Group), ]
  
  if(nrow(plot_data) == 0) {
    cat(sprintf("Warning: No valid data for %s expression by %s. Skipping.\n", gene, grouping_var))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Calculate statistics
  gene_stats <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(Group) %>%
    summarise(
      n_cells = n(),
      mean_expr = round(mean(Expression, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
      median_expr = round(median(Expression, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
      pct_expressed = round(sum(Expression > 0) / n() * 100, 1),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_expr))
  
  # Print statistics
  cat(sprintf("\n--- %s Expression by %s ---\n", gene, plot_title))
  print(gene_stats)
  
  # Create the violin plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Group, y = Expression)) +
    geom_violin(aes(fill = Group), alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.8, outlier.size = 0.3) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2, fill = "white", stroke = 1) +
    labs(
      title = paste(gene, "Expression by", plot_title),
      subtitle = paste("Total cells:", nrow(plot_data)),
      x = plot_title,
      y = paste(gene, "Expression (Log Normalized)"),
      fill = plot_title
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Apply custom colors based on the classification type
  unique_groups <- unique(plot_data$Group)
  
  if(grepl("Extended|Collapsed", plot_title, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    # Cell type colors
    cell_type_colors <- c(
      "Epithelial" = "gray45",
      "Myeloid" = "cadetblue3",
      "Monocytes_Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
      "CAF" = "purple",
      "CAF_General" = "purple",
      "Immune" = "palegreen3",
      "Unassigned" = "black"
    )
    
    # Create color vector for available groups
    color_palette <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_groups))
    names(color_palette) <- unique_groups
    
    for(group in unique_groups) {
      if(group %in% names(cell_type_colors)) {
        color_palette[group] <- cell_type_colors[group]
      }
    }
    
    p <- p + scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette)
    
  } else if(grepl("Hybrid", plot_title, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    # Hybrid colors
    hybrid_colors <- c(
      "CHC1" = "pink1",      
      "CHC2" = "pink2",      
      "CHC3" = "pink3",     
      "THC" = "red3",       
      "Non-hybrid" = "#6A3D9A", 
      "Multiple" = "#FB9A99",   
      "Other" = "#CCCCCC"       
    )
    
    # Create color vector for available groups
    color_palette <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_groups))
    names(color_palette) <- unique_groups
    
    for(group in unique_groups) {
      if(group %in% names(hybrid_colors)) {
        color_palette[group] <- hybrid_colors[group]
      }
    }
    
    p <- p + scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette)
    
  } else {
    # Default to viridis for other classifications
    p <- p + scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", alpha = 0.8)
  }
  
  # Add mean expression labels with better positioning and rotation
  label_data <- gene_stats %>%
    mutate(label = paste0("μ=", mean_expr, "\n", pct_expressed, "%+"))
  
  # Find max expression for label positioning
  max_expr <- max(plot_data$Expression, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # For classifications with many categories (like Final_Cell_Type), use angled text
  if(grepl("Final|Refined", plot_title, ignore.case = TRUE) || length(unique_groups) > 6) {
    # Use angled text for better readability with many categories
    p <- p + geom_text(data = label_data, 
                       aes(x = Group, label = label), 
                       y = max_expr * 1.1, size = 2.2, fontface = "bold",
                       angle = 45, hjust = 0, vjust = 0)
  } else {
    # Use standard positioning for fewer categories
    p <- p + geom_text(data = label_data, 
                       aes(x = Group, label = label), 
                       y = max_expr * 1.05, size = 2.5, fontface = "bold")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# 3A. Gene expression by Collapsed_Cell_Type
if("Collapsed_Cell_Type_New" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  grouping_var <- "Collapsed_Cell_Type_New"
  plot_title <- "Collapsed Cell Type"
} else if("Collapsed_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  grouping_var <- "Collapsed_Cell_Type"
  plot_title <- "Collapsed Cell Type"
} else {
  grouping_var <- NULL
}

if(!is.null(grouping_var)) {
  cat("\n--- Gene Expression by", plot_title, "---\n")
  
  gene_plots_collapsed <- list()
  for(gene in available_genes) {
    p <- create_gene_violin(gene, grouping_var, plot_title)
    if(!is.null(p)) {
      gene_plots_collapsed[[gene]] <- p
    }
  }
  
  # Combine plots and display
  if(length(gene_plots_collapsed) > 0) {
    if(length(gene_plots_collapsed) == 1) {
      print(gene_plots_collapsed[[1]])
    } else if(length(gene_plots_collapsed) <= 4) {
      combined_plot <- wrap_plots(gene_plots_collapsed, ncol = 2)
      print(combined_plot)
    } else {
      # Display in batches of 4
      for(i in seq(1, length(gene_plots_collapsed), 4)) {
        end_idx <- min(i + 3, length(gene_plots_collapsed))
        batch_plots <- gene_plots_collapsed[i:end_idx]
        combined_plot <- wrap_plots(batch_plots, ncol = 2)
        print(combined_plot)
      }
    }
  }
}

# 3B. Gene expression by Final_Cell_Type
if("Final_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("\n--- Gene Expression by Final Cell Type ---\n")
  
  gene_plots_final <- list()
  for(gene in available_genes) {
    p <- create_gene_violin(gene, "Final_Cell_Type", "Final Cell Type")
    if(!is.null(p)) {
      gene_plots_final[[gene]] <- p
    }
  }
  
  # Combine and display plots
  if(length(gene_plots_final) > 0) {
    if(length(gene_plots_final) == 1) {
      print(gene_plots_final[[1]])
    } else if(length(gene_plots_final) <= 4) {
      combined_plot <- wrap_plots(gene_plots_final, ncol = 2)
      print(combined_plot)
    } else {
      # Display in batches of 4
      for(i in seq(1, length(gene_plots_final), 4)) {
        end_idx <- min(i + 3, length(gene_plots_final))
        batch_plots <- gene_plots_final[i:end_idx]
        combined_plot <- wrap_plots(batch_plots, ncol = 2)
        print(combined_plot)
      }
    }
  }
}

# 3C. Gene expression by Refined_Classification
if("Refined_Classification" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("\n--- Gene Expression by Refined Classification ---\n")
  
  gene_plots_refined <- list()
  for(gene in available_genes) {
    p <- create_gene_violin(gene, "Refined_Classification", "Refined Classification")
    if(!is.null(p)) {
      gene_plots_refined[[gene]] <- p
    }
  }
  
  # Combine and display plots
  if(length(gene_plots_refined) > 0) {
    if(length(gene_plots_refined) == 1) {
      print(gene_plots_refined[[1]])
    } else if(length(gene_plots_refined) <= 4) {
      combined_plot <- wrap_plots(gene_plots_refined, ncol = 2)
      print(combined_plot)
    } else {
      # Display in batches of 4
      for(i in seq(1, length(gene_plots_refined), 4)) {
        end_idx <- min(i + 3, length(gene_plots_refined))
        batch_plots <- gene_plots_refined[i:end_idx]
        combined_plot <- wrap_plots(batch_plots, ncol = 2)
        print(combined_plot)
      }
    }
  }
}

# 3D. Gene expression by Extended_Cell_Type
if("Extended_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("\n--- Gene Expression by Extended Cell Type ---\n")
  
  gene_plots_extended <- list()
  for(gene in available_genes) {
    p <- create_gene_violin(gene, "Extended_Cell_Type", "Extended Cell Type")
    if(!is.null(p)) {
      gene_plots_extended[[gene]] <- p
    }
  }
  
  # Combine and display plots
  if(length(gene_plots_extended) > 0) {
    if(length(gene_plots_extended) == 1) {
      print(gene_plots_extended[[1]])
    } else if(length(gene_plots_extended) <= 4) {
      combined_plot <- wrap_plots(gene_plots_extended, ncol = 2)
      print(combined_plot)
    } else {
      # Display in batches of 4
      for(i in seq(1, length(gene_plots_extended), 4)) {
        end_idx <- min(i + 3, length(gene_plots_extended))
        batch_plots <- gene_plots_extended[i:end_idx]
        combined_plot <- wrap_plots(batch_plots, ncol = 2)
        print(combined_plot)
      }
    }
  }
}

# 3E. Gene expression by hybrid_detail
if("hybrid_detail" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("\n--- Gene Expression by Hybrid Detail ---\n")
  
  gene_plots_hybrid <- list()
  for(gene in available_genes) {
    p <- create_gene_violin(gene, "hybrid_detail", "Hybrid Detail")
    if(!is.null(p)) {
      gene_plots_hybrid[[gene]] <- p
    }
  }
  
  # Combine and display plots
  if(length(gene_plots_hybrid) > 0) {
    if(length(gene_plots_hybrid) == 1) {
      print(gene_plots_hybrid[[1]])
    } else if(length(gene_plots_hybrid) <= 4) {
      combined_plot <- wrap_plots(gene_plots_hybrid, ncol = 2)
      print(combined_plot)
    } else {
      # Display in batches of 4
      for(i in seq(1, length(gene_plots_hybrid), 4)) {
        end_idx <- min(i + 3, length(gene_plots_hybrid))
        batch_plots <- gene_plots_hybrid[i:end_idx]
        combined_plot <- wrap_plots(batch_plots, ncol = 2)
        print(combined_plot)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Additional analysis: Gene expression in hybrid vs non-hybrid cells
  cat("\n--- Hybrid vs Non-Hybrid Gene Expression Comparison ---\n")
  
  # Create binary hybrid classification
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$is_hybrid <- ifelse(
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$hybrid_detail %in% c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC", "Multiple"),
    "Hybrid", "Non-hybrid"
  )
  
  hybrid_vs_nonhybrid_plots <- list()
  for(gene in available_genes) {
    p <- create_gene_violin(gene, "is_hybrid", "Hybrid Status")
    if(!is.null(p)) {
      hybrid_vs_nonhybrid_plots[[gene]] <- p
    }
  }
  
  if(length(hybrid_vs_nonhybrid_plots) > 0) {
    cat("\n--- Hybrid vs Non-Hybrid Expression Plots ---\n")
    if(length(hybrid_vs_nonhybrid_plots) <= 4) {
      combined_plot <- wrap_plots(hybrid_vs_nonhybrid_plots, ncol = 2)
      print(combined_plot)
    } else {
      # Display in batches of 4
      for(i in seq(1, length(hybrid_vs_nonhybrid_plots), 4)) {
        end_idx <- min(i + 3, length(hybrid_vs_nonhybrid_plots))
        batch_plots <- hybrid_vs_nonhybrid_plots[i:end_idx]
        combined_plot <- wrap_plots(batch_plots, ncol = 2)
        print(combined_plot)
      }
    }
  }
}

# ========================================
# SECTION 4: SUMMARY STATISTICS AND EXPORT
# ========================================

cat("\n=== SECTION 4: SUMMARY STATISTICS ===\n")

# Create comprehensive summary statistics
summary_stats <- list()

# Aneuploidy summary by different classifications
if("copykat_numeric" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  classifications_to_analyze <- c()
  if("Collapsed_Cell_Type_New" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    classifications_to_analyze <- c(classifications_to_analyze, "Collapsed_Cell_Type_New")
  } else if("Collapsed_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    classifications_to_analyze <- c(classifications_to_analyze, "Collapsed_Cell_Type")
  }
  
  if("Final_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    classifications_to_analyze <- c(classifications_to_analyze, "Final_Cell_Type")
  }
  
  if("Refined_Classification" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    classifications_to_analyze <- c(classifications_to_analyze, "Refined_Classification")
  }
  
  if("Extended_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    classifications_to_analyze <- c(classifications_to_analyze, "Extended_Cell_Type")
  }
  
  if("hybrid_detail" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    classifications_to_analyze <- c(classifications_to_analyze, "hybrid_detail")
  }
  
  for(classification in classifications_to_analyze) {
    summary_stats[[paste0("aneuploidy_", classification)]] <- 
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric) & 
                                  !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[classification]]), ] %>%
      group_by(!!sym(classification)) %>%
      summarise(
        n_total = n(),
        n_aneuploid = sum(copykat_numeric == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        percent_aneuploid = round(n_aneuploid / n_total * 100, 1),
        .groups = 'drop'
      ) %>%
      arrange(desc(percent_aneuploid))
  }
}

# Gene expression summary
for(gene in available_genes) {
  gene_expr <- GetAssayData(merged_seurat_hmm, layer = "data")[gene, ]
  
  summary_stats[[paste0("gene_", gene)]] <- list(
    overall_mean = round(mean(gene_expr, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    overall_median = round(median(gene_expr, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    percent_expressed = round(sum(gene_expr > 0) / length(gene_expr) * 100, 1),
    max_expression = round(max(gene_expr, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
  )
}

# Print summary statistics
cat("\nOverall Gene Expression Summary:\n")
for(gene in available_genes) {
  gene_stats <- summary_stats[[paste0("gene_", gene)]]
  cat(sprintf("%s: Mean=%.3f, Median=%.3f, %%Expressed=%.1f%%, Max=%.3f\n",
              gene, gene_stats$overall_mean, gene_stats$overall_median, 
              gene_stats$percent_expressed, gene_stats$max_expression))
}

cat("\n=== VIOLIN PLOT ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Generated plots for:\n")
cat("1. Aneuploidy distribution by cell type classifications\n")
cat("2. Aneuploidy distribution by hybrid detail classification\n")
cat("3. Gene expression (", paste(available_genes, collapse = ", "), ") by all classifications\n")
cat("4. Hybrid vs non-hybrid gene expression comparisons\n")

# Optional: Save summary statistics
if(exists("output_dir") && dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  # Save summary statistics as JSON
  write(toJSON(summary_stats, pretty = TRUE), file.path(output_dir, "Violin_Plot_Summary_Statistics.json"))
  cat("Summary statistics saved to:", file.path(output_dir, "Violin_Plot_Summary_Statistics.json"), "\n")
}
```
# Updated Anneuploidy Plots
```{r}
# ========================================
# PART 2: UPDATED VIOLIN PLOT COLOR FUNCTION WITH CLEAN LABELS
# ========================================

cat("\n=== UPDATING VIOLIN PLOT COLOR SCHEME ===\n")

# Function to clean up cell type labels (same as Panel K)
clean_cell_type_labels <- function(labels) {
  # Replace specific labels for cleaner display
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("CAF_General", "CAF", labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("Macrophages_General", "Macrophages", cleaned_labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("Epithelial_General", "Epithelial", cleaned_labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("CRC_Tumor_cells", "Tumor", cleaned_labels)
  
  return(cleaned_labels)
}

# Updated function to create aneuploidy violin plots with new color scheme and clean labels
create_aneuploidy_violin_updated <- function(grouping_var, plot_title, custom_color_palette = NULL) {
  
  # Check if the grouping variable exists
  if(!grouping_var %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat(sprintf("Warning: %s not found in metadata. Skipping.\n", grouping_var))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check if copykat_numeric exists
  if(!"copykat_numeric" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    # Create it if it doesn't exist
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric <- ifelse(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred == "aneuploid", 1, 0)
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric[is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred)] <- NA
  }
  
  # Create temporary cleaned classification column
  temp_clean_col <- paste0(grouping_var, "_Clean_Temp_Violin")
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]] <- clean_cell_type_labels(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[grouping_var]])
  
  # Remove cells with NA values for copykat or grouping variable
  plot_data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_numeric) & 
                                           !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]]), ]
  
  if(nrow(plot_data) == 0) {
    cat(sprintf("Warning: No valid data for %s. Skipping.\n", grouping_var))
    # Clean up temporary column
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]] <- NULL
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Calculate statistics for each group (using cleaned labels)
  stats_summary <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(!!sym(temp_clean_col)) %>%
    summarise(
      n_total = n(),
      n_aneuploid = sum(copykat_numeric == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      percent_aneuploid = round(n_aneuploid / n_total * 100, 1),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(percent_aneuploid))
  
  # Rename the grouping column for consistency
  colnames(stats_summary)[1] <- "Group"
  
  # Print statistics
  cat(sprintf("\n--- %s Statistics (Clean Labels) ---\n", plot_title))
  print(stats_summary)
  
  # Create the violin plot using cleaned labels
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes_string(x = temp_clean_col, y = "copykat_numeric")) +
    geom_violin(aes_string(fill = temp_clean_col), alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.8, outlier.size = 0.5) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2, fill = "white", stroke = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("Diploid", "Aneuploid")) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Aneuploidy Distribution by", plot_title),
      subtitle = paste("Total cells:", nrow(plot_data)),
      x = plot_title,
      y = "Aneuploidy Status",
      fill = plot_title
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Apply updated color scheme
  if(is.null(custom_color_palette)) {
    # Get unique groups in the cleaned data
    unique_groups <- unique(plot_data[[temp_clean_col]])
    
    # Create comprehensive color palette using Panel K colors
    color_palette <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_groups))
    names(color_palette) <- unique_groups
    
    # Apply Panel K colors where available (check both original and cleaned names)
    for(group in unique_groups) {
      # First check if the cleaned name has a color
      if(group %in% names(panel_k_colors)) {
        color_palette[group] <- panel_k_colors[group]
      } else {
        # Check if any of the original names would map to this cleaned name
        original_names <- names(panel_k_colors)
        for(orig_name in original_names) {
          if(clean_cell_type_labels(orig_name) == group) {
            color_palette[group] <- panel_k_colors[orig_name]
            break
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    p <- p + scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette)
    
  } else {
    p <- p + scale_fill_manual(values = custom_color_palette)
  }
  
  # Add percentage labels using cleaned group names
  label_data <- stats_summary %>%
    mutate(label = paste0(percent_aneuploid, "%\n(", n_aneuploid, "/", n_total, ")"))
  
  p <- p + geom_text(data = label_data, 
                     aes(x = Group, label = label), 
                     y = 1.1, size = 3, fontface = "bold")
  
  # Clean up the temporary column
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]] <- NULL
  
  return(p)
}

# PANEL K: UMAP VISUALIZATION WITH SPECIFIC COLORS AND CLEAN LABELS
# ========================================

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)

# ========================================
# PART 1: PANEL K - UMAP VISUALIZATION
# ========================================

cat("=== CREATING PANEL K: UMAP VISUALIZATION ===\n")

# Define the comprehensive color palette for Panel K
panel_k_colors <- c(
  # Traditional cell types
  "Epithelial" = "gray45",
  "Epithelial_General" = "gray45",
  "CRC_Tumor_cells" = "gray45",
  "CAF" = "purple",
  "CAF_General" = "purple",
  "Immune" = "palegreen3",
  "CD4_T_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "CD8_T_cells" = "palegreen3", 
  "B_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "NK_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "Myeloid" = "cadetblue3",
  "Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
  "Macrophages_General" = "cadetblue3",
  "Monocytes_Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
  
  # Hybrid modules
  "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
  #"CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
  "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
  "THC" = "red3",
  
  # Other categories
  "Unassigned" = "black",
  "Other" = "lightgray"
)

# Function to clean up cell type labels
clean_cell_type_labels <- function(labels) {
  # Replace specific labels for cleaner display
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("CAF_General", "CAF", labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("Macrophages_General", "Macrophages", cleaned_labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("Epithelial_General", "Epithelial", cleaned_labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("CRC_Tumor_cells", "Tumor", cleaned_labels)
  
  return(cleaned_labels)
}

# Function to create Panel K UMAP with clean labels
create_panel_k_umap <- function(classification_column = "Extended_Cell_Type") {
  
  # Check if UMAP is available
  if(!"umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
    cat("UMAP not found. Running UMAP...\n")
    merged_seurat_hmm <- RunUMAP(merged_seurat_hmm, dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Check if the classification column exists
  if(!classification_column %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("Warning:", classification_column, "not found. Available columns:\n")
    cell_type_cols <- grep("Cell_Type|Classification|hybrid", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
    print(cell_type_cols)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Create temporary cleaned classification column
  temp_clean_col <- paste0(classification_column, "_Clean_Temp")
  cleaned_labels <- clean_cell_type_labels(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[classification_column]])
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]] <- factor(cleaned_labels)
  
  # Get unique cell types in the cleaned data
  unique_cell_types <- levels(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]])
  unique_cell_types <- unique_cell_types[!is.na(unique_cell_types)]
  
  cat("Cell types found in", classification_column, "(cleaned):\n")
  print(unique_cell_types)
  
  # Create color mapping for available cell types
  plot_colors <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_cell_types))
  names(plot_colors) <- unique_cell_types
  
  # Apply Panel K colors where available (check both original and cleaned names)
  for(cell_type in unique_cell_types) {
    # First check if the cleaned name has a color
    if(cell_type %in% names(panel_k_colors)) {
      plot_colors[cell_type] <- panel_k_colors[cell_type]
    } else {
      # Check if any of the original names would map to this cleaned name
      original_names <- names(panel_k_colors)
      for(orig_name in original_names) {
        if(clean_cell_type_labels(orig_name) == cell_type) {
          plot_colors[cell_type] <- panel_k_colors[orig_name]
          break
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  cat("Color mapping:\n")
  print(plot_colors)
  
  # Create the UMAP plot using the cleaned labels
  p_panel_k <- DimPlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    group.by = temp_clean_col,
    pt.size = 0.5,
    label = FALSE
  ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = plot_colors, name = "Cell Type") +
    ggtitle("Panel K: Cell Type Classification") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1,
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Cell Type", override.aes = list(size = 3)))
  
  # Clean up the temporary column
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]] <- NULL
  
  return(p_panel_k)
}

# Show all available classification columns
cat("Available classification columns:\n")
classification_options <- c("Extended_Cell_Type", "Refined_Classification", 
                           "Final_Cell_Type", "Primary_Cell_Type", 
                           "Collapsed_Cell_Type_New", "Collapsed_Cell_Type")

available_classifications <- classification_options[classification_options %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
cat("Found:", paste(available_classifications, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Create Panel K plots for ALL available classifications
panel_k_plots <- list()

for(classification in available_classifications) {
  cat("\nCreating Panel K UMAP for:", classification, "\n")
  panel_k_plot <- create_panel_k_umap(classification)
  if(!is.null(panel_k_plot)) {
    # Update title to be more specific
    panel_k_plot <- panel_k_plot + 
      ggtitle(paste("Panel K:", gsub("_", " ", classification)))
    
    panel_k_plots[[classification]] <- panel_k_plot
    print(panel_k_plot)
  }
}

# Create a summary of what was generated
cat("\n=== Panel K Summary ===\n")
if(length(panel_k_plots) > 0) {
  cat("Successfully created Panel K UMAPs for:\n")
  for(i in 1:length(panel_k_plots)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %d. %s\n", i, names(panel_k_plots)[i]))
  }
  
  # If multiple plots were created, also create a combined view
  if(length(panel_k_plots) > 1) {
    cat("\nCreating combined Panel K view...\n")
    
    # Combine up to 4 plots in a 2x2 grid
    plots_to_combine <- panel_k_plots[1:min(4, length(panel_k_plots))]
    
    if(length(plots_to_combine) <= 2) {
      combined_panel_k <- wrap_plots(plots_to_combine, ncol = 2)
    } else {
      combined_panel_k <- wrap_plots(plots_to_combine, ncol = 2, nrow = 2)
    }
    
    combined_panel_k <- combined_panel_k + 
      plot_annotation(
        title = "Panel K: Multiple Classification Comparisons",
        theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
      )
    
    print(combined_panel_k)
  }
  
} else {
  cat("No Panel K plots could be generated.\n")
}

# Select the "best" Panel K plot for later use (prefer Extended_Cell_Type)
best_panel_k <- NULL
if("Extended_Cell_Type" %in% names(panel_k_plots)) {
  best_panel_k <- panel_k_plots[["Extended_Cell_Type"]]
  cat("\nUsing Extended_Cell_Type as the primary Panel K plot.\n")
} else if(length(panel_k_plots) > 0) {
  best_panel_k <- panel_k_plots[[1]]
  cat(sprintf("\nUsing %s as the primary Panel K plot.\n", names(panel_k_plots)[1]))
}

# Print the label cleaning reference
cat("\n=== Label Cleaning Reference ===\n")
cat("Original → Cleaned:\n")
cat("CAF_General → CAF\n")
cat("Macrophages_General → Macrophages\n") 
cat("Epithelial_General → Epithelial\n")
cat("CRC_Tumor_cells → Tumor\n")

# ========================================
# PART 3: DEMONSTRATION OF UPDATED VIOLIN PLOTS
# ========================================

cat("\n=== CREATING UPDATED VIOLIN PLOTS ===\n")

# List of classification columns to test
violin_classifications <- c("Extended_Cell_Type", "Refined_Classification", 
                           "Final_Cell_Type", "Collapsed_Cell_Type_New", 
                           "Collapsed_Cell_Type")

# Create updated violin plots for available classifications
for(classification in violin_classifications) {
  if(classification %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("\nCreating violin plot for", classification, "\n")
    
    # Clean up the title for display
    plot_title <- gsub("_", " ", classification)
    plot_title <- gsub("Cell Type", "Cell Type", plot_title)
    
    p_violin <- create_aneuploidy_violin_updated(classification, plot_title)
    
    if(!is.null(p_violin)) {
      print(p_violin)
    }
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 4: SPECIFIC HYBRID DETAIL VIOLIN PLOT
# ========================================

cat("\n=== CREATING HYBRID-SPECIFIC VIOLIN PLOT ===\n")

# Check if hybrid_detail exists or create it
if(!"hybrid_detail" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("Creating hybrid_detail classification...\n")
  
  # Create hybrid_detail based on available hybrid assignments
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$hybrid_detail <- "Non-hybrid"
  
  # Check for individual hybrid assignments
  hybrid_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")
  
  for(hybrid_type in hybrid_types) {
    # Check multiple possible column names
    possible_cols <- c(
      paste0(hybrid_type, "_Positive_Robust"),
      paste0(hybrid_type, "_positive"),
      paste0(hybrid_type, "_Classification")
    )
    
    found_col <- NULL
    for(col in possible_cols) {
      if(col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        found_col <- col
        break
      }
    }
    
    if(!is.null(found_col)) {
      if(grepl("Classification", found_col)) {
        # For classification columns, look for "High_" prefix
        hybrid_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[found_col]] == paste0("High_", hybrid_type)
      } else {
        # For boolean columns
        hybrid_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[found_col]] == TRUE
      }
      
      # Assign hybrid type
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$hybrid_detail[hybrid_cells] <- hybrid_type
      cat(paste0(hybrid_type, ": ", sum(hybrid_cells, na.rm = TRUE), " cells\n"))
    }
  }
  
  # Check for multiple hybrid assignments
  # (This is simplified - you might want to make it more sophisticated)
  # For now, we'll keep the first assignment if multiple exist
  
  cat("Hybrid detail distribution:\n")
  print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$hybrid_detail))
}

# Create hybrid-specific violin plot
if("hybrid_detail" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  # Create hybrid-specific color palette
  hybrid_specific_colors <- c(
    "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
    "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
    #"CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
    "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
    "THC" = "red3",
    "Non-hybrid" = "#6A3D9A",
    "Multiple" = "#FB9A99",
    "Other" = "#CCCCCC"
  )
  
  p_hybrid_violin <- create_aneuploidy_violin_updated("hybrid_detail", "Hybrid Detail", hybrid_specific_colors)
  
  if(!is.null(p_hybrid_violin)) {
    print(p_hybrid_violin)
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: COMBINED PANEL VISUALIZATION
# ========================================

cat("\n=== CREATING COMBINED PANEL ===\n")

# Create a combined visualization showing Panel K alongside key violin plots
if(exists("panel_k_plots") && length(panel_k_plots) > 0) {
  
  # Use the best Panel K plot
  if(exists("best_panel_k")) {
    selected_panel_k <- best_panel_k
  } else {
    selected_panel_k <- panel_k_plots[[1]]
  }
  
  # Find the best violin plot to pair with Panel K
  best_violin <- NULL
  
  # Try to create a violin plot for the same classification used in the best Panel K
  if("Extended_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    best_violin <- create_aneuploidy_violin_updated("Extended_Cell_Type", "Extended Cell Type")
  } else if("Refined_Classification" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    best_violin <- create_aneuploidy_violin_updated("Refined_Classification", "Refined Classification")
  }
  
  if(!is.null(best_violin) && !is.null(selected_panel_k)) {
    # Create combined panel
    combined_panel <- selected_panel_k | best_violin
    
    # Add overall title
    combined_panel <- combined_panel + 
      plot_annotation(
        title = "Panel K: Cell Type Classification and Aneuploidy Analysis",
        theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
      )
    
    print(combined_panel)
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 6: COLOR PALETTE REFERENCE
# ========================================

cat("\n=== COLOR PALETTE REFERENCE ===\n")
cat("Panel K Color Scheme:\n")
if(exists("panel_k_colors")) {
  for(cell_type in names(panel_k_colors)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %-20s: %s\n", cell_type, panel_k_colors[cell_type]))
  }
} else {
  cat("Panel K colors not defined. Please run Panel K code first.\n")
}

cat("\nLabel Cleaning Applied:\n")
cat("CAF_General → CAF\n")
cat("Macrophages_General → Macrophages\n") 
cat("Epithelial_General → Epithelial\n")
cat("CRC_Tumor_cells → Tumor\n")

cat("\nTo use these colors consistently in future plots, reference the 'panel_k_colors' vector.\n")

# ========================================
# PART 7: SAVE PLOTS AND COLOR SCHEME
# ========================================

# Save the updated Seurat object if hybrid_detail was created
if("hybrid_detail" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("\nSaving updated Seurat object with hybrid_detail...\n")
  saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, "seurat_with_panel_k_annotations.rds")
}

# Save color palette for future use
if(exists("panel_k_colors")) {
  panel_k_color_df <- data.frame(
    Cell_Type = names(panel_k_colors),
    Color = panel_k_colors,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  if(exists("output_dir") && dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    write.csv(panel_k_color_df, file.path(output_dir, "Panel_K_Color_Scheme.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
    cat("Color scheme saved to:", file.path(output_dir, "Panel_K_Color_Scheme.csv"), "\n")
  }
}

cat("\n=== PANEL K AND UPDATED VIOLIN PLOTS COMPLETE ===\n")
```
# Panel L
```{r}
# Function to calculate Cliff's delta (effect size for non-parametric tests)
calculate_cliff_delta <- function(group1, group2) {
  n1 <- length(group1)
  n2 <- length(group2)
  
  # Create all pairwise comparisons
  comparisons <- outer(group1, group2, function(x, y) {
    ifelse(x > y, 1, ifelse(x < y, -1, 0))
  })
  
  # Cliff's delta = (number of pairs where group1 > group2 - number where group1 < group2) / total pairs
  cliff_delta <- sum(comparisons) / (n1 * n2)
  return(cliff_delta)
}

# Function to interpret Cliff's delta effect size
interpret_cliff_delta <- function(delta) {
  abs_delta <- abs(delta)
  if (abs_delta < 0.147) return("negligible")
  else if (abs_delta < 0.33) return("small")
  else if (abs_delta < 0.474) return("medium")
  else return("large")
}

# Function to perform Wilcoxon tests for Extended_Cell_Type
perform_wilcoxon_tests_extended <- function(seurat_object, gene_name, group_column = "Extended_Cell_Type_Clean", reference_group = "Epithelial") {
  
  cat(sprintf("\n=== Analyzing %s ===\n", gene_name))
  
  # Extract expression data for the gene
  gene_data <- FetchData(seurat_object, vars = c(gene_name, group_column))
  
  # Remove any unwanted groups if needed (e.g., Unassigned, Other)
  # gene_data <- gene_data[!gene_data[[group_column]] %in% c("Unassigned", "Other"), ]
  
  # Get unique cell types (excluding reference group)
  cell_types <- unique(gene_data[[group_column]])
  cell_types_to_test <- cell_types[cell_types != reference_group]
  
  cat(sprintf("Cell types found: %s\n", paste(cell_types, collapse = ", ")))
  cat(sprintf("Testing against %s: %s\n", reference_group, paste(cell_types_to_test, collapse = ", ")))
  
  # Store results
  test_results <- list()
  
  # Perform Wilcoxon tests for each cell type vs reference group
  for (cell_type in cell_types_to_test) {
    cat(sprintf("\nTesting %s vs %s...\n", cell_type, reference_group))
    
    # Subset data for current cell type and reference group
    subset_data <- gene_data[gene_data[[group_column]] %in% c(cell_type, reference_group), ]
    
    # Check if we have both groups
    if (nrow(subset_data) > 0 && length(unique(subset_data[[group_column]])) == 2) {
      # Get the two groups
      group1_data <- subset_data[subset_data[[group_column]] == cell_type, gene_name]
      group2_data <- subset_data[subset_data[[group_column]] == reference_group, gene_name]
      
      # Remove any NA values
      group1_data <- group1_data[!is.na(group1_data)]
      group2_data <- group2_data[!is.na(group2_data)]
      
      if (length(group1_data) > 0 && length(group2_data) > 0) {
        # Perform Wilcoxon test
        wilcox_result <- wilcox.test(group1_data, group2_data, 
                                     alternative = "two.sided", 
                                     exact = FALSE)
        
        # Calculate effect size (Cliff's delta)
        cliff_delta <- calculate_cliff_delta(group1_data, group2_data)
        
        # Calculate medians for interpretation
        median1 <- median(group1_data, na.rm = TRUE)
        median2 <- median(group2_data, na.rm = TRUE)
        
        test_results[[paste(cell_type, "vs", reference_group)]] <- list(
          comparison = paste(cell_type, "vs", reference_group),
          p_value = wilcox_result$p.value,
          statistic = wilcox_result$statistic,
          median_diff = median1 - median2,
          median_celltype = median1,
          median_reference = median2,
          cliff_delta = cliff_delta,
          effect_size_interpretation = interpret_cliff_delta(cliff_delta),
          significant = wilcox_result$p.value < 0.05,
          n_celltype = length(group1_data),
          n_reference = length(group2_data)
        )
        
        # Print results immediately
        cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.4f (%s)\n", wilcox_result$p.value, 
                    ifelse(wilcox_result$p.value < 0.05, "significant", "not significant")))
        cat(sprintf("  Medians: %.3f vs %.3f (diff: %.3f)\n", median1, median2, median1 - median2))
        cat(sprintf("  Effect size: %.3f (%s)\n", cliff_delta, interpret_cliff_delta(cliff_delta)))
        cat(sprintf("  Sample sizes: %d vs %d\n", length(group1_data), length(group2_data)))
      } else {
        cat(sprintf("  Skipped - insufficient data after removing NAs\n"))
      }
    } else {
      cat(sprintf("  Skipped - missing one or both groups\n"))
    }
  }
  
  return(test_results)
}

# Function to apply multiple testing correction
apply_multiple_testing_correction <- function(test_results, method = "BH") {
  if (length(test_results) == 0) return(test_results)
  
  # Extract p-values
  p_values <- sapply(test_results, function(x) x$p_value)
  
  # Apply correction
  adjusted_p <- p.adjust(p_values, method = method)
  
  # Update results with adjusted p-values
  for (i in seq_along(test_results)) {
    test_results[[i]]$p_value_adjusted <- adjusted_p[i]
    test_results[[i]]$significant_adjusted <- adjusted_p[i] < 0.05
  }
  
  return(test_results)
}

# Genes of interest as specified
genes_of_interest_extended <- c("RUNX1", "THBS1", "SPI1", "GRN", "PF4", "LGALS3")

# First, make sure the Panel K colors are defined
panel_k_colors <- c(
  # Traditional cell types
  "Epithelial" = "gray45",
  "Epithelial_General" = "gray45",
  "CRC_Tumor_cells" = "gray45",
  "CAF" = "purple",
  "CAF_General" = "purple",
  "Immune" = "palegreen3",
  "CD4_T_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "CD8_T_cells" = "palegreen3", 
  "B_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "NK_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "Myeloid" = "cadetblue3",
  "Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
  "Macrophages_General" = "cadetblue3",
  "Monocytes_Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
  
  # Hybrid modules
  "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
  #"CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
  "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
  "THC" = "red3",
  
  # Other categories
  "Unassigned" = "black",
  "Other" = "lightgray"
)

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists("Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis")) {
  dir.create("Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis", recursive = TRUE)
  cat("Created directory: Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis\n")
}

# Gene expression analysis by Extended_Cell_Type with statistical testing
if("Extended_Cell_Type" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cat("\n--- Gene Expression Analysis by Extended Cell Type with Statistics ---\n")
  
  # Create a temporary column with cleaned labels
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type_Clean <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type
  
  # Replace CAF_General with CAF
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type_Clean <- gsub("CAF_General", "CAF", 
                                                               merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type_Clean)
  
  # You can add other label cleanups here if needed:
  # merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type_Clean <- gsub("Macrophages_General", "Macrophages", 
  #                                                              merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type_Clean)
  
  # Store all results
  all_statistical_results <- list()
  gene_plots_extended_with_stats <- list()
  
  # Process each gene
  for (i in seq_along(genes_of_interest_extended)) {
    gene <- genes_of_interest_extended[i]
    cat(sprintf("\n### Processing gene %d/%d: %s ###\n", i, length(genes_of_interest_extended), gene))
    
    # Check if gene exists in the dataset
    if (!gene %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)) {
      cat(sprintf("Warning: Gene %s not found in dataset. Skipping.\n", gene))
      next
    }
    
    # Perform statistical tests
    stats_results <- perform_wilcoxon_tests_extended(merged_seurat_hmm, gene, 
                                                     group_column = "Extended_Cell_Type_Clean",
                                                     reference_group = "Epithelial")
    
    # Apply multiple testing correction
    if (length(stats_results) > 0) {
      stats_results <- apply_multiple_testing_correction(stats_results, method = "BH")
      all_statistical_results[[gene]] <- stats_results
      
      cat("\nAfter multiple testing correction:\n")
      for (comparison_name in names(stats_results)) {
        result <- stats_results[[comparison_name]]
        cat(sprintf("%s: raw p=%.4f, adj p=%.4f (%s)\n", 
                    result$comparison, result$p_value, result$p_value_adjusted,
                    ifelse(result$significant_adjusted, "significant", "not significant")))
      }
    }
    
    # Create violin plot with statistical annotations
    cat("Creating violin plot with statistical annotations...\n")
    
    tryCatch({
      # Get unique cell types in the cleaned Extended_Cell_Type
      unique_cell_types <- unique(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type_Clean)
      unique_cell_types <- unique_cell_types[!is.na(unique_cell_types)]
      
      # Create color mapping using Panel K colors
      plot_colors <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_cell_types))
      names(plot_colors) <- unique_cell_types
      
      # Apply Panel K colors where available
      for(cell_type in unique_cell_types) {
        if(cell_type %in% names(panel_k_colors)) {
          plot_colors[cell_type] <- panel_k_colors[cell_type]
        }
      }
      
      # Create the violin plot
      p <- VlnPlot(
        merged_seurat_hmm,
        features = gene,
        group.by = "Extended_Cell_Type_Clean",
        pt.size = 0.1,
        slot = "data",
        cols = plot_colors
      ) +
        ggtitle(gene) +
        xlab("Extended Cell Type") +
        ylab("Expression Level") +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
        theme(
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 8),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 8),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
          legend.position = "none",
          plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
        )
      
      cat("Basic violin plot created successfully.\n")
      
      # Add significance annotations if we have results
      if (length(stats_results) > 0) {
        cat("Adding significance annotations...\n")
        
        # Get the plot build to access the exact x-axis positions
        plot_build <- ggplot_build(p)
        
        # Extract x-axis labels and their positions from the built plot
        x_labels <- plot_build$layout$panel_params[[1]]$x$get_labels()
        x_positions <- 1:length(x_labels)
        
        cat(sprintf("Plot x-axis order: %s\n", paste(x_labels, collapse = ", ")))
        
        # Get expression data for y-positioning
        plot_data <- FetchData(merged_seurat_hmm, vars = c(gene, "Extended_Cell_Type_Clean"))
        max_expression <- max(plot_data[[1]], na.rm = TRUE)
        min_expression <- min(plot_data[[1]], na.rm = TRUE)
        y_annotation <- min_expression + (max_expression - min_expression) * 0.9  # Top of the plot
        
        cat(sprintf("Expression range: %.3f to %.3f, annotation y-position: %.3f\n", 
                    min_expression, max_expression, y_annotation))
        
        # Create annotations based on the actual plot order
        sig_annotations <- data.frame()
        
        for (comparison_name in names(stats_results)) {
          result <- stats_results[[comparison_name]]
          cell_type <- strsplit(comparison_name, " vs ")[[1]][1]
          
          # Find the exact position in the plot
          if (cell_type %in% x_labels) {
            cell_position <- which(x_labels == cell_type)
            
            # Determine significance based on both p-value AND effect size
            # Only annotate if statistically significant AND has meaningful effect size
            if (result$p_value_adjusted < 0.05) {
              abs_effect <- abs(result$cliff_delta)
              if (abs_effect >= 0.474) {
                sig_symbol <- "***"  # Large effect
              } else if (abs_effect >= 0.33) {
                sig_symbol <- "**"   # Medium effect
              } else if (abs_effect >= 0.147) {
                sig_symbol <- "*"    # Small effect
              } else {
                sig_symbol <- NULL   # Negligible effect - don't annotate
              }
            } else {
              sig_symbol <- NULL  # Not statistically significant
            }
            
            # Add to annotations if significant
            if (!is.null(sig_symbol)) {
              sig_annotations <- rbind(sig_annotations, data.frame(
                x = cell_position,
                y = y_annotation,
                label = sig_symbol,
                stringsAsFactors = FALSE
              ))
              
              cat(sprintf("  %s: %s (plot position %d)\n", cell_type, sig_symbol, cell_position))
            }
          } else {
            cat(sprintf("  %s: not found in plot x-axis\n", cell_type))
          }
        }
        
        # Add annotations to plot if any exist
        if (nrow(sig_annotations) > 0) {
          p <- p +
            # First add white outline (slightly larger)
            annotate("text", 
                     x = sig_annotations$x, 
                     y = sig_annotations$y, 
                     label = sig_annotations$label,
                     size = 5,  # Slightly larger for outline effect
                     fontface = "bold",
                     color = "white") +
            # Then add black text on top
            annotate("text", 
                     x = sig_annotations$x, 
                     y = sig_annotations$y, 
                     label = sig_annotations$label,
                     size = 4.5,
                     fontface = "bold",
                     color = "black")
          
          cat(sprintf("Added %d significance annotations (*** = large effect [≥0.474], ** = medium [≥0.33], * = small [≥0.147])\n", nrow(sig_annotations)))
        } else {
          cat("No results with both statistical significance and meaningful effect size to annotate\n")
        }
      }
      
      cat("Final plot prepared successfully.\n")
      gene_plots_extended_with_stats[[gene]] <- p
      
      # Save individual plot
      ggsave(filename = sprintf("Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis/violin_plot_%s_extended.png", gene),
             plot = p, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
      ggsave(filename = sprintf("Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis/violin_plot_%s_extended.pdf", gene),
             plot = p, width = 6, height = 5, bg = "white")
      
      cat("Violin plot created and saved successfully!\n")
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("Error creating plot for %s: %s\n", gene, e$message))
      gene_plots_extended_with_stats[[gene]] <- NULL
    })
  }
  
  # Create combined plot if we have individual plots
  if (length(gene_plots_extended_with_stats) > 0) {
    cat("\nCreating combined plot...\n")
    
    # Filter out any NULL plots
    valid_plots <- gene_plots_extended_with_stats[!sapply(gene_plots_extended_with_stats, is.null)]
    
    if (length(valid_plots) > 0) {
      tryCatch({
        # Arrange plots based on number available
        if (length(valid_plots) == 6) {
          # 3 on top, 3 on bottom for 6 genes
          combined_plot <- wrap_plots(valid_plots, ncol = 3, nrow = 2)
        } else {
          # Default arrangement
          combined_plot <- wrap_plots(valid_plots, ncol = 3)
        }
        
        # Save combined plot to 250725.Fig7Final/
        ggsave(filename = "250725.Fig7Final/PanelJ.violin_plots_extended_combined.png",
               plot = combined_plot, width = 15, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
        ggsave(filename = "250725.Fig7Final/PanelJ.violin_plots_extended_combined.pdf",
               plot = combined_plot, width = 15, height = 10, bg = "white")
        
        cat(sprintf("Combined plot saved successfully with %d plots!\n", length(valid_plots)))
        
        # Display the combined plot
        print(combined_plot)
        
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("Error creating combined plot: %s\n", e$message))
      })
    } else {
      cat("No valid plots to combine.\n")
    }
  }
  
  # Save statistical results to a summary file
  if (length(all_statistical_results) > 0) {
    cat("\nSaving statistical results summary...\n")
    
    # Create a summary data frame
    summary_df <- data.frame()
    
    for (gene in names(all_statistical_results)) {
      gene_results <- all_statistical_results[[gene]]
      for (comparison in names(gene_results)) {
        result <- gene_results[[comparison]]
        summary_df <- rbind(summary_df, data.frame(
          Gene = gene,
          Comparison = result$comparison,
          P_Value = result$p_value,
          P_Value_Adjusted = result$p_value_adjusted,
          Significant_Adjusted = result$significant_adjusted,
          Median_Difference = result$median_diff,
          Cliff_Delta = result$cliff_delta,
          Effect_Size = result$effect_size_interpretation,
          N_CellType = result$n_celltype,
          N_Reference = result$n_reference,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
    
    # Save to CSV
    write.csv(summary_df, "Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis/statistical_results_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
    cat("Statistical results saved to Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis/statistical_results_summary.csv\n")
  }
  
  # Clean up the temporary column
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Extended_Cell_Type_Clean <- NULL
  
  cat("\n=== EXTENDED CELL TYPE ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
  cat("Files saved:\n")
  cat("- Individual plots: Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis/violin_plot_[GENE]_extended.png/pdf\n")
  cat("- Combined plot: 250725.Fig7Final/PanelJ.violin_plots_extended_combined.png/pdf\n")
  cat("- Statistical summary: Extended_Cell_Type_Analysis/statistical_results_summary.csv\n")
  
} else {
  cat("Error: Extended_Cell_Type column not found in metadata.\n")
}

#Cliff, N. (1993). Dominance statistics: Ordinal analyses to answer ordinal questions. Psychological Bulletin, 114(3), 494-509.
#Romano, J., et al. (2006). Appropriate statistics for ordinal level data. Learning and Individual Differences, 16(4), 319-324.
```
# Panel K
```{r}

# PANEL K: UMAP VISUALIZATION WITH SPECIFIC COLORS
# AND UPDATED VIOLIN PLOT COLOR SCHEME
# ========================================

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)

# ========================================
# PART 1: PANEL K - UMAP VISUALIZATION
# ========================================

cat("=== CREATING PANEL K: UMAP VISUALIZATION ===\n")

# Define the comprehensive color palette for Panel K
panel_k_colors <- c(
  # Traditional cell types
  "Epithelial" = "gray45",
  "Epithelial_General" = "gray45",
  "CRC_Tumor_cells" = "gray45",
  "CAF" = "purple",
  "CAF_General" = "purple",
  "Immune" = "palegreen3",
  "CD4_T_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "CD8_T_cells" = "palegreen3", 
  "B_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "NK_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "Myeloid" = "cadetblue3",
  "Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
  "Macrophages_General" = "cadetblue3",
  "Monocytes_Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
  
  # Hybrid modules
  "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
  #"CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
  "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
  "THC" = "red3",
  
  # Other categories
  "Unassigned" = "black",
  "Other" = "lightgray"
)

# Function to create Panel K UMAP
create_panel_k_umap <- function(classification_column = "Extended_Cell_Type") {
  
  # Check if UMAP is available
  if(!"umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
    cat("UMAP not found. Running UMAP...\n")
    merged_seurat_hmm <- RunUMAP(merged_seurat_hmm, dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Check if the classification column exists
  if(!classification_column %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("Warning:", classification_column, "not found. Available columns:\n")
    cell_type_cols <- grep("Cell_Type|Classification|hybrid", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
    print(cell_type_cols)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Get unique cell types in the data
  unique_cell_types <- unique(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[classification_column]])
  unique_cell_types <- unique_cell_types[!is.na(unique_cell_types)]
  
  cat("Cell types found in", classification_column, ":\n")
  print(unique_cell_types)
  
  # Create color mapping for available cell types
  plot_colors <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_cell_types))
  names(plot_colors) <- unique_cell_types
  
  # Apply Panel K colors where available
  for(cell_type in unique_cell_types) {
    if(cell_type %in% names(panel_k_colors)) {
      plot_colors[cell_type] <- panel_k_colors[cell_type]
    }
  }
  
  cat("Color mapping:\n")
  print(plot_colors)
  
  # Create the UMAP plot
  p_panel_k <- DimPlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    group.by = classification_column,
    cols = plot_colors,
    pt.size = 0.5,
    label = FALSE
  ) +
    ggtitle("Panel K: Cell Type Classification") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1,
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Cell Type", override.aes = list(size = 3)))
  
  return(p_panel_k)
}

# Show all available classification columns
cat("Available classification columns:\n")
classification_options <- c("Extended_Cell_Type", "Refined_Classification", 
                           "Final_Cell_Type", "Primary_Cell_Type", 
                           "Collapsed_Cell_Type_New", "Collapsed_Cell_Type")

available_classifications <- classification_options[classification_options %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
cat("Found:", paste(available_classifications, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Create Panel K plots for ALL available classifications
panel_k_plots <- list()

for(classification in available_classifications) {
  cat("\nCreating Panel K UMAP for:", classification, "\n")
  panel_k_plot <- create_panel_k_umap(classification)
  if(!is.null(panel_k_plot)) {
    # Update title to be more specific
    panel_k_plot <- panel_k_plot + 
      ggtitle(paste("Panel K:", gsub("_", " ", classification)))
    
    panel_k_plots[[classification]] <- panel_k_plot
    print(panel_k_plot)
  }
}

# Create a summary of what was generated
cat("\n=== Panel K Summary ===\n")
if(length(panel_k_plots) > 0) {
  cat("Successfully created Panel K UMAPs for:\n")
  for(i in 1:length(panel_k_plots)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %d. %s\n", i, names(panel_k_plots)[i]))
  }
  
  
} else {
  cat("No Panel K plots could be generated.\n")
}

# Select the "best" Panel K plot for later use (prefer Extended_Cell_Type)
best_panel_k <- NULL
if("Extended_Cell_Type" %in% names(panel_k_plots)) {
  best_panel_k <- panel_k_plots[["Extended_Cell_Type"]]
  cat("\nUsing Extended_Cell_Type as the primary Panel K plot.\n")
} else if(length(panel_k_plots) > 0) {
  best_panel_k <- panel_k_plots[[1]]
  cat(sprintf("\nUsing %s as the primary Panel K plot.\n", names(panel_k_plots)[1]))
}

```
```{r}
# PANEL K: UMAP VISUALIZATION WITH SPECIFIC COLORS AND CLEAN LABELS
# ========================================

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)

# ========================================
# PART 1: PANEL K - UMAP VISUALIZATION
# ========================================

cat("=== CREATING PANEL K: UMAP VISUALIZATION ===\n")

# Define the comprehensive color palette for Panel K
panel_k_colors <- c(
  # Traditional cell types
  "Epithelial" = "gray45",
  "Epithelial_General" = "gray45",
  "CRC_Tumor_cells" = "gray45",
  "CAF" = "purple",
  "CAF_General" = "purple",
  "Immune" = "palegreen3",
  "CD4_T_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "CD8_T_cells" = "palegreen3", 
  "B_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "NK_cells" = "palegreen3",
  "Myeloid" = "cadetblue3",
  "Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
  "Macrophages_General" = "cadetblue3",
  "Monocytes_Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
  
  # Hybrid modules
  "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
  #"CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
  "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
  "THC" = "red3",
  
  # Other categories
  "Unassigned" = "black",
  "Other" = "lightgray"
)

# Function to clean up cell type labels
clean_cell_type_labels <- function(labels) {
  # Replace specific labels for cleaner display
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("CAF_General", "CAF", labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("Macrophages_General", "Macrophages", cleaned_labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("Epithelial_General", "Epithelial", cleaned_labels)
  cleaned_labels <- gsub("CRC_Tumor_cells", "Tumor", cleaned_labels)
  
  return(cleaned_labels)
}

# Function to create Panel K UMAP with clean labels
create_panel_k_umap <- function(classification_column = "Extended_Cell_Type") {
  
  # Check if UMAP is available
  if(!"umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
    cat("UMAP not found. Running UMAP...\n")
    merged_seurat_hmm <- RunUMAP(merged_seurat_hmm, dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Check if the classification column exists
  if(!classification_column %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("Warning:", classification_column, "not found. Available columns:\n")
    cell_type_cols <- grep("Cell_Type|Classification|hybrid", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
    print(cell_type_cols)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Create temporary cleaned classification column
  temp_clean_col <- paste0(classification_column, "_Clean_Temp")
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]] <- clean_cell_type_labels(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[classification_column]])
  
  # Get unique cell types in the cleaned data
  unique_cell_types <- unique(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]])
  unique_cell_types <- unique_cell_types[!is.na(unique_cell_types)]
  
  cat("Cell types found in", classification_column, "(cleaned):\n")
  print(unique_cell_types)
  
  # Create color mapping for available cell types
  plot_colors <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_cell_types))
  names(plot_colors) <- unique_cell_types
  
  # Apply Panel K colors where available (check both original and cleaned names)
  for(cell_type in unique_cell_types) {
    # First check if the cleaned name has a color
    if(cell_type %in% names(panel_k_colors)) {
      plot_colors[cell_type] <- panel_k_colors[cell_type]
    } else {
      # Check if any of the original names would map to this cleaned name
      original_names <- names(panel_k_colors)
      for(orig_name in original_names) {
        if(clean_cell_type_labels(orig_name) == cell_type) {
          plot_colors[cell_type] <- panel_k_colors[orig_name]
          break
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  cat("Color mapping:\n")
  print(plot_colors)
  
  # Create the UMAP plot using the cleaned labels
  p_panel_k <- DimPlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    group.by = temp_clean_col,
    cols = plot_colors,
    pt.size = 0.5,
    label = FALSE
  ) +
    ggtitle("Panel K: Cell Type Classification") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1,
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Cell Type", override.aes = list(size = 3)))
  
  # Clean up the temporary column
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[temp_clean_col]] <- NULL
  
  return(p_panel_k)
}

# Show all available classification columns
cat("Available classification columns:\n")
classification_options <- c("Extended_Cell_Type", "Refined_Classification", 
                           "Final_Cell_Type", "Primary_Cell_Type", 
                           "Collapsed_Cell_Type_New", "Collapsed_Cell_Type")

available_classifications <- classification_options[classification_options %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]
cat("Found:", paste(available_classifications, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Create Panel K plots for ALL available classifications
panel_k_plots <- list()

for(classification in available_classifications) {
  cat("\nCreating Panel K UMAP for:", classification, "\n")
  panel_k_plot <- create_panel_k_umap(classification)
  if(!is.null(panel_k_plot)) {
    # Update title to be more specific
    panel_k_plot <- panel_k_plot + 
      ggtitle(paste("Panel K:", gsub("_", " ", classification)))
    
    panel_k_plots[[classification]] <- panel_k_plot
    print(panel_k_plot)
  }
}

# Create a summary of what was generated
cat("\n=== Panel K Summary ===\n")
if(length(panel_k_plots) > 0) {
  cat("Successfully created Panel K UMAPs for:\n")
  for(i in 1:length(panel_k_plots)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %d. %s\n", i, names(panel_k_plots)[i]))
  }
  
  # If multiple plots were created, also create a combined view
  if(length(panel_k_plots) > 1) {
    cat("\nCreating combined Panel K view...\n")
    
    # Combine up to 4 plots in a 2x2 grid
    plots_to_combine <- panel_k_plots[1:min(4, length(panel_k_plots))]
    
    if(length(plots_to_combine) <= 2) {
      combined_panel_k <- wrap_plots(plots_to_combine, ncol = 2)
    } else {
      combined_panel_k <- wrap_plots(plots_to_combine, ncol = 2, nrow = 2)
    }
    
    combined_panel_k <- combined_panel_k + 
      plot_annotation(
        title = "Panel K: Multiple Classification Comparisons",
        theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
      )
    
    print(combined_panel_k)
  }
  
} else {
  cat("No Panel K plots could be generated.\n")
}

# Select the "best" Panel K plot for later use (prefer Extended_Cell_Type)
best_panel_k <- NULL
if("Extended_Cell_Type" %in% names(panel_k_plots)) {
  best_panel_k <- panel_k_plots[["Extended_Cell_Type"]]
  cat("\nUsing Extended_Cell_Type as the primary Panel K plot.\n")
} else if(length(panel_k_plots) > 0) {
  best_panel_k <- panel_k_plots[[1]]
  cat(sprintf("\nUsing %s as the primary Panel K plot.\n", names(panel_k_plots)[1]))
}

# Print the label cleaning reference
cat("\n=== Label Cleaning Reference ===\n")
cat("Original → Cleaned:\n")
cat("CAF_General → CAF\n")
cat("Macrophages_General → Macrophages\n") 
cat("Epithelial_General → Epithelial\n")
cat("CRC_Tumor_cells → Tumor\n")
```
